name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1130e1e969084c509cea27b6e4c34346&_e=DiiLLTZdwS8ecE25YxD-vhiIMQZfA2sxEBccDPmZmD0pJY6z_RujoBydWVamnPgXzlxJWyLMdVumZV40cSd0V4_3BcvyxHt7mISOFIaBG0qDUjs0rKE_oqtWUAOsOZEd9Rn14LI9e2olzG7JhTv61gqzLB4HXYS_7U91LTVeYjQC6FKqikK66w4quGjcskU6f_-zuADD4QbxNUsbGwNkk7xy3eNyJunM4lLNRcPrBZFNnEFNjFqmGmHr3xSUSzlkC_hyGdtfvhH-ebGqusOmQ1QHCky_sc2_VJHHpjbwJPbrZ-B2C9J9moaLPwziV8Y4uOpE1WVlznS1k08XofYDYhz1xm2oNEjGJN-Jhe4HTHThMeQfjqSO0dsyJXirJoOfwVU17Okq3KJpwdIKyMY8hg%3D%3D)

name: James Comer
subject: Big news about the “Big Guy”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
The FD-1023 form at the FBI is going to shed light on exactly what I’ve been saying.

Fellow Conservative, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=46e3d3cf130643b5bcff8877edc33652&_e=0NnAf5bH4kr_NrnALFjKO4ZIpZKia2PfIyM_WndxWdMS6qT9cFmg7StDQvMDhCSPZDHe3DecvQ19D5WIaJW31CDx9BIhr7EJ_3lODx8n5cDR1q4XvwYSWw5SxGfn-34mZVS2NtaDrykKqpSIyuDCu_fluQCKKqYrzs7lccZdL9B4vxEOHBbd8XsshyugVzpNEQodONjrAirVrzmgQyYteNBQZpOLu85ycplalIRKUuCiglCTILudytOfOae5T55S_xfcLTpc9vvlnlbYL7_IP5Mnr6RT2_ZmSsr3BLQvED8KV96v7HB3wwkOAMBQAGNCHSStDIzwl5fh-OZFrE_sCoXbHY1zU3jjxhBI05SLOln0DJDWz-jYD0MxHCxb2WnCXHj_Mhr8OrC8HGmSEfUM9w%3D%3D)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=46e3d3cf130643b5bcff8877edc33652&_e=0NnAf5bH4kr_NrnALFjKO4ZIpZKia2PfIyM_WndxWdMS6qT9cFmg7StDQvMDhCSPZDHe3DecvQ19D5WIaJW31CDx9BIhr7EJ_3lODx8n5cDR1q4XvwYSWw5SxGfn-34mZVS2NtaDrykKqpSIyuDCu_fluQCKKqYrzs7lccZdL9B4vxEOHBbd8XsshyugVzpNEQodONjrAirVrzmgQyYteNBQZpOLu85ycplalIRKUuCiglCTILudytOfOae5T55S1Op7YfCGA3cn1Jwb0VmXUSdZ2Y2JJiwf_20vQS5mQthKKbgPILJA2TQ9yKlC_oriChebfGG2f5WpcGUfi5SRavK2vHzWLslQhrMoTsYb3HFAwMhaDJ_mORiyK_gh-egnOYPV9SsX1sM3MFXf_9JpFg%3D%3D)
---
Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=46e3d3cf130643b5bcff8877edc33652&_e=0NnAf5bH4kr_NrnALFjKO4ZIpZKia2PfIyM_WndxWdMS6qT9cFmg7StDQvMDhCSPZDHe3DecvQ19D5WIaJW31CDx9BIhr7EJ_3lODx8n5cDR1q4XvwYSWw5SxGfn-34mZVS2NtaDrykKqpSIyuDCu_fluQCKKqYrzs7lccZdL9B4vxEOHBbd8XsshyugVzpNEQodONjrAirVrzmgQyYteNBQZpOLu85ycplalIRKUuCiglCTILudytOfOae5T55SpNygof6NkNXkCX0ORw1Ay2SoSrx3pY0dFvdLZJDFwKMUSDEdQ9gxpqS5w4ZXy6WV2C3F5oJrrrfQFFxC8fNEW7KzQfxEy604ZWIA6qOuv-R3VmFJC8l5qZBdF1paUAEMkLxpivAxomavqDlFRQlDsg%3D%3D)**
If you can’t, please take the time to say a prayer for our country, we’re going to need it.
With Courage,
| |
---
|
---
**James Comer**
Chairman,**** House Oversight Committee

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. | In case you missed the news, we are thrilled to share that Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s endorsed candidate for Allegheny County Executive, Sara Innamorato, secured a major victory in last night’s election.

Sara’s campaign had been dismissed as a long shot more than once throughout the campaign, and the fossil fuel industry spent millions of dollars on her opponents to ensure that they can continue to extract deadly fossil fuels throughout the county.

But despite all odds, the people of Allegheny County saw through all of the opposition’s lies and elected her with a resounding margin.

**Now, Sara’s victory sends a message to the fossil fuel giants and polluters everywhere that their days of poisoning our communities with impunity are numbered, and that the climate crisis matters to voters in Pennsylvania.**

Sara’s race is just one of many key local races happening this year. As our team is gearing up for our next round of endorsements for this year and beyond, we will need to make some tough decisions on how much support we will be able to provide to the candidates we need to elect.

[_**Will you contribute $10 today to elect more climate champions across the country? clean_body: We are thrilled to share that Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s endorsed candidate for Allegheny County Executive, Sara Innamorato, secured a major victory in last night’s election. | | In case you missed the news, we are thrilled to share that Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s endorsed candidate for Allegheny County Executive, Sara Innamorato, secured a major victory in last night’s election. Sara’s campaign had been dismissed as a long shot more than once throughout the campaign, and the fossil fuel industry spent millions of dollars on her opponents to ensure that they can continue to extract deadly fossil fuels throughout the county. But despite all odds, the people of Allegheny County saw through all of the opposition’s lies and elected her with a resounding margin. Now, Sara’s victory sends a message to the fossil fuel giants and polluters everywhere that their days of poisoning our communities with impunity are numbered, and that the climate crisis matters to voters in Pennsylvania. Sara’s race is just one of many key local races happening this year. As our team is gearing up for our next round of endorsements for this year and beyond, we will need to make some tough decisions on how much support we will be able to provide to the candidates we need to elect. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s elect more climate champions together, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. We still have a TON of work to do in order to defend our democracy. Right now we’re laser focused on upcoming opinions in two major Supreme Court cases.
→ In _Allen v. Milligan_ , Alabama Republicans are asking the Court to dismantle key provisions of the Voting Rights Act that protect communities of color from racial gerrymandering. **According to CNN, a ruling in favor of the GOP plaintiffs could “completely hollow out” the VRA before 2024.**

→ In _Moore v. Harper_ , North Carolina Republicans are advancing a fringe legal theory that could give GOP legislatures unchecked power over federal elections. **MSNBC warns that an endorsement of this theory “could make it legal to steal the next presidential election.”**
Team, we can’t control how SCOTUS will rule in these cases, so we’re focusing on what we can control by continuing our fight for fair maps, voting rights, and more all across the country. As A.G. Holder said recently, **“We will continue to stay engaged – EVERYWHERE – to protect our democracy.”**

[**_Whether we’re able to be as effective as we need to be will hinge in large part on support from this grassroots team. So please, don’t wait: Pitch in anything you can to help us keep fighting for a stronger democracy._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63447750/406815876/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230517_FR_5V_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwNTBmYjEyLTExZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TCuEzB_64yGiYn31s5oJg02xrGG510wp1X6k32YkE5g=)

Right now we’re laser focused on upcoming opinions in two major Supreme Court cases. → In Allen v. Milligan , Alabama Republicans are asking the Court to dismantle key provisions of the Voting Rights Act that protect communities of color from racial gerrymandering. According to CNN, a ruling in favor of the GOP plaintiffs could “completely hollow out” the VRA before 2024. → In Moore v. Harper , North Carolina Republicans are advancing a fringe legal theory that could give GOP legislatures unchecked power over federal elections. MSNBC warns that an endorsement of this theory “could make it legal to steal the next presidential election.” Team, we can’t control how SCOTUS will rule in these cases, so we’re focusing on what we can control by continuing our fight for fair maps, voting rights, and more all across the country. As A.G. Holder said recently, “We will continue to stay engaged – EVERYWHERE – to protect our democracy.” = Thanks! Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: SURVEY (via Wexton for Congress)
subject: How do you think we should fix the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63447806/406821506/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzViZWJlMy0xMmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4if2un7H2BqT_I8kEFvyuCdz2a1z-rcLUYb8-zDnLo=)
---
Our current Supreme Court — stacked with far-right judges thanks to strong-arm tactics from Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell — has ended the national right to reproductive freedom in America.

It's rolled back the EPA's authority to regulate greenhouse gasses and protect our environment. It's severely limited the ability of states to implement sensible gun safety laws.

It's opened the floodgates to dark money in our elections, it's given the green light to rampant gerrymandering, and it's gutted the Voting Rights Act.

**When an unelected group of extreme judges can undo decades of progress and uproot people's fundamental rights (and do so while ignoring ethics laws, as Clarence Thomas recently demonstrated), something needs to change.**

[**Jennifer wants to hear your thoughts. Will you take our survey on how to fix the Supreme Court?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63447807/406821507/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzViZWJlMy0xMmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4if2un7H2BqT_I8kEFvyuCdz2a1z-rcLUYb8-zDnLo=&emci=98054246-f8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8c5bebe3-12f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63447808/406821508/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzViZWJlMy0xMmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4if2un7H2BqT_I8kEFvyuCdz2a1z-rcLUYb8-zDnLo=&emci=98054246-f8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8c5bebe3-12f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Because of this court's actions, millions of Americans now live in states that ban abortion with zero exceptions for rape, incest, or the health of the mother.

Because of this court, legislative bodies increasingly do not reflect the popular will.

Because of this court, special interests have more influence on our politics than ever before.

It will take years to undo the damage of this court. As she works on legislation to restore our rights and make our system fairer, Jennifer knows that we need to act to prevent the Supreme Court (and any future one) from doing further damage. **We must find a way to make the court more accountable and reflective.**

[**Please take our survey and tell us how you think we should fix the Supreme Court →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63447809/406821509/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzViZWJlMy0xMmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4if2un7H2BqT_I8kEFvyuCdz2a1z-rcLUYb8-zDnLo=&emci=98054246-f8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8c5bebe3-12f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63447810/406821510/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_B2&refcode=EM_PET_230517SURV_N_SV_FULL_10_NG_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzViZWJlMy0xMmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4if2un7H2BqT_I8kEFvyuCdz2a1z-rcLUYb8-zDnLo=&emci=98054246-f8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8c5bebe3-12f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Thank you,

name: The Flyover
subject: One Email. All the News. No mainstream media bias.
body:

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Republican Rep. just filed motion to expel Adam
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2238%2E5257348%2EfsYFW0 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

We just got some incredibly disturbing and late breaking news.

A MAGA Republican Member of Congress, Rep. Anna Luna of Florida, just
filed a motion to expel Adam Schiff from the U.S. House of
Representatives.

Nobody stood up to Donald Trump and the extreme MAGA forces more than Adam
did, and now MAGA Republicans want payback. As retribution for Adam’s
leading the first impeachment of Trump and his prominent role on the
January 6th Committee, House Republicans are trying to remove him from
Congress altogether.

This is more than just an attack on Adam. This baseless resolution is
another attack on our democracy and those upholding the rule of law. Stand
up for the Constitution and against Trump, and you get expelled, is the
MAGA message.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2238%2E5257348%2EfsYFW0 ]We need to fight back – right now. Please rush $10 to our campaign to
help us push back hard against this blatant attempt at retaliation and
intimidation against Adam for his work holding Trump accountable.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2238%2E5257348%2EfsYFW0 ]Anna Luna announcement of House Resolution

On the same day that House Republicans rejected an attempt to hold Rep.
George Santos accountable for his many lies, federal indictment and plea
to foreign charges, now they’re going after Adam. Again.

And it's clear why: This is pure payback for Adam’s leadership in the
investigation and prosecution of Trump during the first impeachment, and
his efforts to hold Trump accountable for the insurrection.

Adam is still public enemy number one for Speaker McCarthy, Fox News,
Donald Trump and extreme MAGA Republicans, and they will do anything –
anything – they can to stop him from joining the Senate.

Even expelling him from the U.S. House of Representatives. And this MAGA
resolution could get a vote on the House Floor as soon as this month.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2238%2E5257348%2EfsYFW0 ]Derek – we can’t and we won’t let Republicans succeed, but
need to fight back ASAP. Trump and his extreme MAGA Republican followers
in Congress will do anything to stop Adam. Can you chip in $10 immediately
to help us push back?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230517_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2238%2E5257348%2EfsYFW0 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448181/406837698/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVjOTg1Ni0xOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-tbtliAMhBRPSBEsDyMzQmxrdZnNobSQ3jm1Bis9-A=&emci=3c5c9856-19f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3e5c9856-19f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

**Today, my colleagues and I introduced the Medicare for All Act of 2023, which would guarantee health care as a basic right in America.**

I want to tell you all about this incredible bill in just a second. **[But first, can you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can to help us fight for universal health care in this country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448182/406837699/-569515758?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVjOTg1Ni0xOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-tbtliAMhBRPSBEsDyMzQmxrdZnNobSQ3jm1Bis9-A=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448183/406837700/2097596723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVjOTg1Ni0xOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-tbtliAMhBRPSBEsDyMzQmxrdZnNobSQ3jm1Bis9-A=&emci=3c5c9856-19f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3e5c9856-19f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448184/406837701/2097596723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVjOTg1Ni0xOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-tbtliAMhBRPSBEsDyMzQmxrdZnNobSQ3jm1Bis9-A=&emci=3c5c9856-19f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3e5c9856-19f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448185/406837702/-569515758?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVjOTg1Ni0xOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-tbtliAMhBRPSBEsDyMzQmxrdZnNobSQ3jm1Bis9-A=)****
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448186/406837703/-569515758?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVjOTg1Ni0xOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-tbtliAMhBRPSBEsDyMzQmxrdZnNobSQ3jm1Bis9-A=)
Peter,** ** the United States is one of the only industrialized nations in the world that doesn’t guarantee health care to all of its citizens. It’s shameful.

**As a result, more than 85 million people are currently uninsured or underinsured—with my home state of Texas coming in at #1 in the nation for the percentage of its residents that don’t have coverage.**

Under Medicare for All, we can finally realize the dream of universal healthcare. It would expand Medicare to provide comprehensive care and benefits to every person in the U.S.

That includes primary care, dental, vision, prescription drugs, mental health care, reproductive care, and so much more. It also includes long-term care with no cost-sharing for older Americans or people with disabilities.

Patients would have the freedom to choose their doctors, hospitals, and other providers. And our health care system would be streamlined so that we could negotiate drug prices, cut waste, and improve care dramatically.

No one should go broke because they got sick or had an accident, and didn’t have insurance. In the wealthiest nation on earth, it’s time we guarantee this basic right to every American.

**[Help us fight for and deliver Medicare for All – chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can, to support our movement for universal health care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63448187/406837704/-569515758?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTVjOTg1Ni0xOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1-tbtliAMhBRPSBEsDyMzQmxrdZnNobSQ3jm1Bis9-A=)**

Thank you,
-Greg
****
Greg Casar
Congressman

clean_body: Peter, Today, my colleagues and I introduced the Medicare for All Act of 2023, which would guarantee health care as a basic right in America. I want to tell you all about this incredible bill in just a second. = **= = Peter, the United States is one of the only industrialized nations in the world that doesn’t guarantee health care to all of its citizens. It’s shameful. As a result, more than 85 million people are currently uninsured or underinsured—with my home state of Texas coming in at #1 in the nation for the percentage of its residents that don’t have coverage. Under Medicare for All, we can finally realize the dream of universal healthcare. It would expand Medicare to provide comprehensive care and benefits to every person in the U.S. That includes primary care, dental, vision, prescription drugs, mental health care, reproductive care, and so much more. It also includes long-term care with no cost-sharing for older Americans or people with disabilities. Patients would have the freedom to choose their doctors, hospitals, and other providers. And our health care system would be streamlined so that we could negotiate drug prices, cut waste, and improve care dramatically. No one should go broke because they got sick or had an accident, and didn’t have insurance. In the wealthiest nation on earth, it’s time we guarantee this basic right to every American. = Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This photo:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friends:
This photo was taken the year I first introduced a bill to guarantee paid leave for every worker in America:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs-email?refcode=2023_05_17_PaidLeave_Footer [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs-email?refcode=2023_05_17_PaidLeave_Footer]
Ten years later, a lot has changed. (To start, my boys are all grown up!)
We experienced a global pandemic that decimated the U.S. care economy. Millions of women, forced to choose between caring for their families or earning a paycheck, were driven out of the labor market.
And yet we still— still— are the only industrialized nation in the world that doesn't offer national paid family and medical leave.
Today, I joined with my colleagues in reintroducing [https://www.axios.com/2023/05/17/senate-democrats-reintroducing-paid-family-leave-bill] the FAMILY Act—our legislation that would create a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with up to 12 weeks of financial support for family or medical leave.
I can’t overstate just how transformative this policy would be:
Paid family and medical leave means parents will no longer have to choose between a paycheck and staying home with a sick child. It means people can stay in the workforce even if they need to take time off for themselves or when they need to care for a loved one, including elderly parents. It means parents with newborns or recently adopted children can take time off to bond with and care for their new child.
And paid family leave isn't a "women’s issue"—it’s a national economic issue. And in study after study, journal after journal, the reports are the same:
Paid leave helps the economy. Workers who receive paid leave are more likely to go back to work after they’ve met their medical or family needs—earning more money and helping companies avoid costly employee turnover.
It's simple. Paid leave should be a national priority. Families are the fundamental drivers of the economy, and I won't stop fighting until we get this legislation across the finish line.
I’m so, so grateful for your support.
-Kirsten
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs-email?refcode=2023_05_17_PaidLeave_Footer]

name: Troy Newman
subject: It just keeps getting more dangerous...
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Fellow American, It just keeps getting more dangerous. A few months back, my family, my team at Operation Rescue, and I began to be targeted by the Abortion Cartel like never before. You see, after Roe v. Wade was overturned, I knew the Abortion Cartel would be out for blood - more than just their average taste your infants that is - but I truly never expected it to escalate to this degree. The threats and attacks are nearly constant and as a result, we've been forced to pay TENS-OF-THOUSANDS in security bills. [**Fellow American, I need your support more now than ever. Can I count on you to make a generous donation of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more right now to keep myself, my family, and my staff at Operation Rescue safe?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-mxx6iqFA)
---
[**Protect Operation Rescue - Protect Life**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTM4LWNhODQzYTlmMTVmNDRlMjZiMzFiMDZkNzMwYzI3MDljIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL29wZXJhdGlvbi1yZXNjdWUucmV2di5jby9zZWN1cml0eT91dG1fc291cmNlPUZBTFIzOTEyNSJ9/-Fn8aiJppFtSrKzmQFjOEw)
---
I've been contacted by the FBI, who tell me the threats are REAL and I need to take necessary steps for my protection. I've even had local police officers show up at our office saying they had received a tip about a possible attack. We've had to deal with attempted arson and someone tampering with my car in the past. But we can't back down from our mission to stand up for the innocent victims of abortion. **I'm burdened by God to fight for this cause, but I can't just think about myself.** I've got employees, contractors, and their families to worry about, not to mention my own loved ones. We are deeply committed to making America fully and forever Abortion free - but I have to consider my loved ones safety. [**Fellow American, I'm reaching out to you because I could really use your help right now. With all the threats and attacks we've been facing, I need to make sure that my family, my team at Operation Rescue, and I stay safe. Would you be able to make a donation of $25, $50, $75, $150, or whatever you can afford to help us cover our increased security costs?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[**Protect Operation Rescue - Protect Life**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
We want to keep doing the work we do without having to scale back on any of our investigations or undercover operations. The devils who support abortion are trying to distract us from our mission with all these threats, but with your help, we can keep going and save lives. God Bless,
---
Troy Newman _Racketeer for Life_

subject: Biden to Launch “FedNOW” [[Move Your Money Now]
body:
Earlier this year President Biden signed the death warrant for America...

| | |
# ****
---
| | Earlier this year President Biden signed the death warrant for America...

**[Executive Order 14067](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667572%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f4tDE%2fSyGMyljDfx8xqDyg&sysid=1)** will essentially cancel your money.

You see Biden and the Fed have teamed up to create a controllable, traceable, programmable digital currency to replace the dollar...
---
| Giving ‘them’ full control to:
* Legally spy on how you spend every penny of your money...
* Take control of your bank account and your purchases...
* Silence any political opponents...

It’s already all underway...

The first phase launches next May with what they are calling “FedNOW” ...

name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It’s never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9poe0oq8pg31l3d2ff7af40leq62n0gpe13jaf8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5g62o33c1h2bs)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8sbh9oqsuqp1tq6ub80k61u2rqp6j5ff0n9d8o0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5g62o33c1h2bs)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. If you feel like you're behind in savings, want to make sure you're on track, or want to find investment vehicles to help you save more, talking to an advisor can help you [set and execute a retirement plan.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znkat1ltsqh06k27c91pgqdaqmef80s35uan0lrg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5g62o33c1h2bs)

Not sure where to start? We created [a free quiz](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztcthpv01j149me79sogj12460hiq5ml23p9746g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5g62o33c1h2bs) to help Americans find vetted financial advisors who serve your area, obligated to work in your best interest. It's never too late to get your finances straight.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh06dh2i22e46jcl0168ph6gcia9gsqv4umqc3uo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5g6ao74cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoh3v480rb1mkfk8mqcm9109gi22sio0m137v6b0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5g6ao74cdh2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsywPRcDNk

Pro-Life Statement

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osywPRcDNk

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I feel
like our culture has forgotten-or ignored-some very important and
basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life.
Our
society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its
most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was
once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has
become the new normal.
Medicine
tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also
tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves,
and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not
treated as though they are alive or even human.
As a
surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you
that they are very much alive.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
Life is a
precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No
person is disposable, and every life is precious according to
Him.
I believe
that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this
right by our society. I believe that together we can make a
difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also
believe that I'm not alone in this belief.
I believe
that you believe that too.
I've
started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are
looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that
values life but that takes people like you and I making a
commitment.
The first
step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing
to do to protect the lives of the unborn. Will you join me today
and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?
I've
created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you
read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals
and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the
unborn?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61815829:sywPRcDNk:m:3:2532013465:F671BD5430C201A17BE7BAFF401B83CE:r
Regards,
Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isywPRcDNk

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osywPRcDNk

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

| Friends and Neighbors,

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zujoonmvji0acm2chrnqpqstmmncdhc8qft72978_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5i6co36c5h2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zok2f925al54k4h74g37polqpnrvb6nuvnao87do_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5i6co36c5h2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrg7bbt4smbdrsi9dudhn95f7t4s76m90pqinui0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5i6co36c5h2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb8fqjorvskmj42ikdjhk18gb3iq49mj9u8qjtbo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5i6co36c5h2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z797jqmuq85983l6vtodemgb4olplgj67tglj6ag_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5i6co36c5h2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd0lr121oki18u85v69esqfqdo3o419b9rcu1268_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5i6co36c5h2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

ICYMI News

According to the [Drudge Report](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1urDAQRp_GdEbGf0Dh4jZ0e9uUaMDDMhuDV3hYkrePNnXq7zvS0fm4jTegRPv9P2wYeMkjzEwvHJWTTSe1GXUVw4Ko0VQYGt9Zq3qnTbUG762KELse3nPXxtZjYxoAbWfXxraioJU2yjWd6p0zvu4bOxuDbjJq8e3SCaswEuejfmTaecUlfecXHvWctyqFlflZhPkn9CD0cF1XvWEkIMb3Qehhx6sIPTzOwpJ2uQGzjMcZ7ygZoWCRU96msmJKEqZ8slzyl3xTsswrxjOhLCt84vkUeqiOEJ8XpUTFt8Kq-waUflX47zI_AQAA___BnGcc), Fox News is planning to put Sean Hannity into Tucker Carlson's 8 p.m. time slot as part of a reworking of its primetime lineup. Meanwhile, new controversy arose in Carlson's ongoing contract feud with Fox on reports the network [pushed him out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2OpDAQBOCnMZlHdtv8BQ4uIZtLL0TGtIe-NXhkemDm7VdsvFlJn1Qq1b_7ePeUaHv89Ss6jnn0genAUdVSdxLMCNXsIiKgqdDpprNW9TWYanF-io23Mxjdh9nCNKk2TFp3LTa9gV5X5ECBUbXuVF_Xprn12gZjsJ6Mik0bO2EVzsS53P5n2njBmD75wHILea2SW5ifuzB_BAwChsMXQv5cJmC4mgUMfAgYNjz3K7_CFxYZfEl73mTMb3mJxDexnPNKG-VNJn_uL2LJJzFjkfuST6nB1I02VlkBQ1Xc_DwpJdqbVlj1WD2ln0n8-0PfAQAA___SNGbW) as part of the settlement demand from Dominion Voting Systems. Both Fox and Dominion deny that claim.

## Taco Bell Wants to Liberate ‘Taco Tuesday’
Taco Bell says no one should own the term "Taco Tuesday," and has [asked the government](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2u4yAUhJ8Gd1j8GGIXFNu4y7ZbWhgO8dk9mMiQePP2V4l0u1vOaDT69P25LlePhPvtt8_gWiqLDw2fsAjD5ciVXlQXXQJQoDtw0o7DICajdLc5oWwwRgaIaZVSaLisowJrJmPlMAJ06JRQWhg5iskYbftJDkFrMKsWyV7SyAYBEVs5-r8F97ZBold5wtGHkjtyW2v3yvQvpmam5vM8-1T-r4-KO9T63jA1Eyao7UXA1Nx8KHwFIu4xVx78HoD4p20PqNG_eDt8hOyPf3wDijyUfIf2JuA1eyL-_c5P4O984t4dLt5PJMJqL2wQt-yRPoTtZ2FfAQAA__-YRHA_) to cancel rival Taco John's 40-year trademark claim to the term. The battle over legal use of "Taco Tuesday" goes back years, and Taco Bell says the term is now too generic to trademark. A [Taco John's restaurant](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PszAQhH-N6UD22uajcPE27vK2V6IFr4PvTBzBJoh_fyL1VaORRppHz9dtvGHK6XH_jys5jmXEmdObRmlr1degR6iCi0RAuiKn2t4YOVjQ1eJmq5QNwcAEkxqU7VtUAyBimAxZGavkQIKWVvVysFa3zaDMrDXZScvYdrEXRlJIXLbmu6QHLxTzWd60NXNZq-wW5ucu9D8BXoA_jqN57cgl4HkNBPidy3YK8Gt50JXXnQAvrQCvWgGecS41v2gPeNafMlHONW8YaMXtp47pvrAA30kA24GVshPgq82F55FyTnvbCSPvK6b8geK_Hf0GAAD__-bsZRY) first coined it in the early 1980s, and the company has been vigilant about protecting it ever since. Taco Bell is seeking no damages, only the legal right to use the phrase. Experts say the case could take years to work through the appeals process.

According to the Drudge Report, Fox News is planning to put Sean Hannity into Tucker Carlson’s 8 p.m. time slot as part of a reworking of its primetime lineup. | | | | | | Thursday, May 18, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering big changes at Fox News, Target’s problem with violence and theft, and a Chicago bar’s plans to offer an $800 Mai Tai. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Drudge: Hannity Set for Carlson Time Slot According to the , Fox News is planning to put Sean Hannity into Tucker Carlson's 8 p.m. time slot as part of a reworking of its primetime lineup. Fox says nothing is decided yet, but other media reports have taking later primetime slots in an all-new lineup--Laura Ingraham would not be included. Meanwhile, new controversy arose in Carlson's ongoing contract feud with Fox on reports the network as part of the settlement demand from Dominion Voting Systems. Both Fox and Dominion deny that claim. Target Loses $500 Million to ‘Violence and Theft’ Target CEO Brian Cornell warned that will cost the company more than $500 million this year, hurting its bottom line. The company reported its fifth straight quarter of declining profits this week. Last year, Target had of "inventory shrinkage --code for theft--leading to a total of $1.2 billion of lost merchandise and profit. Cornell said the company is working with to find a "public policy solution" to the problem, which he described as too big for one company to handle. Taco Bell Wants to Liberate ‘Taco Tuesday’ Taco Bell says no one should own the term "Taco Tuesday," and has to cancel rival Taco John's 40-year trademark claim to the term. The battle over legal use of "Taco Tuesday" goes back years, and Taco Bell says the term is now too generic to trademark. A first coined it in the early 1980s, and the company has been vigilant about protecting it ever since. Taco Bell is seeking no damages, only the legal right to use the phrase. Experts say the case could take years to work through the appeals process. ➤ A bipartisan group in Congress is working to save AM radio from disappearing from new cars. The group is introducing legislation to make it illegal for car manufacturers to sell cars without AM capability, citing emergency broadcasting and safety concerns. () ➤ The US Supreme Court declined to halt an Illinois ban on "assault-style" rifles while the ban is being appealed, leaving the gun ban in effect for now. Groups opposed to the law had asked the court for an injunction to stop enforcement while the case works through the courts. () ➤ Texas Gov. Greg Abbot is set to sign a new law that will strip authority from the state's liberal cities and shift it to the more conservative state government. The law transfers large areas of municipal governance away from cities such as Dallas, Houston, and Austin. () ➤ Democrat Donna Deegan won a surprise victory to become the new mayor of Jacksonville, the first female mayor in its history. Until the election, Jacksonville had been the largest city in America with a Republican mayor. () Flying together with: Doctor appointments as low as $19! Feeling sick but can't get an appointment? We have thousands of top physicians available for at the best prices available. The best part? It's fast: you can book an . () ➤ NY Yankees pitcher Domingo German was ejected from a game and may be suspended for having a "sticky substance" on his hand, the second pitcher this year tossed out by umpires after a substance check. Mets superstar Max Scherzer was ejected and suspended earlier this season. () ➤ Memphis Grizzlies star Ja Morant is facing new disciplinary action after displaying a gun -- again -- on a live Instagram video. Morant had just come off suspension for flashing a gun in a nightclub. NBA Commissioner Adam Silver said he was "shocked" at the new display. () Market Report 5/18/23 | ▲ | Nasdaq Natl. The drug, Xifaxan, is a treatment for irritable bowel syndrome. () ➤ Elon Musk says Tesla will use ads for the first time to help sell its cars. Though Musk previously resisted traditional marketing for the high-end car, he says that as the head of Twitter, an ad-supported service, he should behave as if "advertising is awesome." () ➤ The oldest known Hebrew Bible, thought to be 1,100 years old, was sold at auction for $38 million Wednesday. That makes the Bible the second most valuable manuscript ever sold, topped only by the $43 million paid for an original copy of the US Constitution. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cf0d5d98d24435b93eb113bfe3c0ccd&_e=Ht4uQ1bxaPhab0fnIMI3GSkLiHn-6m4yUzCG5ahtx-61JpOVY0XuVaqmOsz6iqyxfAdaY_VRSynkS1fU6HS8u8MT9hKAJ1IMh90EgQJnWCEGlp7B7X0QuVJPlM0-TrflwtjBKmYSbjC96HIGS17YtXGi4TcNJHG5M4JNjjMRmqm-1KkudmJhbaGX_KYQFkUI3jcvXl0ow8lKl8qxw4YrfhFJerFN2d0A71hNXgSABpxWCkY1EHNUd5gRdaFrqMUsBYQoW408PuaakbwTxXNDvPefUhDo6DkYwUEe_ecsUCQ5UywAc86zeWhzoqIz-OLxrV4CZgUS6n_7CAChEeDvZ1sfm3a0NloEG9P7jKf6RFGJjsiMVhvZAICpzLdhCnRQfoPZQWE12iPGyC5wmQnMPAXdBOm7HxDtIH8TXmq_Njs%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cf0d5d98d24435b93eb113bfe3c0ccd&_e=Ht4uQ1bxaPhab0fnIMI3GSkLiHn-6m4yUzCG5ahtx-61JpOVY0XuVaqmOsz6iqyxfAdaY_VRSynkS1fU6HS8u8MT9hKAJ1IMh90EgQJnWCEGlp7B7X0QuVJPlM0-TrflwtjBKmYSbjC96HIGS17YtXGi4TcNJHG5M4JNjjMRmqm-1KkudmJhbaGX_KYQFkUI3jcvXl0ow8lKl8qxw4YrfhFJerFN2d0A71hNXgSABpxWCkY1EHNUd5gRdaFrqMUsBYQoW408PuaakbwTxXNDvNC1AyScJXVKT49Usa_S7-qImF2k8JNwNPabRedOAX54YVAqebbofSueh_ijQ0hoCe-PyDTP2iBmTsl8VHsp9wHByPDmYwTrHNE1AC1lTqolNdlPOHzXHnqnPP9joCnzBiAtPC50lqqePUWhipa2TYA%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cf0d5d98d24435b93eb113bfe3c0ccd&_e=Ht4uQ1bxaPhab0fnIMI3GSkLiHn-6m4yUzCG5ahtx-61JpOVY0XuVaqmOsz6iqyxfAdaY_VRSynkS1fU6HS8u8MT9hKAJ1IMh90EgQJnWCEGlp7B7X0QuVJPlM0-TrflwtjBKmYSbjC96HIGS17YtXGi4TcNJHG5M4JNjjMRmqm-1KkudmJhbaGX_KYQFkUI3jcvXl0ow8lKl8qxw4YrfhFJerFN2d0A71hNXgSABpxWCkY1EHNUd5gRdaFrqMUsBYQoW408PuaakbwTxXNDvAcCmmin6OJEZjh80Jymw2NZFEPrJzlErUEehXyz8TmWVrav9Dp7B24JWf8fVxGtMn-bF7tCUjSzwqNdiiBD9cfr5tm2A7Z4TSqG5Dabs6yPgND0IBNQG8NMpQh5yLxANAdq5Eyb_svmbaMOGUCdqB0%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cf0d5d98d24435b93eb113bfe3c0ccd&_e=Ht4uQ1bxaPhab0fnIMI3GSkLiHn-6m4yUzCG5ahtx-61JpOVY0XuVaqmOsz6iqyxfAdaY_VRSynkS1fU6HS8u8MT9hKAJ1IMh90EgQJnWCEGlp7B7X0QuVJPlM0-TrflwtjBKmYSbjC96HIGS17YtXGi4TcNJHG5M4JNjjMRmqm-1KkudmJhbaGX_KYQFkUI3jcvXl0ow8lKl8qxw4YrfhFJerFN2d0A71hNXgSABpxWCkY1EHNUd5gRdaFrqMUsBYQoW408PuaakbwTxXNDvJfKOqrqMk2WbEmkvJ1rFrGLtsiUHejjwnMTdkYqMEu14Zzyai9PPf6M1k7w11eINQdyVg8ZXsxo65vUck0gAGUxiJ2BsC7MtWv11Mmmb19FhhgBaEg_a5Ro11m_Fq0CQDVxW6LHJe38LBdzA5uk8SM%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Who has final say on education? Parents or Unions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
In 2021, Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this...

| | | ****
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12eb479b43ca4673ad7a1f1f70fd7ef3&_e=_0l8kRuyG0I6wUl-sAlrQXvrOLQxdaZZgWb8ZM-ILlTin0fO6cZur1NogibojjLYPhuqRI-3T3J6CnaVvx42G49N0flmYdsXIOqjU570REPq5xC63dJgSF8Qn3XNdg7lIhNbi_PC4berHqDB2lEZF_aOB6eblN2nGzVMHIOHkSbIpNYUgrzTZcFjmP_v7r_Bf3zY321vsV7FgayZjQMUyRHX9OCQGFWJhBX9YrecrXAlgLpAzvphaGWuizBQJ4rIc0c_WGPz_rj01c3R2DXkwIELyQMi3zLujwjngsbHZGOlyMLzOW2q0yL3-5YDEnAfaLUgTy-BDW3fYj4T0hCxV0_V1ioWjR64Ycuf3birCc0IwWlDQTCc69nO-sAaZOsNrKeqpd-VuNtHy5rFR3aBUA%3D%3D)

| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **"****_Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids ' school curriculum. They don't."_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**
That's why we're reaching out to get your opinion on this issue. **Who should have the final say over children 's education: parents or teachers unions?**
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12eb479b43ca4673ad7a1f1f70fd7ef3&_e=_0l8kRuyG0I6wUl-sAlrQXvrOLQxdaZZgWb8ZM-ILlTin0fO6cZur1NogibojjLYPhuqRI-3T3J6CnaVvx42G49N0flmYdsXIOqjU570REPq5xC63dJgSF8Qn3XNdg7lIhNbi_PC4berHqDB2lEZF_aOB6eblN2nGzVMHIOHkSbIpNYUgrzTZcFjmP_v7r_Bf3zY321vsV7FgayZjQMUyRHX9OCQGFWJhBX9YrecrXAlgLpAzvphaGWuizBQJ4rIstVBiLqshUlwLO3m2v6e58LLjpZ31tCmadVzQV-lojy3Ul-F17HtUnDtL4QK2OGRSFtYHzNAVpr_Sm3CHahVwM1s1IvyWdEIc800vcRgJG9t38JobzQzv-aHt840jVQD4BbU028erJwqvgFjeD-9Jg%3D%3D)
---
| | Since 2020, Randi Weingarten has been actively involved and responsible in keeping public schools closed, but even worse, she's worked to sabotage the school choice movement wherever she can. **She 's left children behind, and parents without options.** Friend, do you think she really has the best interests of parents, students, or even teachers in mind? **Take our poll and let us know your thoughts:** **<[RESPOND NOW](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12eb479b43ca4673ad7a1f1f70fd7ef3&_e=_0l8kRuyG0I6wUl-sAlrQXvrOLQxdaZZgWb8ZM-ILlTin0fO6cZur1NogibojjLYPhuqRI-3T3J6CnaVvx42G49N0flmYdsXIOqjU570REPq5xC63dJgSF8Qn3XNdg7lIhNbi_PC4berHqDB2lEZF_aOB6eblN2nGzVMHIOHkSbIpNYUgrzTZcFjmP_v7r_Bf3zY321vsV7FgayZjQMUyRHX9OCQGFWJhBX9YrecrXAlgLpAzvphaGWuizBQJ4rIdMOrxptQhLtBrU5cK0NdYpSweYWcegXKsvt18e2k_4ZNwksOEZFSvwP377i-jKddo6VlSRKzxeQkr_4yGrQ-4_Ot5EDbDQzZ5I__hS6IktVo9Z9qHKRe0mvetrWWh7xxK0A3l9AwzAUwtqwbIHxuRg%3D%3D)>** Thank you, Elizabeth BeShears American Federation for Children

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d994331564214792a5c3964e05e16061&_e=HY_H4_MYslN2jgIiiB5phL_BLz_6yFMV3WgOJGJSsmqUqMgnCts2MTlzhM-5ro_qqWPQ9SMHMkEtjY6ab_YQAW2Q3IAxtjAJxYdy8rlUSpvTwElDF5Xnea98YLrpvGsNgJbRS7symI1flEPLgVds8Aol001ll88PjmSFuEPIHli32IPt1HUE8qQjtsMza1PMu31hrAfGa0_Ya9YWbGRkO3rAGtFPNVysrWod6v-Dj076uURZo39O_2T_eHPBn5f0A4KNuRXb6NnsKFzgXtSh-ufxVx-pgUUDX-UjzcxhCbpPXRYCe8D_zyDjK-TtfzhOewjyCgaqdGOoqxdByOCKTKAoddY2AC-Qay16VpYEhOTbSvZ4z4EMEq3f2zFml3oWzBzkc8053EyY8v82zMftW3-TiOD67ZCDia_Bs1Ag9eI%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d994331564214792a5c3964e05e16061&_e=HY_H4_MYslN2jgIiiB5phL_BLz_6yFMV3WgOJGJSsmqUqMgnCts2MTlzhM-5ro_qqWPQ9SMHMkEtjY6ab_YQAW2Q3IAxtjAJxYdy8rlUSpvTwElDF5Xnea98YLrpvGsNgJbRS7symI1flEPLgVds8Aol001ll88PjmSFuEPIHli32IPt1HUE8qQjtsMza1PMu31hrAfGa0_Ya9YWbGRkO3rAGtFPNVysrWod6v-Dj076uURZo39O_2T_eHPBn5f0A4KNuRXb6NnsKFzgXtSh-uWEwL28huAHaPqWn0W8C4FavY6cE9dpgSvTTjQghP3FPQvmVI3RFP5h7C1kXpfRBQEgEkDRUkw2Jq8phbGHO91xfb8gN-lDlGTyHZjt-kY60yR841eeR1hOvH2-UEfEl9402H3Hw38eC_StocGvr5M%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff...

---
Fellow Conservative, **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. **But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >>**
---

clean_body: Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff... | | | Fellow Conservative, Here is the situation: As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, he's voted wrong. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. This race is going to be one hell of a fight... My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018-- They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. They're going to flood the state with cash trying to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record. Democrats are all in. I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >> Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | id:2023-05-08-11:23:00:568t | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: Great news! We have just the person to sack Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump.
body:
Firing Ted Cruz from the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c0c2991-6fa7-4c9e-9374-ae15714d1218/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**We have just the person to sack Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: _Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bce66ec-bf88-4861-8167-d3f64d6ecee1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This is huge, and by that I don't just mean Colin Allred:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4523aec0-fa01-4ea5-bc4d-b9c750a84ab8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yes, he's a large guy who played football in the NFL. But he's a real tough guy--not a petrified wimp play-acting tough like Cruz. _**_Allred was raised by a single mother and worked his way up to joining the Obama Administration. Then, in a huge upset, he knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018 in a key swing seat._**_ Allred's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, with charisma as large as he is._ _Meanwhile, In addition to being a sleazoid who left Texans to freeze as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. _**_Cruz is on tape talking to nutball Maria Bartiromo about creating a fake commission to steal the election in 2020._** [**_The legal system will do what it'll do. What ___we__ _ can do is kick Cruz' seditionist arse outta the Senate in '24, when Allred destroys this shell of a man who barely held on by 2.5% vs Beto O'Rourke in '18. So, will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to elect outstanding Allred and remove Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7375e1f-8082-43ee-a59e-5915045a4001/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us elect a champion, and ousting a despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Full Mag News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bfeef50d3d8490d9c5e116653f75eb3&_e=le60NkRxZDZ7qB1v4kGdYvMKd6vf76AbraNrQXv5f-50CqsPaePUh-EejN28Zb4CLatWwN0EHpK7hcM9f_qq_Lmyl1CVhgF0DxxFNU6uCpm6wa8Ac9LLnQIGwVzjnHZiuZKrH8j1ygojO5f1CMifKwkx-bKYEiFcJIJVHsRg44P6D9OZhHBKj1DyvpheBhr3W_QVxWszMd9J4Dn1FrfxDp7Qiu6pXGsbnsjg4w4p88gvb7s90t0fax-VXZypbTAzaKk3HxVvzBfzDxa8oXjG4VFVDxFos3hAFF0FS7BHt1rJEfzI9RB1EvL2szgljRUzZTT-caEdXr3N8i0q07wBVrJfz6VbDqlocZJF3M7XUK-3woqAXF0aY62y5G2NdcfulHoYzhgmo_x1WwkT8_ikAHcj0COt6wi9TFglWB563cE%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bfeef50d3d8490d9c5e116653f75eb3&_e=le60NkRxZDZ7qB1v4kGdYvMKd6vf76AbraNrQXv5f-50CqsPaePUh-EejN28Zb4CLatWwN0EHpK7hcM9f_qq_Lmyl1CVhgF0DxxFNU6uCpm6wa8Ac9LLnQIGwVzjnHZiuZKrH8j1ygojO5f1CMifKwkx-bKYEiFcJIJVHsRg44P6D9OZhHBKj1DyvpheBhr3W_QVxWszMd9J4Dn1FrfxDp7Qiu6pXGsbnsjg4w4p88gvb7s90t0fax-VXZypbTAzaKk3HxVvzBfzDxa8oXjG4XqsdQX8IIDheQdg-w0bReRIPfF_Bg7IwKXoVhbbx6oQLfpQ9DaS3TD_Y6QEbMRcUnqvVFkaqsCIf9xjV7NxgiyV5yTtken6dyyodQhlnSFQ1fDgWx2AphHhAR-lXTjm5mU_pjeKfhNXpm-Jgb3atGE%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Asking for a moment of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It's National Police Week!

|
---
| | | |
---
|
Friend, there are two things that will never change for me:
1. Voting **RED**
2. Backing the **BLUE**

It's Steve Scalise.

Radical Democrats continue to shove their _**defund the police**_ and _**all cops are bad**_ messaging into mainstream media.

The growing popularity of their dangerous agenda has led to _**RAMPANT**_ crime across America and the _**BLATANT**_ disrespect of the heroes who put their lives on the line _**every single day**_ to protect us.

House Republicans are working overtime to send a unified message of support for our brave men and women in uniform.
**But none of this matters without your support!

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Arctic in peril
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1777794?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A bone-thin polar bear lumbers along an ice shelf, mustering all the strength she can to find food. Her icy hunting grounds are RAPIDLY MELTING, and food is getting harder to find. She’s beginning to STARVE!** The Arctic is _**warming TWICE as fast**_ as the rest of the world. Animals are already enduring some of the worst impacts of the climate crisis: _**malnutrition, starvation, and habitat loss!**_ Southern Beaufort Sea polar bears are the most imperiled polar bear population in the entire world, with only _**900 remaining!**_ Meanwhile, corporate cruise companies charge TITANIC vessels into the Arctic, spewing **TOXIC POLLUTION** , dumping **WASTEWATER** , and sending **ARCTIC-MELTING EMISSIONS** into the atmosphere. The air, water, and noise pollution harms local people and drives away fish that both polar bears and Indigenous communities rely on for food. **If the EPA allows this to continue, it’s a DISASTER waiting to happen.** You can help push the EPA to take action! **[The Arctic is melting FAST, Friend. Please take immediate action to STOP corporate cruise companies from recklessly charging through fragile habitats!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1777795?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1777796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Dumped toxic chemicals can seep into the food chain, hurting everyone and everything that depends on the ocean’s resources! Carnival Corporation, the largest cruise company, is the worst offender. It lugged _**11,000 tons of toxic heavy fuel through ESSENTIAL ARCTIC HABITATS in just one year!**_
The Arctic cannot afford the destruction caused by greedy cruise corporations. The EPA could take significant pressure off this fragile ecosystem by reining in cruise pollution. But we need YOUR help! [**If just 1 of every 13 people reading this email takes action, we can help give the Arctic a fighting chance against pollution. Tell the EPA to rein in corporate cruise companies by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1777797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1777796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
