name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: ACTION TODAY: Support Parental Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Send your Legislator a message today!

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/010001882eb34d03-484dc185-9820-481d-ab2d-54c440cd8266-000000/VO9cItis3jYJJFdQurQXL7S5mDw=322)
---
| | Derek,

Parents have the fundamental right and responsibility to direct the upbringing, education, and care of your children. Unfortunately, government officials and agencies can sometimes interfere with your parental decisions, even when you are acting in your children's best interests.

Here's some quick action you can take today to help us advance the Parental Bill of Rights:

Amplify our latest video driving people to ProtectNHKids.com:

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FJoeSweeneyNH%2Fstatus%2F1659157900084883457/1/010001882eb34d03-484dc185-9820-481d-ab2d-54c440cd8266-000000/r7yveJNGwHZQOClOXDNigbcvAxk=322)
---
[](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.ProtectNHKids.com/1/010001882eb34d03-484dc185-9820-481d-ab2d-54c440cd8266-000000/WHP5FTARjZZtf5jUrI-B30jqm1I=322)
---
You can do this quickly and easily by visiting [www.ProtectNHKids.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.protectnhkids.com%2F/1/010001882eb34d03-484dc185-9820-481d-ab2d-54c440cd8266-000000/aqjcjVp_YeckDjdFgkAoehdtNSg=322) and sending an email to your representative.

By taking this simple action, you can help protect your parental rights and those of all New Hampshire families. We need your voice to be heard and your support to make a difference. Please visit [www.ProtectNHKids.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.protectnhkids.com%2F/2/010001882eb34d03-484dc185-9820-481d-ab2d-54c440cd8266-000000/LfNV5c-ykekS_H-Ios7F-JjPNOI=322) today and send an email to your legislator in support of the Parental Bill of Rights.

Thank you for your support and commitment to protecting parental rights in New Hampshire.

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions
---

name: SmartAsset
subject: This Startup is Changing the Way People Retire
body:
Are you aware that you could boost your retirement outlook by using this new startup's no-cost service?

With over 110 million Americans over age 50, it's no wonder this Princeton alum's $1 billion startup is helping people plan for a comfortable retirement.
Are you aware that you could boost your retirement outlook by using this new startup's no-cost service?
[SmartAsset's free, five-minute tool](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a485b9e523f40708850207b8a6b634c&_e=OlRvVm0MtxtGpjUGYXP-OO77n-Ru_RdzTEDWJXRH2t8FC2paCQxZ9AlNt1Jx1vggAvx2u3jKNBRmfjtUbUD_QgRaqGJq6tZor-sW1VA0FLlTu6gbsoy1KnqEhk0d9nWeX9cUJ8RTKwozlQMzkxgfrOSpzcGnqKE2k0eXAN_ClQCrVeu14OouMuhKH0kG2_qf3MqHe83eysOLKNxygB9eS72zLi9p_XhVsMW4w_5cYjODcUKDDD3ocFMTvh2hYQFzBjS_nR3cl78YujBXp-YK8RSOZ0vTHeoKqYFht_nMhKSbK14UKDcn1qpX40Q8JcSfyjziNpDK_qA4KqApMwGJz6mxvD5rezwzZKuIKOZ9XSSIqK16xo-ibpFyEpTGmgS7yxG6kCy71C-CVHF4UUTM7BxoJ72RaR96g6-tD9O4GQGFS-PGCinmG-JfJiexU7Ya) makes it easy to find qualified financial advisors in your area or who serve your area. Our exclusive tool matches you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors who have passed a rigorous vetting process.
Unlike broker-dealers, stockbrokers and insurance agents, fiduciary advisors are legally bound to work in your best financial interest.
Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process.
**Why Meet With a Financial Advisor?**
It's more important now than ever to review your retirement plan with an [unbiased, fiduciary financial advisor](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a485b9e523f40708850207b8a6b634c&_e=OlRvVm0MtxtGpjUGYXP-OO77n-Ru_RdzTEDWJXRH2t8FC2paCQxZ9AlNt1Jx1vggAvx2u3jKNBRmfjtUbUD_QgRaqGJq6tZor-sW1VA0FLlTu6gbsoy1KnqEhk0d9nWeX9cUJ8RTKwozlQMzkxgfrOSpzcGnqKE2k0eXAN_ClQCrVeu14OouMuhKH0kG2_qf3MqHe83eysOLKNxygB9eS72zLi9p_XhVsMW4w_5cYjODcUKDDD3ocFMTvh2hYQFzBjS_nR3cl78YujBXp-YK8RSOZ0vTHeoKqYFht_nMhKRcb6SMFOo-mWx4VfsGLklvFXgIFTuHY4Hp7xNqgNa2bsrxvcN-R2iM8KLTighuAG3ndcBTFbgqIuROfHEYFGKlcV_z8OfxypBzTlDdzFltIcB8fOqQXSmycWgGff43r2EprESNRTs4KZqndNI_MJ7g). Here's why: Economic growth won't approach "normal" until as late as 2025, according to Bank of America's Chief Investment Office. This could mean your current financial plan might leave you without enough money to last your retirement.
Additionally, emotionally-charged decisions to sell off large quantities of stocks or other investments now lock in your losses, removing any chance for future growth. Research suggests people who [work with a financial advisor](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a485b9e523f40708850207b8a6b634c&_e=OlRvVm0MtxtGpjUGYXP-OO77n-Ru_RdzTEDWJXRH2t8FC2paCQxZ9AlNt1Jx1vggAvx2u3jKNBRmfjtUbUD_QgRaqGJq6tZor-sW1VA0FLlTu6gbsoy1KnqEhk0d9nWeX9cUJ8RTKwozlQMzkxgfrOSpzcGnqKE2k0eXAN_ClQCrVeu14OouMuhKH0kG2_qf3MqHe83eysOLKNxygB9eS72zLi9p_XhVsMW4w_5cYjODcUKDDD3ocFMTvh2hYQFzBjS_nR3cl78YujBXp-YK8RSOZ0vTHeoKqYFht_nMhKSOh_gpr5lTv1EYW6pZF0JmYaTgfp3ov-0vcZIWPNPV59pHICqlWJROQ6zYW51ZOXgX9bPwHD-7Sc7vvpGk291ggMGqsJVZKp7a9LWZ5qbzwUM8dxPS09LAyn1irxrAmM-fBqGbCRHIKNxVXgLQbTzT) feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.
Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.
A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.
Before this groundbreaking, easy-to-use tool, there was no simple way to quickly compare financial advisors. Hundreds of thousands of smart investors and retirees have already used SmartAsset's [simple, no-cost service](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a485b9e523f40708850207b8a6b634c&_e=OlRvVm0MtxtGpjUGYXP-OO77n-Ru_RdzTEDWJXRH2t8FC2paCQxZ9AlNt1Jx1vggAvx2u3jKNBRmfjtUbUD_QgRaqGJq6tZor-sW1VA0FLlTu6gbsoy1KnqEhk0d9nWeX9cUJ8RTKwozlQMzkxgfrOSpzcGnqKE2k0eXAN_ClQCrVeu14OouMuhKH0kG2_qf3MqHe83eysOLKNxygB9eS72zLi9p_XhVsMW4w_5cYjODcUKDDD3ocFMTvh2hYQFzBjS_nR3cl78YujBXp-YK8RSOZ0vTHeoKqYFht_nMhKSRSXxsewJicb_yngrCRtmUbI2qggOb45ddd0xb8eIyrzX2N0X7WcpARP1chXjoIqdfdgrcK8Jacp7nOHnk4XQ7tm_umtyLsnkwyfU-G7GH_YA7an6hV4gxLv3bmijtSNt0V4mTiVb7WQ3jBjue24fl) to compare their financial advisor matches.
SmartAsset works with a robust network of financial advisors all across the U.S., including individual advisors and large investment firms to cater to anyone's financial situation. CEO Michael Carvin says he expects the number of advisors to grow into the tens of thousands soon.
**How to Compare Financial Advisors at No Cost to You**
Our no-cost tool makes it easy to find a reliable, reputable advisor so you can make an informed decision and choose the right one for you. Now you can get matched with up to three local fiduciary investment advisors that are vetted and subject to our due diligence criteria. The entire matching process takes just a few minutes.
Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one.
[Click here to get started.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a485b9e523f40708850207b8a6b634c&_e=OlRvVm0MtxtGpjUGYXP-OO77n-Ru_RdzTEDWJXRH2t8FC2paCQxZ9AlNt1Jx1vggAvx2u3jKNBRmfjtUbUD_QgRaqGJq6tZor-sW1VA0FLlTu6gbsoy1KnqEhk0d9nWeX9cUJ8RTKwozlQMzkxgfrOSpzcGnqKE2k0eXAN_ClQCrVeu14OouMuhKH0kG2_qf3MqHe83eysOLKNxygB9eS72zLi9p_XhVsMW4w_5cYjODcUKDDD3ocFMTvh2hYQFzBjS_nR3cl78YujBXp-YK8RSOZ0vTHeoKqYFht_nMhKQeKATjQT331rWd1JODc1S1KANnLfc0KLEpxr6kjzU8KPbpTJH5VCsh9uJq326vr0EFh-piEs_0U1kkjYeHlFhtGmXxSfNIymIvhYaDlpAospZIHncTLitpniwVnGu8JtLosryg9L9xRws7qw8C3hYc)

clean_body: Are you aware that you could boost your retirement outlook by using this new startup's no-cost service? With over 110 million Americans over age 50, it's no wonder this Princeton alum's $1 billion startup is helping people plan for a comfortable retirement. Are you aware that you could boost your retirement outlook by using this new startup's no-cost service? makes it easy to find qualified financial advisors in your area or who serve your area. Our exclusive tool matches you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors who have passed a rigorous vetting process. Unlike broker-dealers, stockbrokers and insurance agents, fiduciary advisors are legally bound to work in your best financial interest. Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process. Why Meet With a Financial Advisor? It's more important now than ever to review your retirement plan with an . Here's why: Economic growth won't approach "normal" until as late as 2025, according to Bank of America's Chief Investment Office. This could mean your current financial plan might leave you without enough money to last your retirement. Additionally, emotionally-charged decisions to sell off large quantities of stocks or other investments now lock in your losses, removing any chance for future growth. Research suggests people who feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement. Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio. A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor. Before this groundbreaking, easy-to-use tool, there was no simple way to quickly compare financial advisors. Hundreds of thousands of smart investors and retirees have already used SmartAsset's to compare their financial advisor matches. SmartAsset works with a robust network of financial advisors all across the U.S., including individual advisors and large investment firms to cater to anyone's financial situation. CEO Michael Carvin says he expects the number of advisors to grow into the tens of thousands soon. How to Compare Financial Advisors at No Cost to You Our no-cost tool makes it easy to find a reliable, reputable advisor so you can make an informed decision and choose the right one for you. Now you can get matched with up to three local fiduciary investment advisors that are vetted and subject to our due diligence criteria. The entire matching process takes just a few minutes. Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsxQ0s3DJN

What strange times we live in.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osxQ0s3DJN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

What
strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you
have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries
being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire-all while
authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or
stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic
parishes in the United States?

How about
the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by
up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that
forced many houses of worship to close?

These
news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians
encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it
seems like faith in America is under siege.

That's
one reason we're releasing our latest free online course,
"Ancient Christianity," this month. I hope you'll enroll today
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61815873:sxQ0s3DJN:m:3:2532013465:B7683C379299C4E1BE63D1E725B820D1:r

The
course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians
who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same
time, they shaped the Christian church and established the
foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

Their
examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.

For
instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution
of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin
Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a
lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he
wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and
immorality.

That's
why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting "Ancient
Christianity" to millions of your fellow citizens.

To
achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by
midnight on May 22 to share this important free online course
with as many people as possible.

The
faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online
courses possible. You also allow us to reach and teach millions
through other educational outreach efforts, like Imprimis and our
K-12 education programs.

And every
supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY
PENNY of taxpayer funding-even indirectly in the form of federal
or state student loans and grants.

We must
educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we
can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and
set an example for us to follow.

So, will
you help us reach and teach people just like you-urging them to
enroll in "Ancient Christianity"?

Using
this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our
development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of
$25, $50, or any amount.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61815873:sxQ0s3DJN:m:3:2532013465:B7683C379299C4E1BE63D1E725B820D1:r

Together,
we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for
the next generation of Americans-so they don't have to live
through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

### LOCAL COLORS

The Local Colors Festival celebrates the rich ethnic and cultural diversity of the Roanoke Valley by bringing together people of different heritages to highlight their cultures. Now in it's 32nd year, this family-friendly festival features an Opening Ceremony, performances, and dozens of vendor booths of cuisine, artisan crafts, and educational displays representing cultures from around the world. The children's area has fun, interactive activities for youth to learn about different cultures. Plus, there is an international beer truck!
---
| |
### THOUSANDS OF TEACHING LICENSES RENEWED

The Virginia Department of Education has taken emergency action this past Thursday to automatically extend teaching licenses due to department delays that left some teachers at risk of losing their jobs for the upcoming school year.
This action will automatically extend every renewable license set to expire on June 30 by one year.

### Adele McClure for Delegate HD-2

Adele is the daughter of a resilient early childhood educator and the daughter of a Filipino immigrant who served in the U.S. Army. She is an advocate for justice, an LGBTQIA+ activist, and a long-time Arlington community leader and civic volunteer.
Adele's lived experiences combined with her policy expertise and experience in the state legislative and executive branches make Adele ready to hit the ground running on the first day. She would serve as both the first Black person and the first Asian person to represent Arlington County in the Virginia General Assembly.

### $3 Million Grant for Untold Appalachian Monuments
---
Virginia Tech professors get $3 million to create monuments to tell untold stories across Appalachia. The professors will work with community groups across Virginia's Appalachia region to commemorate the stories of peoples who haven't received historical recognition. Six to ten monuments will be erected by the end of 2025.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | | ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH | | | | == | == | LOCAL COLORS The Local Colors Festival celebrates the rich ethnic and cultural diversity of the Roanoke Valley by bringing together people of different heritages to highlight their cultures. Now in it's 32nd year, this family-friendly festival features an Opening Ceremony, performances, and dozens of vendor booths of cuisine, artisan crafts, and educational displays representing cultures from around the world. The children's area has fun, interactive activities for youth to learn about different cultures. Plus, there is an international beer truck! | | THOUSANDS OF TEACHING LICENSES RENEWED The Virginia Department of Education has taken emergency action this past Thursday to automatically extend teaching licenses due to department delays that left some teachers at risk of losing their jobs for the upcoming school year. This action will automatically extend every renewable license set to expire on June 30 by one year. | == | == | | | | | == Canvass with Team Sam! Join us Sunday to canvass to re-elect Sam Rasoul! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on May 21st at River's Edge Park, 12:30 pm. Located at 304 Reserve Ave SW, Roanoke, VA 24016. RSVP ==. | | | CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT | | | | == | == | Adele McClure for Delegate HD-2 Adele is the daughter of a resilient early childhood educator and the daughter of a Filipino immigrant who served in the U.S. Army. She is an advocate for justice, an LGBTQIA+ activist, and a long-time Arlington community leader and civic volunteer. Adele's lived experiences combined with her policy expertise and experience in the state legislative and executive branches make Adele ready to hit the ground running on the first day. She would serve as both the first Black person and the first Asian person to represent Arlington County in the Virginia General Assembly. | | | IN THE COMMUNITY | | | == Local Cheer Team Fundraiser Xplosion Athletics is a youth Stomp and Shake cheer team in Roanoke made up of nearly 50 Roanoke children and young adults (from 9 to 18 years old)! name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Regarding Rashida Tlaib...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I just CANCELED her event

| |
---
| | | Progressive radical and “Squad” member Rashida Tlaib just tried to host an anti-semitic event decrying the 1948 founding of Israel as a “catastrophe”.

**So, I just CANCELED her event, and will instead throw a commemoration of Israel’s 75th anniversary.**

Let me be clear: I will not stand for the Squad’s anti-semitism.
---
| | | [STAND WITH KEVIN](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667581%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8d2Gy4TF4EXugni3ittK6Q&sysid=1)
---
| | | [STOP THE SQUAD](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667582%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DV7J3jFGWiMwaeOEakrO%2bg&sysid=1)
---
As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend Congress from corruption and hate, which is precisely why I FIRED Schiff, Swalwell, and Omar earlier this year:
* Adam Schiff's abuse of his position on the Intel Committee to LIE in pursuit of President Trump proves his inability to put national security and integrity over partisan games.
* Eric Swalwell's relationship with a Chinese spy is quite literally the definition of jeopardizing national security, which is why the FBI briefed me on the matter.
* And Ilhan Omar's openly anti-semitic statements and stance directly imperil our alliance with our #1 ally in the Middle East: Israel.

Now, Rashida Tlaib is DOUBLING DOWN on bringing HATE to the halls of Congress...

I promised I'd restore accountability to your government. Now I am delivering, and the Democrats are FURIOUS.

**If you stand with my decision to FIRE these bad actors, and CANCEL Rashida Tlaib’s HATEFUL event I need you to stand with me now:**

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Conservative Kansas Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
Faith, Family, Freedom, Personal Responsibility | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Kansan,

Growing up on a farm in the Big First taught me a lot. Kansans are a strong breed: we
work hard, pray hard, band together, sacrifice for one another, and understand that
America’s heartbeat lies in families and communities like our own. As I represent you in
Congress, I bring the conservative Kansas values that I learned as a child into every
decision I make. Over the next few weeks, I will be reflecting on just four of them:

**✓ Freedom
✓ Faith
✓ Family
✓ Personal Responsibility**

These are the values that will save America, and they are alive and well in Kansas.
For too long, the federal government has been telling Americans to sit down, be quiet,
submit, and be grateful that things aren’t worse. That’s not my vision of this country, and
I don’t serve in Congress to uphold those ideas.

**_My message is this: stand up, make your voice heard, exercise your freedoms, and let’s work together to make America stronger._**

You can ([Click Here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=1e9ef1f2d4&e=a9d1410029)) or visit my website at [www.traceymann.com](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=f588645b92&e=a9d1410029) to learn more or contribute online.

In the Fight,
Tracey Mann

P.S. I stand for Kansas, and I always will. I promise that I will do everything within my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please donate today and help take our country back.

subject: Asking for a moment of your time

body:
It's National Police Week!

|
---
| | | |
---
|
Friend, there are two things that will never change for me:
1. Voting **RED**
2. Backing the **BLUE**

It's Steve Scalise.

Radical Democrats continue to shove their _**defund the police**_ and _**all cops are bad**_ messaging into mainstream media.

The growing popularity of their dangerous agenda has led to _**RAMPANT**_ crime across America and the _**BLATANT**_ disrespect of the heroes who put their lives on the line _**every single day**_ to protect us.

House Republicans are working overtime to send a unified message of support for our brave men and women in uniform.
**But none of this matters without your support!

[Will you take 10 seconds and join me in thanking our brave law enforcement officers in honor of National Police Week?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8onjdemc5tus1s19iv7so96nmcluhojsr5b89ig_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5h66pb4cth2bs "Will you take 10 seconds and join me in thanking our brave law enforcement officers in honor of National Police Week?")**

Steve Scalise

Fellow American,

This is the sad state of our nation.
* 14,000 illegal immigrants cross our Swiss-cheese southern border *daily* now that Title 42 has ended.
* Veterans, who fought for our freedoms, are being evicted to welcome those who break our laws.
* Fentanyl - a weapon of mass destruction in America - is flooding into our country without secure borders.

**This is _not_ the American way.**

We have a president who has opened our border to allow illegal immigrants into our country to give them free resources while Americans are struggling. As a child of immigrants, I understand the want to come to America to fulfill the American Dream. I don't even **blame** the people crossing the border. I **blame** the reckless abandonment that lies at the feet of Biden. Or more precisely, his handlers.

We need a Commander in Chief who will protect Americans at all costs, _not one who puts Americans last._

I want to hear from you: **[Are you concerned about the end of Title 42? Is border security one of your top priorities?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=af7ca75d032545b690b89e9c2c9beec3&_e=ncB4S8TkUu6tg69m5HZqpg07NEyiohciQKRxg6Co1M8CPAb_oIW5CWuj8wMOZFQ_n5rIo77nScHTzlWwmk1jsyAdbtSnslmC7EJc6dTctBiqXuaYnHMvNmyfwJ7uMRAFx4uyGnZCETHgFfdrohRXSRmf0_Q1H3tlZvaF1MrPyVcSDNVRuiWLdsal7qu-c-CDvXk0ASoM0e0wvl8hGacYKVvl7Xm9a71QzdmdMVGLZgWkUVIaRTU9hyCZ3ppT1Ph4AbDHIXSnrN-9e9i8f1dKzVVwvg6l4i7avJdbI8kxz5-ObhOeIviOtcFlXam0Zs_Z21KG7z0reiUtJ6KycanSS6NKPx-f7yIk_NSZpwt9NamMduhVqerhIXELJN0b7WNp3Koct5EasSbTQToKduF-X2CIU5UIKQNByhwgaI_EJz2Mto47mQUa2dveRLltRDUVIwp0jsG_UacjNVFxbz4RTGsJdaJcRY1XP0ZFv2KW9IVDxVtiSVSSVf2TWerQuIubywW8ZET4dTsrhSA8AWbb-imjL04RlFbp6UDdlyX1S97RRBOiISExzee2XqWl9KSu)**

When I become President of the United States, I will use our military to secure the southern border and restore the rule of law in the United States. **That is what it means to be an American.**

**[Your input on border security will help ensure this topic stays front and center on the minds of American voters.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=af7ca75d032545b690b89e9c2c9beec3&_e=ncB4S8TkUu6tg69m5HZqpg07NEyiohciQKRxg6Co1M8CPAb_oIW5CWuj8wMOZFQ_n5rIo77nScHTzlWwmk1jsyAdbtSnslmC7EJc6dTctBiqXuaYnHMvNmyfwJ7uMRAFx4uyGnZCETHgFfdrohRXSRmf0_Q1H3tlZvaF1MrPyVcSDNVRuiWLdsal7qu-c-CDvXk0ASoM0e0wvl8hGacYKVvl7Xm9a71QzdmdMVGLZgWkUVIaRTU9hyCZ3ppT1Ph4AbDHIXSnrN-9e9i8f1dKzVVwvg6l4i7avJdbI8kxz5-ObhOeIviOtcFlXam0Zs_Z21KG7z0reiUtJ6KycanSS6NKPx-f7yIk_NSZpwt9NamMduhVqerhIXELJN0b7WNp3Koct5EasSbTQToKduF-XyLovF4Qnn0xgDTXgAHgx6P__NxMH7OJoBn0WGfF4EKDb2PuAUm5fdaY2h9IuxPvNFjiVBiPhIrDgJV1fyW5bCtZ3BOb-iAThNisJK5xHXnigujMFJ4qTVxrgkXqrFlUOV0uee2ZCb8hYoLtg6XIZ1UTyotywK33_mdlFv5-7k31)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: We need a Commander in Chief who will protect Americans at all costs, not one who puts Americans last. | | Fellow American, This is the sad state of our nation. 14,000 illegal immigrants cross our Swiss-cheese southern border daily now that Title 42 has ended. Veterans, who fought for our freedoms, are being evicted to welcome those who break our laws. Fentanyl - a weapon of mass destruction in America - is flooding into our country without secure borders. This is not the American way. We have a president who has opened our border to allow illegal immigrants into our country to give them free resources while Americans are struggling. As a child of immigrants, I understand the want to come to America to fulfill the American Dream. I don't even blame the people crossing the border. I blame the reckless abandonment that lies at the feet of Biden. Or more precisely, his handlers. We need a Commander in Chief who will protect Americans at all costs, not one who puts Americans last. I want to hear from you: | When I become President of the United States, I will use our military to secure the southern border and restore the rule of law in the United States. That is what it means to be an American. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. body:
Subscriptions to services like Netflix, Disney, and HBO only serve to further advance the radical left’s America-Last agenda. I’m running for Congress | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8125713?e=0426928d91)

Peter,

Team Majewski is gaining momentum, and we need all of the support we can get from now until the end of quarter on Friday, June 30th to send a strong message to the corrupt Washington establishment.

Subscriptions to services like Netflix, Disney, and HBO only serve to further advance the radical left’s America-Last agenda. I’m running for Congress to save Ohio from Kaptur’s corrupt “leadership” in Washington.

[**Consider subscribing to our fight to take America back with a monthly subscription of $20.24 or ANY amount from now until Election Day!**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=2314eaedaf&e=0426928d91)

---
We work hard for our money, and Corrupt Kaptur is coming up with new ways to send your hard-earned tax dollars to her friends in Ukraine.

The rogue Biden regime is opening the southern border at a rate never before seen in our history and providing illegal immigrants with social services funded by the fruits of your labor.
**Enough is enough. Ohio’s 9th district deserves representation in Congress that will serve as OUR VOICE in Washington. Select an option below to make a monthly contribution to Team Majewski today and join our fight to FIRE Marcy.

**[**Donate $5 >>>
Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.24 (MOST POPULAR) >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate ANY monthly amount to SAVE AMERICA >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=10ef5ade63&e=0426928d91)
We cannot afford two more years of Marcy’s self-interested representation in Washington. We need leaders who will put the people of Ohio first, and that’s exactly what I plan to do.

I’m running for Congress to cut taxes and reel back burdensome regulations. The people of Ohio are some of the hardest working people I know. They should not be forced to work two or more jobs while BILLIONS are being sent overseas.

With your support, we are going to END the reckless spending spree in Washington and give hardworking Americans the ability to enjoy the fruits of their labor.

[**Can I count on your support?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=7de7bc6034&e=0426928d91)

Ohio CD-09

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Because of GOP obstructionism, we aren't safe from guns anywhere. Gen Z has had enough of this, and Voters of Tomorrow has been key to turning out Gen Z in such massive numbers they've upended our electoral landscape.
body:
Our school-shooting-drill generation has had enough
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3454832-628e-4d8d-9f99-ce7e3a103d5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The massacre in Allen, TX, was horrifying & heartbreaking. Those who lost their lives include a five-year old child, just beginning life.** _I'm not gonna go into statistics. I don't have the heart to. So, just three things:_ **1)** [**_We can stop this any time we elect enough Democrats. Democrats support the measures that have ended these tragedies in every other democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6259226e-98c2-4a69-8c0c-da8cd1ac4cef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **2) _Because of the GOP, we aren't safe anywhere._** **_Houses of worship. Malls. Schools. Dance clubs. It's only getting worse._** **3) _Gen Z is, sadly, the school-shooting-drill generation._** **_They've had enough of this, and the past two elections it's been a top issue turning them out in record numbers, breaking electoral records._** **_Voters of Tomorrow has been key to turning out Gen Z in such massive numbers they've upended our electoral landscape. Continuing to swell their presence at the polls is our only way to stop this utter madness._** [**_Will you join a heartbroken Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Voters of Tomorrow?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7562cef9-c447-41e2-b16c-ea144533e530/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This. Must. End.** Cliff
---

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td94a543f-7623-48b2-823e-4b513a6ae943/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

American Veterans are continuously disrespected, and this goes too far.

American Veterans are continuously disrespected, and this goes too far. |
https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/pavp-adv?amount=100&utm_source=sg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230516_lawler_prioritize-american-veterans-petition
Friend,

Have you seen the news coming out of New York yet?

https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/pavp-adv?amount=100&utm_source=sg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230516_lawler_prioritize-american-veterans-petition

Mayor Adams, Governor Hochul and the New York Democrats in power have thrown our brave veterans who fought for this country out on the streets – and have given their rooms to illegal immigrants.
I’m so sick and tired of seeing American Citizens being put last – especially our veterans.
I think you might feel the same, and if you do, I hope you’ll join me in putting an end to this sheer madness.
Please, take a moment to sign my PRIORITIZE AMERICAN VETERANS Petition, to ensure the needs of Veterans and New Yorkers are put first. >> (https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/pavp-adv?amount=100&utm_source=sg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230516_lawler_prioritize-american-veterans-petition)

Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL () As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. _Many of you have asked for my recommendations on the elections coming up August 8th. The primary elections are some of the most important elections because many voters skip the primary elections thinking they are unimportant._
_Public Service Commissioner is more important than many realize because the Biden Administration has targeted our energy grid and seems determined to destroy our way of life._
Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTIxODg1MjUyLCJzIjoxNTI2NzgxLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjg0NDE2NjkwLCJleHAiOjE2ODcwMDg2OTAsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.R2k3OsOONGBxHdlEvHZlk-rOiAXngguUmV4NaJuNG50?)
_Chris Brown is a founding member of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus and has a proven conservative record. I urge you to support him both financially and with your vote on August 8._
_Below is a message from Chris. Learn more about Chris at[www.chrisbrown4ms.com](https://substack.com/redirect/c304c856-953b-4ff5-8e1f-e32ba9529641?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
_Dana_
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd4bcfd3-d250-42f7-934e-2354a171b186?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Friends,
Our campaign for the Public Service Commission in the Northern District of Mississippi is showing significant momentum. In recent polling, I received over 25% of the vote, with my opponent only having 11%. This poll is a clear sign that the people of Mississippi want a proven conservative leader who will stand up to the Radical Left's agenda.
The standards for the decisions I've made in Mississippi's State House are the same standards I'll hold as Public Service Commissioner:
* Does it put Mississippi and America **FIRST**?
* Does it enhance the quality of life for Mississippians?
* Does it fit our Mississippi Values?

Joe Biden and Washington Democrats have an America-last approach that has put American families in the worst possible positions. The cost of living is outrageous, wokeness has taken over, and American energy independence has become taboo.
As a businessman, I am for keeping all options regarding our energy needs on the table. I want Mississippi to be on the cutting edge in this space. At the same time, we must use common sense to keep rates low. Mississippi families deserve real solutions now.
[Will you help keep Joe Biden's anti-American policies out of Mississippi?](https://substack.com/redirect/97eb9e3a-f218-4a63-add4-ea2a21651ced?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The people of Mississippi have spoken, and they're on our side. We're well on our way to being nominated. Still, we must ensure we continue to do the work necessary to finish strong.
[Will you help us stand strong with a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, or anything you can contribute today?](https://substack.com/redirect/97eb9e3a-f218-4a63-add4-ea2a21651ced?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Sincerely,
Chris

name: Ted Cruz
subject: URGENT: Here is the situation we’re facing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff...

| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79379%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zh7UlEhmzRCn5HnO61gh6Q&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Conservative, **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It’s just been a few days since Allred announced he’s running against me in 2024. **But he’s already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I’m asking you to please step up right now >>**
---
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION TO TED CRUZ >>**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79370%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4BLbe3229zRJsdVjSVmn%2fQ&sysid=1)
---
Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty,
---
[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79379%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zh7UlEhmzRCn5HnO61gh6Q&sysid=1)
---
Ted Cruz
---

Friend,
I need you to see this headline immediately:
**“ Raskin says [Special Counsel] Jack Smith likely mulling seditious conspiracy charges against Trump”** [Source: _Washington Examiner_]
It was just revealed that Democrats colluded with the FBI and the CIA to **FRAME** their political opponent – _me_ – to try and stage a COUP to sabotage our presidency.
**_But the Biden-appointed Special Counsel is instead reportedly mulling SEDITIOUS CONSPIRACY CHARGES against me despite being innocent_ _..._**
In their eyes, shunning the special interests and putting the American people first is the greatest offense you can commit.
America’s justice system is truly DEAD.
We are officially a Third World Country where the ruling class can criminalize dissent and imprison its opposition to prevent YOU from having a say in your own country.
_**But I’m not giving up on America. And I know you’re not either.**_
With the never-ending witch hunts on the rise, it has never been more important to peacefully DEFEND our movement.

But the Biden-appointed Special Counsel is instead reportedly mulling SEDITIOUS CONSPIRACY CHARGES against me despite being innocent ... In their eyes, shunning the special interests and putting the American people first is the greatest offense you can commit. America’s justice system is truly DEAD. We are officially a Third World Country where the ruling class can criminalize dissent and imprison its opposition to prevent YOU from having a say in your own country. But I’m not giving up on America. And I know you’re not either. With the never-ending witch hunts on the rise, it has never been more important to peacefully DEFEND our movement. | Thank you, | Donald J. body:
they knew before anyone else...

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbmkobisr7sggj796mhssrh3eobqe9l4gb1ufn70_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5j68o35chh2bs)

All the biggest conservative leaders know that my team at the 1776 Project PAC is moving mountains... But we need your help to take our mission to the next level. [_**Would you consider chipping in $17.76 or more today to help us take back our schools from the radical left?**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhipm9o57ck2nit0btemi90h0v3t73g04jpl2bi0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5j68o35chh2bs) Let me take a step back. **_What IS the 1776 Project PAC?_** Well, in May of 2021, I saw what was being done to our children in schools. Test scores were plummeting. Proficiency rates hit all time lows in the public education system within the last two years. All the while, tens of thousands of parents nationwide were reporting that radical left wing curriculum like Critical Race Theory was being forced on their children in schools. **_That 's why I founded the 1776 Project PAC all by myself in my apartment in New York. _** I designed the PAC from the ground up to help brave conservatives take back their local school boards, county by county, NATIONWIDE! And so far, we've had INCREDIBLE SUCCESS:
* **We 've SUPPORTED more than 160 brave conservative candidates**

* **Won 132 school board races**

* **And this year, we 're supporting 250 more conservative candidates across the country!**

**This year, we 're planning to support more conservative school board candidates than ever before. But we can't do that without YOUR SUPPORT.** [_**So, Friend, would you please consider chipping in $17.76 or more today to help us take back our schools, one school board at a time?**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0d6fmlf242vfdi3u99n4b3hjcqmavhurvvuuh00_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5j68o35chh2bs)

re: A GOP manufactured crisis

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63455489/406868101/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M3MWE0MC04MmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ftn7ncDvKwO4Bwq0KcFoJRwFz2MRrU60mN33YqkqN7c=&emci=da1a3408-f8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a3c71a40-82f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, We know full well that House Republicans are playing with a political hand grenade by holding the U.S. debt ceiling hostage. While we’re still in daily negotiations, so far the offers we’re seeing from the other side are a disaster. We’re talking about deep cuts to everything from education and affordable housing aid, to Customs & Border Protection, to customer service for Social Security and Medicare. And if those cuts weren’t bad enough, their plan would also **cut mental health funding by $606 million.** Anyone who spends five minutes watching the news right now can tell you these cuts would come at the worst possible time and would have a terrible impact on our country. Look, I’ve been in tough negotiations my whole career, from my career in business to my time in the U.S. Senate. The truth is, it’s rare that everyone walks away with everything they want, so we’re going to have to make a deal. But if we’re going to avoid a disastrous default on our debt and untenable cuts to important programs like mental health care, we need to stand strong as Democrats in the coming days. This GOP-manufactured crisis is a reminder of the consequences we face when Democrats come up short in elections. **_[Right now, I’m working to get us out of this crisis. But I need your help as we head into another important election to make sure we are able to elect Democratic majorities who won’t gamble with our economy or slash mental health funding when it's needed most. Can you chip in today to help us stay on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63455490/406868102/-1085567233?refcode=mw_em_230518_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M3MWE0MC04MmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ftn7ncDvKwO4Bwq0KcFoJRwFz2MRrU60mN33YqkqN7c=)_** Every single family I know – including my own – has been touched by some struggle with mental health. We’ve worked incredibly hard to get more funding for crisis hotlines, train doctors to treat folks with eating disorders, increase response times at crisis hotlines, and improve access to mental health care for all Virginians. But if the GOP’s plan passes, they’ll undercut all the work we’ve fought for. We can’t let this happen. **_[Contribute today to protect all the progress we’ve made to battle the mental health epidemic and tell the GOP we won’t stand idly by and let them play their dangerous political games.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63455491/406868103/-1085567233?refcode=mw_em_230518_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M3MWE0MC04MmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ftn7ncDvKwO4Bwq0KcFoJRwFz2MRrU60mN33YqkqN7c=)_** Thank you, Mark Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63455492/406868104/-1085567233?refcode=mw_em_230518_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M3MWE0MC04MmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ftn7ncDvKwO4Bwq0KcFoJRwFz2MRrU60mN33YqkqN7c=)****

Yes

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63455539/406868294/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjQzNmZiYS04MmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUJpSEPYrNVxth6yIPfUxE_uud-7ssJx3Zt2CKKY_H8=&emci=166d0a4f-d8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=12436fba-82f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

With her rampant MAGA extremism and horrific conspiracy theories, it might seem like Marjorie Taylor Greene can’t get any worse for America than she already is. You might be asking–can someone who spread COVID denialism, parroted antisemitic views, accused the Bidens of sex trafficking, and claimed that the 2020 election was rigged stoop any lower?

_**The answer is yes. Marjorie Taylor Greene can get even worse, a lot worse than she already is.**_

How can this happen? Well, MTG is**a potential VP pick for Donald Trump,** and if she gets inside the White House, _**there’s no telling what she’ll try to do with her new power!**_

We can’t let MTG have an even bigger platform for her dangerous ideas. So, here’s what we need to do: **out-organize the GOP and stop her!**

If we flip back the House and keep the White House, we can boot MTG off her committees and make sure she gets **nowhere near the presidency.** We can send a strong message that her MAGA extremism won’t be tolerated.

But the only way to do that is to get to work now and organize on the ground in Georgia–2024’s most critical swing state.

[**_So here’s the deal – we need your help to build up our organizing capacity to keep Georgia blue, flip back the House, and keep the White House in 2024. That’s the only way we can boot MTG from power. You can be a part of this critical effort by rushing a contribution right now. Can we count on you?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63455540/406868295/-1313339816?refcode=20230518.2_MTGA_5AK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjQzNmZiYS04MmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUJpSEPYrNVxth6yIPfUxE_uud-7ssJx3Zt2CKKY_H8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

But in 2024, We The People will once again take back the reins of our country and save our Republic before it’s lost for good. Thank you, | Donald J. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63476216/406932494/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAzMmViYi1hNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6f1cTRlD2a4xjxO3P2LNseZCm6DtymhatMm0en9nJI=)
Peter,

**I just announced my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District.**

I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Ken Calvert. But first, we set an ambitious goal of reaching 2,500 Founding Donors to start this campaign with strength.

[**Please chip in $3 before midnight to help us meet this mark.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63476218/406932496/1321783056?refcode=em-5.18.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAzMmViYi1hNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6f1cTRlD2a4xjxO3P2LNseZCm6DtymhatMm0en9nJI=)
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63476219/406932497/1321783056?refcode=em-5.18.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAzMmViYi1hNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6f1cTRlD2a4xjxO3P2LNseZCm6DtymhatMm0en9nJI=)
---

Here it goes:

I've seen firsthand how extremism and political corruption pose serious threats to our democracy. My opponent Ken Calvert doesn't just enable MAGA extremism; he has a long track record of abusing power for personal gain.

**I ran because our country deserves better, and I was proud to see that the people of CA-41 agreed.**

Despite the tough midterm environment, our campaign ended up being one of the top three “most overperforming” Democratic challenger campaigns in the country. I was the only challenger in California to win the Independent vote, and for the first time in his 30-year career, Ken Calvert's record was finally exposed in our community.

And things are much different (for the better) in 2024.

**Democrats now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district. Last month, National Democrats listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in our shared effort to retake the House.**

Running again was not a decision I made lightly. But the truth is the same threats we faced two years ago are still present -- even more so with Donald Trump back on the ballot and Republicans in control of Congress.

This campaign is our chance to reject extremists like Calvert, retake the House, and put this district -- and our country -- back on track.

[**Help us launch with overwhelming grassroots support by contributing to our campaign. Right now, any amount helps us hit our goal of 2,500 Founding Donors, but $3 from you would go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63476222/406932499/1321783056?refcode=em-5.18.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAzMmViYi1hNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6f1cTRlD2a4xjxO3P2LNseZCm6DtymhatMm0en9nJI=)

clean_body: I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Ken Calvert. | = Peter, I just announced my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District. I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Ken Calvert. But first, we set an ambitious goal of reaching 2,500 Founding Donors to start this campaign with strength. = | = Here it goes: I've seen firsthand how extremism and political corruption pose serious threats to our democracy. My opponent Ken Calvert doesn't just enable MAGA extremism; he has a long track record of abusing power for personal gain. I ran because our country deserves better, and I was proud to see that the people of CA-41 agreed. Despite the tough midterm environment, our campaign ended up being one of the top three “most overperforming” Democratic challenger campaigns in the country. I was the only challenger in California to win the Independent vote, and for the first time in his 30-year career, Ken Calvert's record was finally exposed in our community. And things are much different (for the better) in 2024. Democrats now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district. Last month, National Democrats listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in our shared effort to retake the House. Running again was not a decision I made lightly. But the truth is the same threats we faced two years ago are still present -- even more so with Donald Trump back on the ballot and Republicans in control of Congress. This campaign is our chance to reject extremists like Calvert, retake the House, and put this district -- and our country -- back on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Will | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress If you wish to donate by check, you can make it payable to Will Rollins for Congress and mail the check to: Will Rollins for Congress PO Box 6282 414 W Grand Blvd Corona, CA 92878 United States

---
Millions of Americans rely on Social Security. It is NOT an entitlement like Lindsey Graham seems to think!!

**Ultra-wealthy, out-of-touch Republicans like Senator Graham were never going to protect average Americans. They're even willing to default on our national debt to destroy it!**

_That’s why we have to step up to save Social Security today._

[**We can stop the GOP’s shameful scheme, but only with your help today – please, sign our urgent petition now demanding Congress protect Social Security! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-security/?source=VPP_20230518_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=7756%2E878179%2EPt32bb)

Thank you for stepping up,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7756%2E878179%2EPt32bb). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7756%2E878179%2EPt32bb).**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We don’t mean to scare you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
At the NRA convention last month, Donald Trump and other possible 2024 Republican presidential hopefuls made clear their alarming views about guns.
#

We don’t mean to scare you. But we need to be prepared now for what’s coming in 2024.
At the NRA convention last month, Donald Trump and other possible 2024 Republican presidential hopefuls such as Ron DeSantis and Nikki Haley, gave speeches making clear their alarming views about guns.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=1&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)
Trump proposed an incredibly dangerous idea he called "National Concealed Carry Reciprocity," which would allow visitors to carry guns into states with gun restrictions, so long as they have a permit to carry from another state. This would be a **disaster** for our public safety.
Governor Ron DeSantis bragged about signing permitless carry into law in the state of Florida—even though it is wildly unpopular legislation and sure to increase violence in the state.
And Nikki Haley told the crowd of NRA supporters, “You’ve got a friend in me.”
Extreme leaders like these will always stand with the NRA, instead of standing up for the safety of our nation. We can’t afford to elect a president next year who will tout the NRA’s “guns everywhere” agenda.
[**If you agree, will you contribute $5, $10, or anything you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC today? We need to start building our resources now to take on whoever the extreme Republican presidential nominee may be next year.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=2&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-may23.hLCBBa&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=21&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-may23.9ZfwpO&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=22&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-may23.VbphPI&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=23&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-may23.xompaR&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=24&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-may23.mzg3uU&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=25&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may23.NkeOir&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=26&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC)**
---
****
Thank you for standing with us.
\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=5641%2E3935704%2EbQXMoC) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Here’s How We Keep Our Elections Honest!
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Great news!**
Last week we settled our federal election integrity lawsuit against **Pennsylvania** , after the state admitted in court filings that it removed **178,258 ineligible****voter registrations**!
And our settlement commits Pennsylvania to extensive public reporting of statistics regarding their ongoing voter-roll clean-up efforts for the next five years.
_This is how Judicial Watch works to keep elections honest_ ...and it is also why [**I hope you will help us with a special contribution today.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Others _complain_ about voter fraud...but Judicial Watch _goes to court_ , and _delivers real results in fighting to keep our elections honest_.__

_Thanks to our members’ support_ , over the last two years our remarkable run of litigation successes in states across the country have resulted in well over 2 million ineligible registrations being removed from voter rolls.

**That means our lawsuits have eliminated _over 2 million_ opportunities for voter fraud!**

**Pennsylvania** now joins **Colorado** , **New York** and **North Carolina** in settling National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) lawsuits with Judicial Watch... _[and that is just this year](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

I am so grateful to you for your generous support of our work, including our full range of research, investigations and litigation on behalf of honest elections.

But the battle for honest elections is far from over**!**

All our election integrity work...our NVRA lawsuits, as well as legal actions like our successful challenge to the **Maryland** Democratic state legislature's "extreme" congressional gerrymander and our still-active lawsuit against **Illinois** to stop election officials there from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law ...require long-term research and investigations, as well as litigation.

And this work is _expensive_.

Today, our election integrity team continues to review state and federal data to determine if other states are failing to clean their voter roll as the NVRA requires...

...while we are also researching legal avenues to challenge the Left's full range of assaults on traditional ballot integrity safeguards.

[I know that if you will join us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580), we will continue to be the most effective and impactful group in the country fighting for the cause of honest elections...while we also challenge Biden administration corruption and secrecy!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

[I thank you in advance for your help today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580), and for joining the Judicial Watch team.

We will work hard every day to honor your trust in us!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63414&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

body:
| | |

**Peter, this is a _massive_ step in our fight to end the gun violence epidemic – but we need to know what supporters like you think of the president's plan.**
---
**Do you support expanded background checks on gun purchases?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63460828/406887554/-1304501741?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1068-su-nd&refcode=jtk1068-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc3YjNhNS03Y2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IqY4LLOrn_edya1y5rvdU5uKmv3V5haAKTpetWObnr0=&emci=265b5a9e-b8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f877b3a5-7cf5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

---
Peter, our nation has surpassed 220 mass shootings in just 137 days – **meaning that there have been more mass shootings than days in the year so far. **
But despite the constant stream of gun-related tragedies that have devastated our nation, we are _still_ waiting on major gun safety reform to come. And as long as assault weapons are on the streets, and guns can be purchased without background checks, we will continue to face these tragedies.
But Attorney General James _refuses_ to sit back and wait for the next tragedy to strike. That's why she's echoing President Biden's call to boost the number of background checks that are supposed to take place before a gun is purchased – and she's counting on you to join her.
Expanding background checks _will_ save lives – but getting this to pass through Republicans in Congress who are deep in the gun lobby's pocket is going to require all of us working together.
**We need to know how many supporters are standing with us in the fight to end the gun violence epidemic, but it looks like we're still missing _your_ response. This poll closes at midnight tonight, so please tell us ASAP:**
| | **Do you support expanded background checks on gun purchases?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63460830/406887556/-1304501741?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1068-su-nd&refcode=jtk1068-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODc3YjNhNS03Y2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IqY4LLOrn_edya1y5rvdU5uKmv3V5haAKTpetWObnr0=&emci=265b5a9e-b8f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f877b3a5-7cf5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kirk=20Penner?=
subject: Peter, they have always had my back; do you have theirs?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Kirk Penner's Call to Action | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/67d4c92785a2/n41kepo7ku-536846?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8a876ef61d&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| This is Kirk Penner, Vice Chair of the Nebraska State Board of Education representing the 5th District. As a proud Nebraskan and Republican, I've dedicated my efforts to fighting for our shared values and ensuring that our children have access to real education and not far-left woke indoctrination centers. [**Will you support that effort?**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d26bb25b6e&e=25844e23a8)

Recently, we stopped the Board from passing “Pleasure-Based” Sex Ed Standards that included references to gender ideology and abortion. This proposal was tabled, thanks to our collective efforts. **Make no mistake Peter, the radical left is trying to groom our kids.**

We couldn't have achieved this without [**the steadfast support of the Nebraska GOP**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=86349bba9e&e=25844e23a8), who has consistently supported me, and our other Republican Board members, in championing good legislation and defending our Conservative values.

Now, I'm asking you, Peter, to [**have the Party's back in return**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=39b99cad1f&e=25844e23a8). The Nebraska GOP needs your continued support to uphold the principles we all believe in and to fight for the future of our great state. By standing together, we can make a real difference in the lives of our children.

Please consider **[donating to the Nebraska Republican Party](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fa8ef73fa7&e=25844e23a8)**. Your contribution, no matter the size, will help us continue this vital work, ensuring that we protect and preserve our children and values for generations to come.
---
| In liberty,

**Kirk Penner**
Vice Chair, Nebraska State Board of Education, 5th District
Nebraska Republican Party Supporter
---
|
---
| P.S. Your generosity **[makes a significant impact](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f0cc6f4c34&e=25844e23a8)** on our fight for Conservative values. [**Every donation**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b8cd4d2b9c&e=25844e23a8) to the Nebraska Republican Party helps us in our mission to promote limited government and responsible use of taxpayer dollars. Thank you for your unwavering support.
---

name: Hung
subject: EXTENDED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
Hi Peter,
I just got amazing news from my team, and I wanted to share it with you: **our mid-month deadline has been EXTENDED for 48 hours!**

As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.

2\. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and _not_ for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first.

3\. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them. **If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking:[Will you please split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to raise $50,000 before midnight?
