name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: It's not just your Vote - It's your Voice
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| I know you’ve heard that your vote matters; and that’s not just hyperbole. There have been quite a few legislative races here in Mississippi that were decided by less than 10 votes. Showing up to the poll and casting your ballot on election day is important. And here in Mississippi, since it seems that everyone is a “Republican” (regardless of what policies they actually push), the primary election on **August 8th** is just as important, if not more important, than the general election in November.But using an acronym that a friend of mine taught me, TINVOWOOT (There Is No Voting Our Way Out Of This). There are other interpretations of what one may mean when using the acronym TINVOWOOT, but this is how I will explain it: your vote isn’t the only thing that matters. If your plan to turn our state and country around is only to show up to the poll on election day, I’m afraid to be the bearer of bad news, but little will change. It is your voice that matters as much as your vote.On the last day of the legislative session this year, we voted on the $700M pet projects bill. The bill only garnered a pithy two NO votes from Republicans, myself and my desk mate, Representative Joel Bomgar. One representative, who often brags about being one of the most conservative members of the MS House of Representatives voted YES for the bill, saying that the NO vote wasn’t worth “upsetting leadership.” He, of course, is running unopposed and knew that no one would question him over his hypocritical vote. Few constituents follow what goes on under the dome, even fewer are vocal about it.Famed Nobel Prize winning economist Milton Freidman once said “I do not believe that the solution to our problem is simply to elect the right people. The important thing is to establish a political climate of opinion which will make it politically profitable for the wrong people to do the right thing. Unless it is politically profitable for the wrong people to do the right thing, the right people will not do the right thing either, or if they try, they will shortly be out of office.” It’s not only your vote that matters, but it’s your voice that matters.Your voice matters before the votes are cast on election day by telling your friends and family who you are voting for, and why they should do the same. Look past the typical politician's rhetoric and find the candidate that actually believes in the Republican platform. Vote for the candidate that’s actually read the Republican platform. The MS Freedom Caucus will be releasing our list of endorsed candidates for legislative seats in the coming weeks, to help support those candidates. Use your voice to help campaign for those candidates. Make calls, knock on doors, tell your friends and family when breaking bread. Your voice matters.Once elections are over, hold your politicians accountable. Use your voice by questioning their votes, and don’t let them think that no one will know what they’re doing. Let them know that every vote will be reviewed and critiqued. Use your voice to make politicians know it is politically profitable for them to do the right thing, regardless of what leadership wants. Use your voice so that they fear you, their constituents, more than they fear leadership.The Good Lord gave you a voice and the Founders saw fit to protect your right to use it. Don’t let it go to waste. Your vote isn’t the only thing that matters.
---
|
---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus holds politicians accountable. We review bills and publish opinions that help you hold your representatives accountable. It cost the Freedom Caucus over $8,000/year to maintain this platform so you can have a voice.We need your help!Please donate today, so we can continue fighting for you.

Did you hear about this, team? **A panel of advisors for the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) voted to recommend offering birth control pills over the counter.** If passed, that means all of us will have access to contraceptive pills without the burden of going to the doctor's office. Given that more than 685,000 Pennsylvanians are uninsured, this could open the door for our most vulnerable communities to plan their futures on their own terms. With the increasing number of attacks on reproductive freedom, including from my anti-choice opponent GOP Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, we need to be removing barriers to birth control access and other forms of reproductive healthcare for people across the country. But Brian has voted time and time again to restrict access to reproductive care — making it clear he is willing to strip away our constitutional rights for cheap political points. [**I went to war to defend our freedom, and that includes our reproductive rights. I’ll never stop fighting for those freedoms and affordable healthcare. I hope you will chip in any amount to send me to Washington so I can keep up the fight in Congress. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63463231/406895709/-945033547?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230518contraception_a4pa1_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEyMWFiNy04ZGY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4GrroO8QkIeETv_faSAcm7fOsru7X5v8Ca1bCE1Dtc=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Did you hear about this, team? A panel of advisors for the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) voted to recommend offering birth control pills over the counter. If passed, that means all of us will have access to contraceptive pills without the burden of going to the doctor's office. Given that more than 685,000 Pennsylvanians are uninsured, this could open the door for our most vulnerable communities to plan their futures on their own terms. With the increasing number of attacks on reproductive freedom, including from my anti-choice opponent GOP Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, we need to be removing barriers to birth control access and other forms of reproductive healthcare for people across the country. But Brian has voted time and time again to restrict access to reproductive care — making it clear he is willing to strip away our constitutional rights for cheap political points. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your ongoing support. body:

| | | | | | |
---
|
Peter- Yesterday, Dan Crenshaw called out Biden and AOC for spinning some of the Democrats' most bizarre lies in recent memory.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TRN1T4ndH0kaB3PdI3BoGxgcVWbkYwhlau2YtTwezzYsC55GKo7v2AFI3bPyZ7XWdPdkL1U13rPpyX1Au_A-JFnk5PaRuNGFFNDw8Fqh6Z0iNX9vhE1NabGQv0JUq60FsL8uXPLJLSNImr3_JmYbS2VRvAb5FXftgbv4YgbHlW88fN2q8P7Lnjo2z3I9TzhtbeGmbgM8tMU=&c=dFA2iW30uYKK7JLmbmkMwlawqAC8WqPGeGrwFXmOU7NM9AxUhJW59g==&ch=Be9vwQaz5A2BZJlDuZX-BVCjIkaZ9mWdC1y7sOx769ik2KKdM4zdfg==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TRN1T4ndH0kaB3PdI3BoGxgcVWbkYwhlau2YtTwezzYsC55GKo7v2AFI3bPyZ7XWMy1glu5cVetrBkzJ8nx-9vYdbBphI-TAYNeEJz3WQ3Gx18pRAGGU5PbkVcSsCA0FU6vLrElumEFwjgZxcyVWcb4vuFF9wKCxW9Nr8MI4bsh7kOz-AJZpj2r1-a8Znr95XjLr1tX-jAQ=&c=dFA2iW30uYKK7JLmbmkMwlawqAC8WqPGeGrwFXmOU7NM9AxUhJW59g==&ch=Be9vwQaz5A2BZJlDuZX-BVCjIkaZ9mWdC1y7sOx769ik2KKdM4zdfg==)
---
| Democrat leaders claim that House Republicans can't pass a debt ceiling increase. But House Republicans did pass an increase. In fact, House Republicans are the only ones in Washington who have taken any action on the debt ceiling. Chuck Schumer and the Democrat Senate have failed to act and so has the White House.
The House Republican bill is called the Limit, Save, Grow Act. This bill ensures the Treasury doesn't default on its obligations to vital programs like Social Security, while also making modest reforms to the work requirements for food stamps and Medicaid. WSJ has a[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TRN1T4ndH0kaB3PdI3BoGxgcVWbkYwhlau2YtTwezzYsC55GKo7v2AFI3bPyZ7XWgvjmqNjZdfXZljEky_-tUMQ-9i-YUu-39bFFczwg1uhOyBPQgWjqPlo7a4vpF5RLcjUSaaX6j-F6nXWVJiXneW2TWvrhKKI1K7GXp8MHctvPpXxKCNUIaJCLEto4gbogAaUpD4coZKACXXhNFL8aMdw5YsRmyfQySQnmvuKhKzKURAeiPAqkLjaBrINm-iLk8HwLhUH5RcBcCcck5e5-o8ESj93CsoPOaGZZ3NPUROXKYn8hsDE51vsTSaPTs93x&c=dFA2iW30uYKK7JLmbmkMwlawqAC8WqPGeGrwFXmOU7NM9AxUhJW59g==&ch=Be9vwQaz5A2BZJlDuZX-BVCjIkaZ9mWdC1y7sOx769ik2KKdM4zdfg==)[good analysis](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TRN1T4ndH0kaB3PdI3BoGxgcVWbkYwhlau2YtTwezzYsC55GKo7v2AFI3bPyZ7XWgvjmqNjZdfXZljEky_-tUMQ-9i-YUu-39bFFczwg1uhOyBPQgWjqPlo7a4vpF5RLcjUSaaX6j-F6nXWVJiXneW2TWvrhKKI1K7GXp8MHctvPpXxKCNUIaJCLEto4gbogAaUpD4coZKACXXhNFL8aMdw5YsRmyfQySQnmvuKhKzKURAeiPAqkLjaBrINm-iLk8HwLhUH5RcBcCcck5e5-o8ESj93CsoPOaGZZ3NPUROXKYn8hsDE51vsTSaPTs93x&c=dFA2iW30uYKK7JLmbmkMwlawqAC8WqPGeGrwFXmOU7NM9AxUhJW59g==&ch=Be9vwQaz5A2BZJlDuZX-BVCjIkaZ9mWdC1y7sOx769ik2KKdM4zdfg==) of what the Republican plan accomplishes. In a nutshell, it ensures that able-bodied adults without children are not taking advantage of welfare programs when they could be working. Democrats could stop the petty drama and negotiate with Republicans in good faith. But instead, they're pushing this political showmanship along with outright lies to the American public. We are running out of time. Dan Crenshaw needs your help to increase the pressure on Democrats to start taking the debt ceiling negotiations seriously. Please share this with your friends and neighbors. And if your congressman is a Democrat, slam their phone lines with demands that they stop holding the country hostage and support the Limit, Save, Grow Act.
---
| Thank you for reading and sharing our message,
Team Crenshaw

clean_body: It’s been exactly 1 WEEK. | | | Friend, It’s been one week since Crooked Joe REVOKED my landmark immigration policy known as Title 42 that kept our borders SECURE. God only knows the REAL NUMBER of illegal aliens who’ve charged right past our wide open border since Biden opened the floodgates last Thursday... Despite public outcry from voters all across the nation, Crooked Joe dutifully obeyed the orders given to him by his open-borders puppet masters, who had been calling for an end to Title 42 for years: “Soros-Funded Group Praises Biden Plan to Open Border: ‘Step in Right Direction’” [SOURCE: Breitbart] When I first became the Republican presidential nominee in 2016, George Soros pledged to fight back against our America First movement by spending HALF A BILLION DOLLARS to open up America’s borders to the entire world... ...But we STOPPED Soros’ plan dead in its tracks when I was your President. And when we win back the White House in 2024, we will once again SECURE our border and stop the Open Borders Lobby from completely DESTROYING our country. Thank you, | Donald J. name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, USA, Ret.
subject: Good for China.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Bad for the Troops.
#
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=1&akid=8950%2E3013755%2EIxbO_t)
Derek -
Republicans are driving us to the brink of default unless they get to slash benefits for the American people — including what could be a $30 billion cut to Veterans benefits.
It’s no exaggeration to say that these cuts would hurt millions.
And a default? It cedes ground to China on the world stage. It weakens our credibility with our allies, and leaves us vulnerable to our adversaries. It even risks our ability to pay our Troops.
The worst part is, they’re doing it because they think it will hurt President Biden and help get Trump back in the White House.
That’s the GOP in 2023: Good for China, bad for the Troops.
But here’s how we fix it: We elect better, rational representatives in Congress. We need Veterans who took an oath to defend our Constitution, who understand the sacrifices that generation after generation have made for this country.
**That’s our mission.**
**[Now, we would like you to consider making a $3 donation before midnight tonight to support that work. Will you help us accomplish our mission Derek?](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=2&akid=8950%2E3013755%2EIxbO_t)**
| [SUPPORT THE MISSION](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230518-1-15&t=3&akid=8950%2E3013755%2EIxbO_t)
---
I really hope I can count on you.
Major General (Ret.) Paul Eaton

| | Hi Friend, I'm Nathan Cunneen, a communications strategist here at the American Federation for Children. Before this, I was a school choice beneficiary in Florida, spending eleven years as a recipient of the Florida Tax Credit Scholarship program. Access to a quality education changed my life, allowing me to be the first person in my family to graduate from college. That's why I'm so excited to see Governor DeSantis expand school choice to every family in Florida so they can receive the life-changing education I did. **This victory is monumental and should be recognized as such.** Our team has put together this **[_thank you card_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff757f0a25774f55a1b4352f5e4115c4&_e=Lb4a1OtPXuznth_KiPNiioVcNnrUDZUR3l-yj6IpoYQMEF0jjMkrfAPa62EBDcKpelraB7qyf-TuPTRVaY60qb5T5T315PLixxKR_uu8y6TkZQjaZ1WuqVGgMYmlEdQWi5gVL5XIzyEkOr7sw4ntw4RR3qUeWpEGCpzsBU5-Mx5Tel-OoeggWhFFZSPzzQfp9ZvRdVQOk7hRSax7v4wMpmM9HmKlNEdw8QanxnQIk8pRNmViITYEj5OKB8rcDzZkHF3WDF5X5JF-Md-7BggfdQr6wVInyMLDqhZmTp5lzHG2LGeU4YhNPFOLJT8glaBhZO6lbBFnNxW6EIUB-R_x_a4kmrIvvKqffzSEL9f7dwErIc_SxmiL-AkDFj16gbkDgtAMRMtP0B779RVgByhUJw%3D%3D)** to Governor DeSantis and the Florida Legislature for a job well done. **[_Friend, will you sign our card and thank them for their hard work?_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff757f0a25774f55a1b4352f5e4115c4&_e=Lb4a1OtPXuznth_KiPNiioVcNnrUDZUR3l-yj6IpoYQMEF0jjMkrfAPa62EBDcKpelraB7qyf-TuPTRVaY60qb5T5T315PLixxKR_uu8y6TkZQjaZ1WuqVGgMYmlEdQWi5gVL5XIzyEkOr7sw4ntw4RR3qUeWpEGCpzsBU5-Mx5Tel-OoeggWhFFZSPzzQfp9ZvRdVQOk7hRSax7v4wMpmM9HmKlNEdw8QanxnQIk8pRNmViITYEj5OKB8rcDzZkLx0xk8WVF_mrad6lSx9Jn1dBksME4PLniU8EufrUVHNUcho45oR6WfXc_C86Z8M7MfsQbH8YlNo64FkQ36iEu1xqE-JKq9cDf7yhFXolJCRWuxO9-b55CqkqLez5F_yoKWBVtBEmn_92aZLTTyVvnA%3D%3D)**

name: Medhini Kumar, Evergreen Action
subject: 🎥 WATCH NOW: Evergreen explains EPA’s clean car rules
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
There’s something different about them
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4570?t=2&akid=13323%2E53494%2EncZfDD)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4570?t=3&akid=13323%2E53494%2EncZfDD)
Friend,
In the past 20 years, **fossil fuel-powered cars have become ubiquitous.** And with their rapid rise—largely fueled by car manufacturers and oil company lobbyists—has come increased climate pollution and a slew of health problems.
Fortunately, since 1975, EPA has successfully cut pollution from the biggest offenders in the transportation sector—cars, SUVs, and small trucks—through what's known as light-duty vehicle standards.
**Last month, EPA released its newest standards... but there's something a little different about them.**
I'm Medhini Kumar, writer and editor at Evergreen, and ** _[in our latest video, my colleague Rachel and I break down what these rules mean for climate and public health.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4570?t=4&akid=13323%2E53494%2EncZfDD)_**
[WATCH NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4570?t=5&akid=13323%2E53494%2EncZfDD)
---
Regulating the pollution from light-duty vehicles is a big deal. Communities that were historically torn apart by highways and polluted by car traffic are some of the most vulnerable to the effects of climate change. **But with these standards, we can begin to turn things around.**
[SEE HOW IN OUR LATEST EXPLAINER VIDEO](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4570?t=6&akid=13323%2E53494%2EncZfDD)
---
Onward,
Medhini Kumar
Writer/Editor
Evergreen Action

clean_body: There’s something different about them | | Friend, In the past 20 years, fossil fuel-powered cars have become ubiquitous. And with their rapid rise—largely fueled by car manufacturers and oil company lobbyists—has come increased climate pollution and a slew of health problems. Fortunately, since 1975, EPA has successfully cut pollution from the biggest offenders in the transportation sector—cars, SUVs, and small trucks—through what's known as light-duty vehicle standards. Last month, EPA released its newest standards... but there's something a little different about them. I'm Medhini Kumar, writer and editor at Evergreen, and Regulating the pollution from light-duty vehicles is a big deal. Communities that were historically torn apart by highways and polluted by car traffic are some of the most vulnerable to the effects of climate change. But with these standards, we can begin to turn things around. Onward, Medhini Kumar Writer/Editor Evergreen Action

name: Ted Cruz
subject: URGENT: Here is the situation we’re facing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff...

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2be3b3bda40a490b80063c6ecc249761&_e=y2RrPLIrUfDiCWeGx4GA5gLFlvVAHGEsbf9YgaGO7g0ccE1FWXEyepU7PtoUuBOcCG2E10crzJMzmuGo2ELY2n2Yw9KS_T30twnxW4gPgLNAGaiWTVjZ_mkvd7aT_aTr6FDXSfk20g8lSNbTMtSQKPlytGjb024ca_XDXB9tvfq03KrZAWvTXGIucWsmbtnM29Wl9KYmgKAk98cfta42A2HY7yqqqS5mzsfZn8meCFDdkS9J0rqaTL11IDKeW8huN1Cwy2du-UMBbIcFEVQZJgQ7O8kap1tyyh0B8Yeb2DLeZ7SjGPWUOPzr3d4M9aN0iM06CurfxKulai178RodWc_7Y50ogyyS-FxPLZ3A9UZ4l07InuQrpex8lPBq_PS-1yVig7KID1hn5JSMOmPx0S1Mdef5AELAIPXJIoRw9qlqFkX--Wbi1KN7phFBVBpkZ5Sq2jWn6ObbViR3nmJqIRUc2scGzZcquf_HxoKrKv30O1kBl2jnfYbJtg_1HaVKUX4MPx83KEVVEp7t42yo1W928fEYgBg7hJ6cbASo2Bs%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. **But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >>**
---
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION TO TED CRUZ >>**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2be3b3bda40a490b80063c6ecc249761&_e=y2RrPLIrUfDiCWeGx4GA5gLFlvVAHGEsbf9YgaGO7g0ccE1FWXEyepU7PtoUuBOcCG2E10crzJMzmuGo2ELY2n2Yw9KS_T30twnxW4gPgLNAGaiWTVjZ_mkvd7aT_aTr6FDXSfk20g8lSNbTMtSQKPlytGjb024ca_XDXB9tvfq03KrZAWvTXGIucWsmbtnM29Wl9KYmgKAk98cfta42A2HY7yqqqS5mzsfZn8meCFDdkS9J0rqaTL11IDKeW8huN1Cwy2du-UMBbIcFEVQZJgQ7O8kap1tyyh0B8Yeb2DLeZ7SjGPWUOPzr3d4M9aN0iM06CurfxKulai178RodWc_7Y50ogyyS-FxPLZ3A9UZ4l07InuQrpex8lPBq_PS-1yVig7KID1hn5JSMOmPx0aqwgnfM8Ge2b5sb4AXtR71l8dNP1J3EF8muBpDgXh4_OrrDU2nu1VhicynVzFOStkejgQBb9JdglHw28aT-_Mw2nhX6pzTKxXnLnq_LKUWQFOjLiSmsR_QFKYMtcfdBflEA5x7f5fNz-VmQMkyolVg%3D)

clean_body: Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff... | | | Fellow Conservative, Here is the situation: As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, he's voted wrong. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. This race is going to be one hell of a fight... My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018-- They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. They're going to flood the state with cash trying to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record. Democrats are all in. I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >> Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | id:2023-05-08-11:23:00:568t | Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

What IS the 1776 Project PAC?

Well, in May of 2021, I saw what was being done to our children in schools.

Test scores were plummeting.

body:
Now is our chance to FIRE Baldwin once and for all.
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=ed33dc0288f4401596ac5d48b32dc367&_e=UALKZXS72V1v8HBdnx3uHuEqpLs6DP5TqZdeka7cruXrNUk4f8X_QJcxnIdQgxpLnLo9ksaAQ-gvw-pFTde14K_M_k0VIDnOYJr1yW3uSldklddPaKBCV9GFwevNegdfvkJvrobB1RDqhYo_ts67r14iCowmAiNocFC4pk0SsQGdQbjqEv3PJ8SZKyDLW6O4DkfeBsAhjn6TYAYhXHqCRQBWtkMwmFe3fUFFYUz028b3_J15QBxCeNYOSMRK-4EwjVDBncBG2jx_g1H5K77ieEfs2x30U4R37MxGWBJLRjwUd9T0m0R3HzUHqaLX2uhBGJsQaZcnGwX81Aqm1SA413zXUsX-Pms5r374UHcA4as%3D)
---
Friend,
---
CNN released a list of 10 Senate seats most likely to **FLIP** in 2024 and Tammy Baldwin’s seat here in Wisconsin made the list.
---
**As much as Democrats will try to convince you otherwise, Baldwin is NOT safe in this race.**
---
Wisconsin remains a crucial battleground state and as Baldwin fails Wisconsinites, we have the perfect opportunity to band together and FIRE Biden’s puppet.
---
_This is our chance to elect a strong Republican that will END the Biden-Baldwin agenda and truly represent the people of Wisconsin._
---

body:
The Ohio GOP’s hypocrisy is stunning
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63469003/406906624/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230518OHAbortion_Abortion_Team_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&refcode2=6243f129-93f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjQzZjEyOS05M2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbA55mX8nqaFtvUGvpBtsXlPtzjJMOMeSA5kJSw5tLA=) There’s been another anti-democratic attack on abortion rights in Ohio, Peter.

After pro-choice activists started working to put a constitutional amendment guaranteeing reproductive rights on the November ballot, the GOP is pushing to reinstate an August special election to raise the threshold for constitutional amendments.

Governor DeWine and the GOP removed special elections for wasting resources, but **_knowing abortion rights will win a majority at the ballot box, they’ve decided to change the rules._** This is a brazen violation of democratic principles, Peter.

A bipartisan group of former Ohio governors, including John Kasich, Bob Taft, Dick Celeste, Ted Strickland, and more, have come out against this opportunistic move of raising the constitutional threshold.

Despite this bipartisan backlash, Republicans are moving forward with their plan. This only further proves that Congress needs to federally protect abortion rights with the Women’s Health Protection Act.

[**_Will you sign our petition demanding Congress pass the Women’s Health Protection Act? By protecting reproductive rights at the federal level, we can beat the Ohio GOP’s underhanded tactics aimed at suppressing our rights._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63469005/406906625/593891301?refcode=EM_FR_230518OHAbortion_Abortion_Team_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_l1&refcode2=6243f129-93f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjQzZjEyOS05M2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbA55mX8nqaFtvUGvpBtsXlPtzjJMOMeSA5kJSw5tLA=&emci=9774ef23-93f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6243f129-93f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63469006/406906626/593891301?refcode=EM_FR_230518OHAbortion_Abortion_Team_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_b1&refcode2=6243f129-93f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjQzZjEyOS05M2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbA55mX8nqaFtvUGvpBtsXlPtzjJMOMeSA5kJSw5tLA=&emci=9774ef23-93f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6243f129-93f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Make your voice heard,

Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

body:
Peter, let me explain: [**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63470146/406910369/-1810142053?refcode=20230518_em_fr_b1_nraja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzhkMjkxZC05NWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZ5264eNsQwKwn5zGb6FODf3HlmsZc4XY5wDGb0RSaQ=) House Republicans passed a bill to make massive cuts to Social Security, veterans’ benefits, education, and more. [**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63470147/406910370/-1810142053?refcode=20230518_em_fr_b1_nraja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzhkMjkxZC05NWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZ5264eNsQwKwn5zGb6FODf3HlmsZc4XY5wDGb0RSaQ=) Kevin McCarthy raised $38 million in just three months to lock us out of power and push their far-right agenda for another two years. [**_NOW: I won’t lie to you: This is the kind of money that could buy McCarthy another two years in power. But hear me loud and clear: We’ve come too far and shattered too many expectations to let MAGA Republicans take a sledgehammer to all our progress now. We CANNOT allow them to outraise us, destroy our chance to reclaim the House, and continue our historic progress for American families. If you can help me reach 1,044 gifts before midnight to counter this haul, Democrats will hand McCarthy and his MAGA allies a crushing defeat in 2023. # _EPISODE 4: Lobo Legend Ray Birmingham Joins the Podcast_
|
---
The latest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast is up!
Our guest is legendary Lobo baseball coach Ray Birmingham. Birmingham is one of the most accomplished coaches in Lobo history.
Coach Birmingham's story begins as a JV baseball coach at Mayfield High School and expands to coaching various sports, including varsity football and baseball. His coaching prowess even led him to coach Avery Johnson, a legendary player for the San Antonio Spurs.
During the podcast episode, we explore Coach Birmingham's coaching philosophy, which focuses not only on baseball but also on imparting invaluable life lessons.
He shares his insights on what it takes to build successful athletic programs. He also talked about the challenges he faced while transforming New Mexico Junior College's baseball program into a powerhouse.

Watch the podcast on YouTube to see exclusive footage by clicking the image below ⬇️

Derek

The 2023 National Convention of the Young Democrats of America will occur from June 18th through June 21st in Las Vegas, Nevada, at the MGM Grand Hotel. The Convention Management Committee, the Programming Collective, and the Nevada Host Committee have been hard at work putting together what we hope will be an exciting, educational, and impactful Convention.

Below is key information if you want to attend the 2023 YDA Convention:

**CONVENTION INFORMATION, INCLUDING REGISTRATION AND HOTEL BOOKING
**
The convention website is [www.yda.vegas](www.yda.vegas?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-ydavegas-48-hours-left-for-early-bird-rate-hotel-block&email_referrer=email_1921973&email_subject=ydavegas-36-hours-left-for-early-bird-rate-hotel-block). Attendees can register and book hotel rooms on the official YDA Convention website. This site will continue to be updated with other relevant convention information, including information from the convention standing committees on the platform, rules, and credentials. So, be sure to check back occasionally.

**HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS**
Lodging for the Young Democrats of America National Convention is available at the MGM Grand Hotel until **May 19th** at an average nightly rate of **$109** before taxes and fees. After May 19th, _we can't guarantee room rates will not be over $100 a night more than what they are right now with our room block_ — **_[book your room today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWr1jYF6kdEXBYBNqgnPeCI6aJnYj-D222IGSe74ZZIW3ihpjoHqvOjqc1qrjxjMsZGxMnacGmMCj1WF9UvlJ8iOZJca8pR8zupwh7yeEI6j0_ADQSIJlroG4bQVesoI-t6j3kbLCmhqwk8nm6ioxI2YSErQfaUSgqb46tzGpTz506Lhl75YmdRQOUJKLiXZNr8aMuPwzykbuXcBjYgXaWv_d4dDdP6R3r8KBEhtOvSlwUm0uPA87ky0qEeiBlBm9R4qgILdUIaten279KWKZEyjHNBt97dVsac2pqJgULVaTCUu4WWJUm3CQtaHdoBYqfBJ0OSHiM-7o9auGiT6vVhunDUTOBEBJCLocTgpmEP5VUZoTRTHzxbgFxLtVlO0GtLmYEMtlIjKsj_IAlzIk35DU85v0FxEL3owESbvXvDTuAJ8AshQkBNOAZ35pyHZV9Q/3wa/cyopFXi6SG2hR_6LD6mWKQ/h1/__GsT8UAd6ql5wpIru1r4LKBupgJVBS9m4Dje_bdIaI)_**.

**REGISTRATION AND RATES**
The early bird registration rate for the convention is just **$50**. This discounted rate will end at **11:59****PM EST on May****17th**. The rate will then increase to **$60** on **May 19th**. ** _[Register today so you do not miss out on our Early Bird Rate.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKwk8_6SuZZQmYLPHuT1187xfOAmTDl254R0Aegs_gsaNgqoFoAU5khYeTeqvV2wACGEKB3T0zS0KlNVUx6CVcuEbA7lMfdStb-8oJzaPlmR2aGBpQXHpuvURXakAHLbjT2xdp9VNcthHFcbDQrwUmf5m2xufyGlp66WQXSmg23Kw2tMKXVr76ngvJWjF7HihddoL4XWpTehi2WtLoEo1ulX6cWwKbZyMZjl8ipV5bsguUhml9NhUQ7bP2-cngEYkvllC_CDlus9kerIfVqVzgRamGNVYwqTYCIeDc84pmDEOgEY5Di7lMfbJizTaoVTehwm13zz4JxntJ25FwjcE9k/3wa/cyopFXi6SG2hR_6LD6mWKQ/h2/d1yDmwLUZo0UrjO8Q53YHNhs3yMdWTlcNZXMPT4aFc4)_**

**PAYING FOR AN ENTIRE DELEGATION**
The ActBlue payment page should allow your chartered unit to pay for the registrations of all of your delegates (if that’s something you choose to do). Your delegates will still need to complete the registration form on their own. If you have questions about bulk registration, please let email qocama@yda.org.

**RULES SUBMISSIONS**
If you have a proposed amendment to YDA's Charter, Standing Rules, or Call to Convention to be considered at the 2023 YDA National Convention in Las Vegas, **_[please complete this form](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUxlzMVI81DNLdtbxgLvQPXjgU3vW1k3VWMAtTs-ZelJBwQhAJWBS3qG1qBQv7RdQahubPPr5H0CmFcqI46qfJQvsP7TXYiGv6QcOWGVWheauAkhfdp6RbTJrbOBQQo2OWNPQsIxBR_3MeoHfrLDUyohB5SgGbQorOJ4gxRQrt3pOw0gg8Yx40M5p4MjVghcJw90GbGmXfqgeTe_hGdEVy3uGnMjjgUZI-Kc9d2v30yxCSa2YcLBwfDlxQcvCLLgNje4Wtg5KHKQK0RT1Og43cnjfqD7EseZE6U1Mt7OOtq9U3tqhC5bYgY180o1Rm_3-sBMyDVyNHfa9MbLzbVk9P4OIgTxqyTuiaQYhViPVHH2qRED6S1niWcEkskNMsnAOS8zNVnU-VJEZRJ0krxy9PZT/3wa/cyopFXi6SG2hR_6LD6mWKQ/h3/ZtTakVXOzDd5B2L4hmisFbjeUcsAQhbAsbaVyPH6zrI)_**. All proposed amendments are due by **May****19, 2023,** at **11:59 PM Hawaii Standard Time**.

**PLATFORM AND RESOLUTIONS SUBMISSIONS**
If you have a plank you want to see included in our platform or a resolution to be considered at the 2023 YDA National Convention in Las Vegas **_[please fill out this form](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUxlzMVI81DNLdtbxgLvQPXjQbvhS47d7TymSkznmod-txjkOPsiVdnv-bNEXHuoREN4KI91SAHxllzwR21eJCp6zcdUfLPrHTB4PlxjzHqXZZleZYAwsErYD_ntJRqPiRC3Kn2oEEl8lpgzlw8VCv7wgxLk7Q35JSfeR0MM2wvhGlpYPtr82nr6Hk22cjQsQGQUqiQVAW47qJbqnmiDGn-qeCwTO-cg_ajdbdSJR7j8sC829aaVlZ_pVbJ68oAE1QL3FfjfKKBJ5EKuIsKNWabDWtldBEaubQyWKENs_Ez_FdTSD0AjZTyYamqtQqjZgtQy1a5XivDdPcsDwuwwbm6J3CC9mP12ycB1WpNZch_77W4gvuRORh6Ka9ufGUNiZugpjSmrWi6ZLQi7kYmXa5d9/3wa/cyopFXi6SG2hR_6LD6mWKQ/h4/arCz4oWita64N8tcN7AIGYSON-Xe7azyG4xvjoEmvVo)_**. All submissions are due by **June****4, 2023,** at **11:59 PM Hawaii Standard Time**.

**HONORARY MEMBER NOMINATIONS**
If you have a former Young Democrat that has aged out, **_[please use this form to nominate them for Honorary Young Democrat (AKA Young Democrat for Life) status](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUzE9q7gozLwKI89Q5BuaZXsnndupQ6fqAm2EVcYGYuPsAsrV-bRV65NH0GYCnyk7Kml7Y2j59w4vsW00iI0JcWQW8M93EoxweVArALpAUWEdDzW-EVA7kMUw1sHtCvLxybh_7jyMGwbJFcJ9ZKxMxL3FKj8rIBHm77ygcQFMR5ckda-yQRi2pjA-3GG8HzzT64Tun17lQpddRJPz685KfyR4Mc_rUdFEvnYOF_SsXP_OhXfdkXCCWP3tEUUHpWRkE7fCd8Aaq7c9_XveGh_NEpep4WAX34pUwjGH0BrKWx2hbjVYnh4f8jBjRRrzBLRWtkuASJOhUEAQqDsm5uhtvPVzhHFfkoEXt-rA3seJSuxec5bvr4Boj1XbNHF9KrgelA/3wa/cyopFXi6SG2hR_6LD6mWKQ/h5/gPbmHqLMeB0RxQEym8gOEVe2oqGT2aEY6fW1U3Y0cME)_**. All nominations will be considered at the 2023 YDA National Convention in Las Vegas. All nominations are due by **J****une 12, 2023,** at **11:59 PM Hawaii Standard Time**.**Please note that this form must be filled out by a member of the National Committee per the YDA Charter**.

Please feel free to reach out to info@yda.org if you have any questions.

We’re excited to see you all in Las Vegas!

Young Democrats of America
| **_**The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. Attendees can register and book hotel rooms on the official YDA Convention website. This site will continue to be updated with other relevant convention information, including information from the convention standing committees on the platform, rules, and credentials. So, be sure to check back occasionally. HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS Lodging for the Young Democrats of America National Convention is available at the MGM Grand Hotel until May 19th at an average nightly rate of $109 before taxes and fees. After May 19th, we can't guarantee room rates will not be over $100 a night more than what they are right now with our room block — . REGISTRATION AND RATES The early bird registration rate for the convention is just $50. This discounted rate will end at 11:59PM EST on May17th. The rate will then increase to $60 on May 19th. PAYING FOR AN ENTIRE DELEGATION The ActBlue payment page should allow your chartered unit to pay for the registrations of all of your delegates (if that’s something you choose to do). Your delegates will still need to complete the registration form on their own. If you have questions about bulk registration, please let email qocama@yda.org. RULES SUBMISSIONS If you have a proposed amendment to YDA's Charter, Standing Rules, or Call to Convention to be considered at the 2023 YDA National Convention in Las Vegas, . All proposed amendments are due by May19, 2023, at 11:59 PM Hawaii Standard Time. PLATFORM AND RESOLUTIONS SUBMISSIONS If you have a plank you want to see included in our platform or a resolution to be considered at the 2023 YDA National Convention in Las Vegas . All submissions are due by June4, 2023, at 11:59 PM Hawaii Standard Time. HONORARY MEMBER NOMINATIONS If you have a former Young Democrat that has aged out, . All nominations will be considered at the 2023 YDA National Convention in Las Vegas. All nominations are due by June 12, 2023, at 11:59 PM Hawaii Standard Time.Please note that this form must be filled out by a member of the National Committee per the YDA Charter. Please feel free to reach out to info@yda.org if you have any questions. We’re excited to see you all in Las Vegas! Young Democrats of America | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Young Democrats of America, please .

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [LIVE TODAY] Parents stepping up
body:
Peter, The challenges and decisions that come with the responsibility of parenthood are among the most important that we enco
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/3f86bccd780e55712fcddd8cac1860bf/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVTk2JvEiKieYg6h7lDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jDUAoc0kxBwZ3eriuBxZoLIQSKGlbS8qL19f1V47nWFAKeYt03Spgw9fwDExnZ-muLaBeoUEO-2CbxFl0SuMsMaTKten4y7Px_FkT7oI4hXH86cVKUNgZdQOMdIvTIC7MKDrq0vBXItUw2y7qqqrlxXRIvijK9myXokMjyJVCyT_jE-zfmvEJyX5irg==)
---
| Peter, The challenges and decisions that come with the responsibility of parenthood are among the most important that we encounter in our lives. The rights of parents to guide their children's upbringing, education, healthcare, and mental wellbeing are fundamental. These rights need to be upheld and continually fortified. There are voices advocating for the government to play a more significant role in critical decisions affecting our children's lives. It is crucial to oppose such overreaching suggestions and maintain the central role that parents hold. **It's also important to acknowledge and celebrate the countless parents who are stepping up in various ways, making a difference every day.**
Join us **LIVE TODAY (Thursday) at 4:30PM Eastern Time** for an inspiring livestream of the Common Ground Podcast. This episode will feature parents, each with their own unique journey, who are stepping forward to make sure our voices are heard. Don't miss this opportunity to hear compelling stories of determination and courage.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO ACCESS THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (WE'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EDT)](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/d0879353fbc09285f806934662f2063c/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVTE2pvEiKieYg6h7lDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jDUAoc0kxBwZ3eriuBxZoLIQSKGlbS8qL19f1V47nWFAKeYt03Spgw9fwDExnZ-luLKBeoUEO-2CbxFl0SuMsMaTKten4y7P2_FkT7oI4hXH86cVKUNgZdQOMdIvTIC7MKDrq0vBXItUw2y7qqqrlxXRIvijK9myXokMjyJVCyT_jE-zfmvEJyxJisA==)
---
|
---
| Today's special guests are excited to join me to talk about why the fundamental rights of parents need to respected and preserved at all costs. We will be joined by Kimberly Fletcher, Denise Gonzalez, and Tom Hudanish. Kimberly Fletcher is the the wife of a retired Air Force officer and mother of eight children who is also an author, columnist, activist and radio host. She also holds the position of president and founder of both Moms for America and Moms for America Action. With over 20 years of experience in grassroots activism, Kimberly has successfully transformed Moms for America into a national movement. This initiative is dedicated to mothers who are reclaiming our culture in the name of truth, family, freedom, and the Constitution. Denise Gonzalez is an LD4 Assembly Candidate that has always been a take charge kind of leader. She has served her country in the Marine Corps, serving as logistics specialist in the 10th Marine Regiment 2nd Marine Division out of Camp Lejeune. Denise is running for State Assembly to improve access to education, give law enforcement the tools they need to keep us safe, and to make New Jersey more affordable. The backroom party elite are actively trying their hardest to stop Denise and her running mates, but with your help we are going to do everything we can to get them across the finish line.
Tom Hudanish, a former Perth Amboy Police Officer, is the Founder of the Nicholas Hudanish Foundation. He lost his son Nicholas to addiction and for the past several years he's been running this Foundation in his son's honor. Tom has stepped up in a big way to help those battling addiction by getting involved before there's a problem. The goal is to educate and empower kids to prevent addiction in the first place. The Nicholas Hudanish Foundation works directly with schools to provide resources to keep kids out of trouble and educate and inform young people about preventing addiction.
---
|
---
|
---
Today's stream will feature my colleague, Elizabeth Nader, as host. As I continue to travel to further develop our rapidly growing organization, Elizabeth will showcase her expertise as an author, speaker, entrepreneur, mindset maven, and patriot while she dives deep into the topic of how we can overcome the adversity that we will all inevitably face at some point in our lives.
---

clean_body: Peter, The challenges and decisions that come with the responsibility of parenthood are among the most important that we enco | == | Peter, The challenges and decisions that come with the responsibility of parenthood are among the most important that we encounter in our lives. The rights of parents to guide their children's upbringing, education, healthcare, and mental wellbeing are fundamental. These rights need to be upheld and continually fortified. There are voices advocating for the government to play a more significant role in critical decisions affecting our children's lives. It is crucial to oppose such overreaching suggestions and maintain the central role that parents hold. It's also important to acknowledge and celebrate the countless parents who are stepping up in various ways, making a difference every day. Join us LIVE TODAY (Thursday) at 4:30PM Eastern Time for an inspiring livestream of the Common Ground Podcast. This episode will feature parents, each with their own unique journey, who are stepping forward to make sure our voices are heard. Don't miss this opportunity to hear compelling stories of determination and courage. | | == | | Today's special guests are excited to join me to talk about why the fundamental rights of parents need to respected and preserved at all costs. We will be joined by Kimberly Fletcher, Denise Gonzalez, and Tom Hudanish. Kimberly Fletcher is the the wife of a retired Air Force officer and mother of eight children who is also an author, columnist, activist and radio host. She also holds the position of president and founder of both Moms for America and Moms for America Action. With over 20 years of experience in grassroots activism, Kimberly has successfully transformed Moms for America into a national movement. This initiative is dedicated to mothers who are reclaiming our culture in the name of truth, family, freedom, and the Constitution. Denise Gonzalez is an LD4 Assembly Candidate that has always been a take charge kind of leader. She has served her country in the Marine Corps, serving as logistics specialist in the 10th Marine Regiment 2nd Marine Division out of Camp Lejeune. Denise is running for State Assembly to improve access to education, give law enforcement the tools they need to keep us safe, and to make New Jersey more affordable. The backroom party elite are actively trying their hardest to stop Denise and her running mates, but with your help we are going to do everything we can to get them across the finish line. Tom Hudanish, a former Perth Amboy Police Officer, is the Founder of the Nicholas Hudanish Foundation. He lost his son Nicholas to addiction and for the past several years he's been running this Foundation in his son's honor. Tom has stepped up in a big way to help those battling addiction by getting involved before there's a problem. The goal is to educate and empower kids to prevent addiction in the first place. The Nicholas Hudanish Foundation works directly with schools to provide resources to keep kids out of trouble and educate and inform young people about preventing addiction. | | Today's stream will feature my colleague, Elizabeth Nader, as host. As I continue to travel to further develop our rapidly growing organization, Elizabeth will showcase her expertise as an author, speaker, entrepreneur, mindset maven, and patriot while she dives deep into the topic of how we can overcome the adversity that we will all inevitably face at some point in our lives. | | | Looking forward to seeing you this afternoon, Bill PS: If important issues, like coming together as parents to fight for our rights and the rights of our children, resonate with you...then you may be the perfect candidate for our Common Sense Club. = | | Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee7e9f5f5884732945ae7cd2228c564&_e=FLDOLtmJshYu51Hu3lowTyg5Ezuk0bUqpEVXS7pT7HOvcqELOtvJlQjv5EWPZcGtJh5mATbQPEHIOlBOeMvutMQ0-VyLkQ2nTw5-tSOLO9080dGFeCKXdIOFqsjV6Zla1LvH0nRtsqA85ebcryrPsmJpjZoD_jmp8CvQRvVeXuZhv56BIYzlPp9us6xvrkELhkCYYkDvnqFAPGIyxFOPvyNxZ_tPC9g0TZcUigloSbg15pOKH4Kt1H3PKYySaDsXPJmJiVMBXk0cGk7qzaR3-rSAyTQUpUXDaia76RDv5_56WJEJSvPemJ8VLaHJV6Yal9H9cz559Gyn8OPAi3LD1Mv_i4sgLYf7hmBQl4n_gNCglEoPR2zZF2ItcH_zqudiftGlcr5p81GT89ZiGqMapbELyYTt3wPWLP6Q9huRxVtEVMDuFTTWjotxau1co-R8)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee7e9f5f5884732945ae7cd2228c564&_e=FLDOLtmJshYu51Hu3lowTyg5Ezuk0bUqpEVXS7pT7HOvcqELOtvJlQjv5EWPZcGtJh5mATbQPEHIOlBOeMvutMQ0-VyLkQ2nTw5-tSOLO9080dGFeCKXdIOFqsjV6Zla1LvH0nRtsqA85ebcryrPsmJpjZoD_jmp8CvQRvVeXuZhv56BIYzlPp9us6xvrkELhkCYYkDvnqFAPGIyxFOPvyNxZ_tPC9g0TZcUigloSbg15pOKH4Kt1H3PKYySaDsXPJmJiVMBXk0cGk7qzaR3-iAlyjYFHhvofXbPeQuRvH_I2qp0NMuxeHVELtPRYUrCqA_qbRANET9XJeKOJrnEsAKgVHZe7Ff_1oJ6BiN-VuM9PJRXRxQaY-_V0pvD6WdkpAVYbnRW1BYZqEorpCFVmCWPTITqjmYx2h6qhQDAUTVrDj0umvUv5-7yFEBgU59z)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee7e9f5f5884732945ae7cd2228c564&_e=FLDOLtmJshYu51Hu3lowTyg5Ezuk0bUqpEVXS7pT7HOvcqELOtvJlQjv5EWPZcGtJh5mATbQPEHIOlBOeMvutMQ0-VyLkQ2nTw5-tSOLO9080dGFeCKXdIOFqsjV6Zla1LvH0nRtsqA85ebcryrPsmJpjZoD_jmp8CvQRvVeXuZhv56BIYzlPp9us6xvrkELhkCYYkDvnqFAPGIyxFOPvyNxZ_tPC9g0TZcUigloSbg15pOKH4Kt1H3PKYySaDsXPJmJiVMBXk0cGk7qzaR3-unXT8bnmquQmxRqowvVli2MXV6TGk8Tfvr5721YkFFs47zv9tD9ZF2xIhs7FRfq4t1n3ymwWfSsgoxhu5eqT-OmQc0o6tDjY_7Blonz6m_-Apcr3JM-L9WLzY6MFlW2w8wPKZbJ2zUZ9gw9SlDAdLo4fpEFwiGdUNcK-vsCq1WR)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Rick Scott
subject: A two-tiered justice system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
Right now in America, we have a two-tiered justice system.

While the IRS is spending millions of dollars targeting middle-class families and small businesses, a whistleblower sounded the alarm that they’re letting Hunter Biden get away with serious financial crimes.
_And that’s not even touching on his shady business dealings with America’s enemies like Communist China._
While our justice system is asleep at the wheel when it comes to Hunter Biden, they’re using their resources to target conservatives.

From labeling concerned parents as domestic terrorism threats to spying on churches, they’re more concerned about conservatives speaking their minds than corruption at the highest level of government.

Fellow conservative, it’s time for a justice system that is fair across the board and holds even the BIDEN family accountable.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsGVnp3DNr

I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of
their heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm
thrilled to share ....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osGVnp3DNr

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63485046/406963444/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY1MWFkNC1iYmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmZ9OsVFqfhgPdQ-_2RdlK6t4gB7ZDtYOX8CX5CRLvc=)
Peter,

**I just announced my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District.**

I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Ken Calvert. But first, we set an ambitious goal of reaching 2,500 Founding Donors to start this campaign with strength.

[**Please chip in $3 before midnight to help us meet this mark.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63485047/406963445/1321783056?refcode=em-5.18.23-seg3-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY1MWFkNC1iYmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmZ9OsVFqfhgPdQ-_2RdlK6t4gB7ZDtYOX8CX5CRLvc=)
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63485048/406963446/1321783056?refcode=em-5.18.23-seg3-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY1MWFkNC1iYmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmZ9OsVFqfhgPdQ-_2RdlK6t4gB7ZDtYOX8CX5CRLvc=)
---

Here it goes:

I've seen firsthand how extremism and political corruption pose serious threats to our democracy. My opponent Ken Calvert doesn't just enable MAGA extremism; he has a long track record of abusing power for personal gain.

**I ran because our country deserves better, and I was proud to see that the people of CA-41 agreed.**

Despite the tough midterm environment, our campaign ended up being one of the top three “most overperforming” Democratic challenger campaigns in the country. I was the only challenger in California to win the Independent vote, and for the first time in his 30-year career, Ken Calvert's record was finally exposed in our community.

And things are much different (for the better) in 2024.

**Democrats now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district. Last month, National Democrats listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in our shared effort to retake the House.**

Running again was not a decision I made lightly. But the truth is the same threats we faced two years ago are still present -- even more so with Donald Trump back on the ballot and Republicans in control of Congress.

This campaign is our chance to reject extremists like Calvert, retake the House, and put this district -- and our country -- back on track.

[**Help us launch with overwhelming grassroots support by contributing to our campaign. Right now, any amount helps us hit our goal of 2,500 Founding Donors, but $3 from you would go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63485049/406963447/1321783056?refcode=em-5.18.23-seg3-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY1MWFkNC1iYmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmZ9OsVFqfhgPdQ-_2RdlK6t4gB7ZDtYOX8CX5CRLvc=)

clean_body: I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Ken Calvert. | = Peter, I just announced my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District. I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Ken Calvert. But first, we set an ambitious goal of reaching 2,500 Founding Donors to start this campaign with strength. = | = Here it goes: I've seen firsthand how extremism and political corruption pose serious threats to our democracy. My opponent Ken Calvert doesn't just enable MAGA extremism; he has a long track record of abusing power for personal gain. I ran because our country deserves better, and I was proud to see that the people of CA-41 agreed. Despite the tough midterm environment, our campaign ended up being one of the top three “most overperforming” Democratic challenger campaigns in the country. I was the only challenger in California to win the Independent vote, and for the first time in his 30-year career, Ken Calvert's record was finally exposed in our community. And things are much different (for the better) in 2024. Democrats now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district. Last month, National Democrats listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in our shared effort to retake the House. Running again was not a decision I made lightly. But the truth is the same threats we faced two years ago are still present -- even more so with Donald Trump back on the ballot and Republicans in control of Congress. This campaign is our chance to reject extremists like Calvert, retake the House, and put this district -- and our country -- back on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Will | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. body:
Wisconsinites are ready for this fight – are you?

| |
---
Hi Peter, Senator Tammy Baldwin is running for reelection to represent Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate. Her first election to the U.S. Senate more than a decade ago made history. She was Wisconsin's first woman senator and our country's first openly gay senator. **[Split a contribution now between URD and Wisconsin Senator Tammy Baldwin — the Senate majority is on the line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63472875/406920479/-733050151?refcode=230518_urd_Baldwinsplit_hdr&ms=230518_urd_Baldwinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUwYTgyMzktOWNmNS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c3dKZpbVYsV3kF2QNdPku_ekLk3MfhaJmebBhHNqqbM=)** **Today, Republicans continue to attack the rights of women and LGBTQ+ individuals in states like Wisconsin and across the country.** Democrats have continuously shown that we're ready to make history again and again. Sen. Baldwin has worked on bipartisan legislation to promote Made in America manufacturing, lower the price of essential prescription drugs, and expand health care for veterans. **Her goals have always remained the same: making sure that working people have a fighter on their side.** In Wisconsin, voters are ready for that fight. They elected a liberal justice to the state Supreme Court, flipping control from a conservative to a liberal majority as the court prepares to rule on an abortion ban. Sen. Baldwin has fought with them, serving as the lead sponsor of the Women's Health Protection Act – a bill that would guarantee equal access to abortion everywhere in the United States. Republicans are gearing up for a fight of their own, and this Wisconsin Senate seat sits squarely on the battlefield. **The Democratic Senate majority could come down to this race,** and Republicans will spend millions to try and defeat Tammy. Abortion rights, affordable health care, and the protection of working Americans are on the line. [**_Sen. Baldwin is ready to keep making history and fighting for the American people, but she needs your support. Peter, will you split a contribution of $10 or more between Sen. Baldwin’s reelection campaign and United Rural Democrats – an organization dedicated to help elect Democrats like Sen. Baldwin who represent rural communities?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63472876/406920480/-733050151?refcode=230518_urd_Baldwinsplit_l1&ms=230518_urd_Baldwinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUwYTgyMzktOWNmNS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c3dKZpbVYsV3kF2QNdPku_ekLk3MfhaJmebBhHNqqbM=) **[SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63472877/406920481/-733050151?refcode=230518_urd_Baldwinsplit_b1&ms=230518_urd_Baldwinsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUwYTgyMzktOWNmNS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c3dKZpbVYsV3kF2QNdPku_ekLk3MfhaJmebBhHNqqbM=)** Thank you for your support, and let's keep up the fight. – URD HQ

Friend,
Our Founding Fathers warned that America would be _“A Republic,**IF** you can keep it...”_
236 years after that warning was given, shadowy agents within our federal government are now plotting ways to SUBVERT the will of the American people by persecuting the ruling class’s opponents, framing them, spying on them, and even arresting them.
_**The 2024 election will determine whether we can keep our Republic or whether America has succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kVGrm0AQhX_N-qbo7LqaBx9y7xJKA4WWQi99CevsGCe4q-hab_59MST39TuH4XyM9dPA3b0R1ZsA6NktAkDIowA4q7ePH_r852zSn-fbMTW6VNuewrsAiPeJvqrPKxl5y8NOK5O4BrAGxISaQtdKwUHWddI3BUno2vLQtVQits45qQup0JYF6o5swg3kIPOyqIsqB6kyImqLWrUlqVJhrYTKNw6ZG4Md3C3Oq58yHH0yNH2M0_KYdBJwWgjXmbKNw0xub-zM_qPUepoZbXobOcS0W4ObLS8crimO3nOMRAJOAYdcF23tiqqq0GqlKyFPa_QXT45XL6R5-uodLuM6IwlpkC_2ydD6yfI1CGleTq9kDJFCFNIccl0K0JcwsBPS3P9-e__4_OyP_QM-PiIN5ZP7vdlf35O5cdPGw8CLroTKr_uC3e1_AAAA__-DbY6t)
---
Biden and the radical Democrats know that it’s going to take an entire movement to stop the Deep State from turning America into a tyrannical Marxist nation.

name: Colin Allred
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Will you support my campaign for Senate?
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45565?t=6&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo) Friend, I'm writing to ask you to chip in $10 to help me defeat Ted Cruz and expand our Democratic Senate majority, but first, I want to explain why this is so important.

I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because, as a fourth-generation Texan, I know our state deserves better. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. And only with you on my team will we have a real chance to win this thing.

But here's the problem: Ted Cruz's mega-donor allies are set to funnel millions into his campaign to keep Texas red – and he's already launching attacks against me.

**It might not seem like much, but your $10 will make a huge difference in our ability to fight back and win. I don't take a cent from corporate PACs – because I believe elected officials should serve their voters, not special-interest lobbyists – so I'm truly relying on your grassroots support.**

Just in the short time since I launched my campaign, experts at Cook Political report _increased_ our chances of flipping this seat – and we've got to take advantage of this momentum. **That's why I'm personally asking, friend:**

[Please, can I count on you to chip in $10 to split between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project? Let's take down Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Senate majority – together.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45565?t=7&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45566?t=8&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45567?t=9&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45568?t=10&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45569?t=11&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45565?t=12&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo)
This is what a grassroots movement is all about: thousands of people just like you feeling inspired to join this fight and giving whatever you can, whenever you can. I'm humbled to have your support.

– Colin
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7813%2E878179%2EUFTRqo)

name: Team Nehls
subject: ⚠️ Govt-Funded Online Censorship ⚠️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Help Troy uncover the truth >>>
| | | Breitbart//Disclosures brought about by Missouri and Louisiana’s tech First Amendment lawsuit against the federal government reveal that the U.S. State Department actively marketed government-funded online censorship tools to Big Tech companies.
---
|
---
Friend, What we’ve known all along has been undeniably proven – the federal government has been colluding with Big Tech to silence and censor our free speech online. **This is tyranny, and Troy is taking the fight to this assault on Americans! Help fund his ability to uncover the truth, and nothing but the truth:**
---
[**DONATE TODAY**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/d74aff667dd69108/6e4f087ef798199bc3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
The State Department marketed censorship technology (Disinfo Cloud) through its _Global Engagement Center (GEC)_. In addition to funding the Disinfo Cloud, the GEC also helped fund the _Global Disinformation Index (GDI)_ , an organization that sought to blacklist conservative media as ‘spreaders of misinformation’. [This is appalling. This is un-American. Help Troy combat this cabal of Big Tech-Big Government collusion!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/d74aff667dd69108/6042997117bafff6c3d6b838967d376c/35193) – Team Nehls
---
Our tax dollars not only funded the development of tools to silence speech that dissented from the regime’s narrative, they also paid for government employees to act as sales reps pitching the censorship products to Big Tech. [Please step up today to fuel Troy’s fight with a $5, $10, $25, $50 or more donation today. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/d74aff667dd69108/5911f3e8571e6a8cc3d6b838967d376c/35193)

| | We’re not just seeing a border out of control \- we’re seeing an influx of drugs, criminals, and weapons. _But when we try to stand up for our citizens’ safety, the left calls us racist and xenophobic._ As a proud Latina woman, I can tell you: there is **nothing** racist about wanting to secure our country and keep out criminals. Families of all colors and backgrounds just want safe streets, and until we secure our border, we can’t guarantee that. name: Josh Hawley
subject: DOJ Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, it's Senator Hawley.

I am incredibly concerned about what I've seen from Biden's Justice Department. It has never been more clear that there are two tiers of justice in America—one for conservatives and one for liberals.

Protest at an abortion clinic and Merrick Garland will send an FBI swat team. But Firebomb a federal courthouse or vandalize innocent people's businesses? You may not even get arrested— and if you do, you're likely to get a slap on the wrist.

**[If you can, take a moment of your time to submit your thoughts on Biden’s DOJ by taking this short survey:](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=31d89dacae0e4e36984c613450b52d17&_e=lJCIZCQZMkl-wO4_kBE2hokcdzYLHDgikZlcstKgeK9pF26apC71l359uJJbfiEZjZBHelmZGuIvI57--pO4EqInSN3gUYgqOr131s8fXKNoq-UvMFFqd9LnKGksjNQxYyr5A7urVSi1LjMlr-v2cZQiKJaAOZONqDN0SXwQeKPRg_v1Y2TE1yEgFdwOUC4jD-lUg9wWfCxI3DTIjFhby-ZOfL_uoEf9gzb5LaRQCz84_UL-uw_8J8_JkrgHP-GYpJuG57zIeCRyfs-BOmPUGamvKem-sx53ioPJL-giATnI5irNuPaUOI3ZJUvHbZGSHCnFWmJQ9Yjr9Uho2E8T--f7146h7DdFzWWa_zQyMCEtqqNH_KtbNCmuJMRdWTjEUXMGdTxUUgRZ9sb8h3gEcw%3D%3D)**

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Statement from Dr. Nina Ahmad on her historic nomination for Philadelphia City Council at Large
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
**First, I want to thank all my supporters** , Team Nina for Philly and especially my daughters Priya and Joya and my husband, Ahsan. They have kept me going and had my back every day on this campaign. I could not have earned this Democratic nomination without them. I am so proud of the broad coalition we built across the city. This has been a long journey for a young woman from Bangladesh who came to find an opportunity for a better life. Now, to have the chance to represent the city that has been so good to me, it is the epitome of a dream come true. It is also a lesson for anyone who may look a little different or sound a little different: Always know that your voice matters, your voice should be heard. I will continue to listen to the people of Philadelphia and fight for them every day to build a healthier, stronger city.

Thank you so much for your support!
\- Nina for Philly

name: =?utf-8?Q?JR=20Majewski?=
subject: Stand Together to Protect Seniors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio
body:
Did you know that the Social Security Trust Fund's reserves are projected to be depleted by 2033? | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8125829?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=f387477ee3&e=0426928d91)
Peter,

Our seniors have dedicated their lives to building our communities, raising families, and contributing to the prosperity of our nation.

**It is our duty to ensure that they have access to the benefits they deserve and that their retirement years are secure and dignified.**
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=2b32964f75&e=0426928d91)
| [JOIN TEAM MAJEWSKI TODAY BY CHIPPING IN $20.24 OR MORE >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=f1e79f3b33&e=0426928d91)
---
**Did you know that the Social Security Trust Fund's reserves are projected to be depleted by 2033?** This is not mere speculation; it's a fact according to the fund's board of trustees. If we continue on the current path, it would lead to a staggering _**23% cut in benefits for hardworking Americans**_ like you and me.

Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and other health insurance programs account for a significant 46% of the federal budget in Fiscal Year 2022. With Social Security and healthcare spending projected to double in 10 years, we will see an 81% increase in federal spending.

Unfortunately, when the corrupt political establishment claims that their plan will protect seniors and insists on leaving these programs untouched, **they are not being entirely honest**. The current trajectory is unsustainable and would necessitate a substantial benefit cut in just a decade, which is not what Americans have been promised.
**We need leaders in Congress who will be honest with the people they represent and take action to protect those who depend on Social Security and healthcare programs.

**[**Donate $20.24 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $6,600 (MAX AMOUNT) >>>
Donate ANY amount to SAVE AMERICA >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=8935167ba7&e=0426928d91)
**We need innovative solutions and real leadership in Washington.**

Together, we can make a difference, protect our seniors, and forge a brighter future for all.

[**Can I count on your support?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=0db5ea5f9f&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=1a61699ac8&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski
Candidate for Congress
Ohio CD-09
| [PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=ad35d44fd3&e=0426928d91)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: we’re running out of time to find a solution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | As we get closer and closer to June 1st and the fiscal cliff, the possibility that we could default on our loans gets more and more likely.

For the good of our country, economy, and families, I strongly urge all parties to continue to sit down and talk every single day until the debt ceiling crisis is resolved. **We must work together to address the debt ceiling.**

We cannot risk going into default and **_no one_** should be playing games with the full faith and credit of the United States.

[Compromise is the only way we can achieve substantial progress, that’s what I’m spending every day in Washington working towards. Will you support me in the fight for bipartisan progress by chipping in $10 or any amount today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63475518/406930218/-1095503587?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230518_FR_debtc_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_debtc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjk3N2RhZS1hMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AHrN4MugBsO2LAC_1KRbv64Zl0lJ_wlgYusL5-2CEvE=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

body:
Andy's ready to go, are you? Did you see Andy's message, Peter? **The primary results are in, and Daniel Cameron will officially be running against Andy in the general election.**

As a refresher: Daniel Cameron is Trump's endorsed candidate and Mitch McConnell's protégé. Daniel's vision for Kentucky would take us backward and undo the historic progress Andy has made for the Commonwealth. _**We can't let that happen.**_

We have an expensive race ahead of us, and this will be the most competitive election in the nation this year. [**Please, read Andy's message and chip in any amount, and help us kickstart the general election to ensure we can reelect Andy this November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63475669/406930417/-1941741592?refcode=em23_230518_pmryfw_fndd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230518_pmryfw_fndd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=82977dae-a1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjk3N2RhZS1hMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z6goWQewrdqXfnK8yUml7KqtrOSMfmNYr4fINxlW2yk=)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Andy Beshear <info@andybeshear.com>
Date: Tue, May 16, 2023
Subject: The primary results are in Team,

First, I want to take a moment to express my gratitude to this team and everybody who voted in today's primary election. We are building a campaign by and for the people of Kentucky, and I know that we are headed for a bright future together.

**Now that the primary results are in, I will officially face Daniel Cameron in the November election.**

Listen, election experts are calling this one of the most important elections in the country this year. And now that we know I'll be up against Mitch McConnell’s protégé, we can be certain that all eyes will be on Kentucky.

We have a tough fight ahead of us which is why I need your help to kickstart our general election campaign tonight. **If you can, chip in a few bucks to help us prepare for what's ahead. Here's a link to donate:**

>> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-may-23?refcode2=personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63475670/406930418/-1941741592?refcode=em23_230518_pmryfw_fndd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230518_pmryfw_fndd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=82977dae-a1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjk3N2RhZS1hMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z6goWQewrdqXfnK8yUml7KqtrOSMfmNYr4fINxlW2yk=)**

Thank you for supporting this campaign and believing in a better future for Kentucky.

Onward,

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

Louisville, KY 40204
