name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m personally asking you to join my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Can I explain something, folks?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer .
Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.
That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $15 between Seth Moulton and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course).
— Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63475925/406931398/1921099384?refcode=em_eng_2023.05.18_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY1MTQ1YS1hM2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ul_uOrSfqG_Pl3a2phpacEk-aenSqVvNEP-_109i7IU=)

Team – I’ve been reflecting a lot on my Jewish faith recently.

Earlier this month, I had the honor of joining a bipartisan delegation to travel to Israel for their 75th anniversary – _and as a Jewish-American, the experience was profound and truly remarkable._

So as we honor the 75th anniversary of the state of Israel, I wanted to take a moment to share a little bit about my Jewish faith and how it has shaped my life.

**My Jewish faith was one of my motivating reasons to enter politics.** Judaism is a religion grounded in the belief of fighting for those who have been left behind – those who are not truly free. The story of Passover, specifically, embedded in me the importance of fighting for justice, fairness, and freedom from a young age. In fact, we named our son Elijah (a central figure in Judaism and the Passover Seder).

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63475927/406931401/1921099384?refcode=em_eng_2023.05.18_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY1MTQ1YS1hM2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ul_uOrSfqG_Pl3a2phpacEk-aenSqVvNEP-_109i7IU=)
That's why I entered a career in public service. To answer the call to create a more free, just, and fair nation. To join the fight to deliver for the children and families across our district who have long been left out and left behind. And to work to bend the arc of the moral universe in the direction of justice.

My Judaism has left an indelible mark on my life, and for that, I am eternally grateful.

Thanks for reading. It’s the honor of my life to fight for a more just nation and world in Congress.

Appreciate you,

Greg

_P.S. To keep fighting for freedom, equity, and fairness in Congress, I’m going to need the support of this grassroots team.[**If you are able, will you make a donation to our people-powered campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63475929/406931403/1921099384?refcode=em_eng_2023.05.18_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY1MTQ1YS1hM2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ul_uOrSfqG_Pl3a2phpacEk-aenSqVvNEP-_109i7IU=)_

clean_body: Team – I’ve been reflecting a lot on my Jewish faith recently. Earlier this month, I had the honor of joining a bipartisan delegation to travel to Israel for their 75th anniversary – and as a Jewish-American, the experience was profound and truly remarkable. | = Team – I’ve been reflecting a lot on my Jewish faith recently. Earlier this month, I had the honor of joining a bipartisan delegation to travel to Israel for their 75th anniversary – and as a Jewish-American, the experience was profound and truly remarkable. So as we honor the 75th anniversary of the state of Israel, I wanted to take a moment to share a little bit about my Jewish faith and how it has shaped my life. My Jewish faith was one of my motivating reasons to enter politics. Judaism is a religion grounded in the belief of fighting for those who have been left behind – those who are not truly free. The story of Passover, specifically, embedded in me the importance of fighting for justice, fairness, and freedom from a young age. In fact, we named our son Elijah (a central figure in Judaism and the Passover Seder). = That's why I entered a career in public service. To answer the call to create a more free, just, and fair nation. To join the fight to deliver for the children and families across our district who have long been left out and left behind. And to work to bend the arc of the moral universe in the direction of justice. My Judaism has left an indelible mark on my life, and for that, I am eternally grateful. Thanks for reading. It’s the honor of my life to fight for a more just nation and world in Congress. Appreciate you, Greg P.S. To keep fighting for freedom, equity, and fairness in Congress, I’m going to need the support of this grassroots team.= | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 68033, Cincinnati, OH 45206 www.landsmanforcongress.com = to receive fewer emails. = to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: keeping woke OUT of our military!
body:
| | | Peter, When I trained as a U.S. Green Beret, we had only one goal: take out the enemy to defend the United States of America.

Politics, race, and religion didn’t matter; all that mattered was our readiness on the battlefield.

[**The United States has the strongest military on Earth, but under the Biden Administration, it’s now taking a dangerous turn for the woke.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=8b668f8a7d5f4a4cacb79165c967f5b2&_e=EhPWQDnKNZxsrPWjhJGAnEEjBmiG2QatOVG42akTxUhKWulwjikWFZQxSBbqNQ06pWcUgtJm6lRu8N6Q4MxmOFG6sUD2dSlBLU_HFe1R5pJd2QVVpZ7wkZ5dzST_ZUeabxWgkgHrgQ9xz2pbxV66MVigq_vT2qTzvT0abztf5Ku_h26eKbU7UL6ZsnkzADjzYSfVmma8DxVIYd5t6Rg7zJNcVgN3CU1-ttoWdVfZtPcluSgvaZoP54Ga98QIPJspBjLGk-0weiBPsLCPGz4wi9ACFKAFgJo7_q0aIK6-f-BGDMBfmWDoL93rf3dkNT0w7lSLbdOdFJRMqiqrm9QCQSEyFCb-774nZWhkPpw9V5Y%3D)

---
[**KEEP WOKE OUT OF OUR MILITARY**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=8b668f8a7d5f4a4cacb79165c967f5b2&_e=EhPWQDnKNZxsrPWjhJGAnEEjBmiG2QatOVG42akTxUhKWulwjikWFZQxSBbqNQ06pWcUgtJm6lRu8N6Q4MxmOFG6sUD2dSlBLU_HFe1R5pJd2QVVpZ7wkZ5dzST_ZUeabxWgkgHrgQ9xz2pbxV66MVigq_vT2qTzvT0abztf5Ku_h26eKbU7UL6ZsnkzADjzYSfVmma8DxVIYd5t6Rg7zK08M7XVlgqg3QsgpHo9G7k1bSQIyHVBm57GlGbddM5wMUpdqzeDm-hdGIEiZZzOk4FodKmRiy_Txd4hnpiOkKsyEA6gN0UUJyhAF99No8iPMe_rjuvm-Zn3qZ5AOObOacTR2yZRow4kh6IlTr1jw_U%3D)
---
Between critical race theory and transgender theory, our troops are being pumped with the far-Left agenda instead of being trained to trust each other regardless of what they look like or where they came from.

Let me be clear: our warfighters should be focused more on putting bombs on enemy foreheads and less on woke politics. **That’s why now, I’m taking action.**

**I wrote a plan to keep woke politics OUT of our military, and I need your help to get it off the ground.**

[**Join me today to purge woke politics from our military and refocus their training on taking out the enemy.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=8b668f8a7d5f4a4cacb79165c967f5b2&_e=EhPWQDnKNZxsrPWjhJGAnEEjBmiG2QatOVG42akTxUhKWulwjikWFZQxSBbqNQ06pWcUgtJm6lRu8N6Q4MxmOFG6sUD2dSlBLU_HFe1R5pJd2QVVpZ7wkZ5dzST_ZUeabxWgkgHrgQ9xz2pbxV66MVigq_vT2qTzvT0abztf5Ku_h26eKbU7UL6ZsnkzADjzYSfVmma8DxVIYd5t6Rg7zJufOKjW4gg8zhTNq2GaXcsKjQFAdvtKF7a6D4wGLGxxjoOwFqy-23_r1ldjWNIcd5qq926VQSdNkq7sTqdLsONFsxPLxsd1B8gMob88tK_j6EK0ND8bmegQu264KXmRT6XK3PXDw7jHjVpi8dxVC8A%3D)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Wisconsin’s Senate race in 2024 could give us another treasonous, bag-of-bricks-for-a-brain Senator like Ron Johnson—who took a pilgrimage to Putin on July 4th, 2018, a rabid anti-vaxxer, anti-choicer and AR-15 promoter who recently spoke in a hearing about how climate change would be good for the U.S—or we can help reelect progressive powerhouse, Senator Tammy Baldwin.
body:
We can’t afford another Ron Johnson
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T129ceb52-771e-41fd-8dd5-ad9d5e8c5517/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[We can't afford another Ron Johnson (R-WI) in the Senate. We absolutely must re-elect Senator Tammy Baldwin, the great progressive from Wisconsin.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00ec7e0c-38ab-4ba7-b2f6-e4b6f37ae023/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** _Let me remind you about treasonous, bag-of-bricks-for-a-brain Senator Johnson, who took a pilgrimage to Putin on July 4th, 2018, returning repeating Russian talking points like a parrot. A rabid anti-vaxxer, anti-choicer and AR-15 promoter who recently spoke in a hearing about how climate change would be good for the U.S:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdec9c414-9e22-47f7-91a9-255825ab95d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_An all-around disaster, and worst of all we lost to him by a measly 1% in 2022(!), leaving us stuck with this human waste of space for six more years. 1%!!_** _His polar opposite Tammy Baldwin's up for reelection. Baldwin, the first open Senate lesbian, is a stalwart abortion rights supporter, democracy-defender & gun safety proponent good on every issue from climate change to higher wages._**_ Like Sherrod Brown & Raphael Warnock--a Senator from a purple-to-red state as progressive as blue-state colleagues. We need her courage in the Senate._** **_Republicans are recruiting someone as corrupt, stupid & treasonous as Johnson to take on Baldwin, like former Koch-Bros-owned-Gov. Scott Walker, or GOP governor candidate in 2022, Tim Michels. He said if he were elected governor, Republicans "will never lose another election." There's a word for that. It isn't democracy._** _We can't lose Baldwin's passion, smarts and perspective in the Senate, and can't allow an authoritarian clod to win, or we'll have another Johson in the Senate, doing Putin's bidding while claiming vaccines are deadly and climate change is great._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in giving super-Sen. Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep the progressive purple state Senator in DC fighting for us?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta56f858b-a426-4ddf-82a4-31af5c020b5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for rejecting Ron-Johnson-type Senators, and fighting to keep their opposites, superb Senators like Tammy Baldwin._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3be2da37-2bc4-482e-92ec-a50bff26b42c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Harassing my staff

body:
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel is harassing, threatening...

Friend,
As I wrote to you in an email yesterday, I'm used to the Deep State's attacks against me.
_When you run for president as a political outsider and pledge to drain the swamp and root out corruption, you are going to be mercilessly attacked. _
But I will NEVER get used to the vicious attacks against my supporters, my associates, and my family members.
**That 's why I'm disgusted that the Biden-appointed Special Counsel is harassing, threatening, and terrorizing my staff.**
The Deep State only attacks me, because I give a voice to YOU, the American people.
They would have ZERO SHAME framing you, harassing you, or threatening you if you stood in their way.
But in 2024, We The People will once again take back the reins of our country and save our Republic before it's lost for good.

As a public servant for well over a decade, I’ve been privileged to serve our incredibly diverse and beautiful district every single day. I am constantly amazed by our community’s ability to develop creative solutions to the challenges we face.

As a parent and Assemblymember, I know well the complex issues local families face. In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I make will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district -- whether it’s fighting for dignified wages and a public health option, or defending reproductive freedoms and the rights of our LGBTQ friends and family from far-right attacks.

**Unfortunately, Congress today is being led by extremists more focused on generating online clicks, cable news hits, and dollars in their campaign accounts._Their goal?_ Advance a fringe political agenda -- even if it comes at the expense of the people they represent.**

We can't afford to accept this status quo in Washington, and we need to get back on track. That’s why I’m in this race, and it’s why I’m asking for your support:

clean_body: | = Friend, = | **= As a public servant for well over a decade, I’ve been privileged to serve our incredibly diverse and beautiful district every single day. I am constantly amazed by our community’s ability to develop creative solutions to the challenges we face. As a parent and Assemblymember, I know well the complex issues local families face. In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I make will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district -- whether it’s fighting for dignified wages and a public health option, or defending reproductive freedoms and the rights of our LGBTQ friends and family from far-right attacks. Unfortunately, Congress today is being led by extremists more focused on generating online clicks, cable news hits, and dollars in their campaign accounts.Their goal? Advance a fringe political agenda -- even if it comes at the expense of the people they represent. We can't afford to accept this status quo in Washington, and we need to get back on track. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Kentucky
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Democratic Governor Andy Beshear is one of the most popular governors in America — even in a red state.

Friends -
In just a moment I am going to ask you to make a contribution to Kentucky's Democratic Governor, Andy Beshear. Please let me explain why this request, especially today, is so important.
There aren't many governor's races in 2023, but there is one in Kentucky.
Earlier this week, Republicans nominated a Trump devotee, Daniel Cameron, as their candidate. In his victory speech he said, "The Trump culture of winning is alive and well in Kentucky."
He will have the support of Trump, and the entire MAGA-right. And as you read this there is probably tons of money flowing into his campaign.
But Democratic Governor Andy Beshear is one of the most popular governors in America — even in a red state. He is the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year and he needs our help.
Andy is popular because he had the courage to expand Medicaid and give health care to people in his state who desperately need it.
He is popular because time and time again, he chooses to stand and fight for working people in his state.
He is a shining example of what is possible when Democrats fight for what is right everywhere. And he needs our help. Today.
And because this is Kentucky and not a crazily expensive Senate race or even a statewide race in California our donations will go a very long way. That's why I am asking:
[**Can you PLEASE rush a $3 contribution directly to Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear's re-election campaign today? He needs our support immediately to hold off a challenge from the MAGA-right in his state.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-beshear/?refcode=em230517&refcode2=1364_4767699_uMz7X6&akid=1364%2E4767699%2EuMz7X6)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Remove DeJoy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Millions of Americans rely on the postal service for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw)
Peter, Time and again, I hear so many people voice their concerns about the future of the USPS under Louis DeJoy. **I agree, and I’m ready to take action.** Since former President Donald Trump appointed him in 2020, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done everything he can to make the USPS more expensive and less convenient to use. DeJoy enacted massive cuts to postal services, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, and slowed down mail delivery in the months leading up to the 2020 election. Not only that, but late last year, a federal judge ruled that DeJoy’s harmful policies right before the 2020 elections harmed delivery. Seems awfully convenient that in a year with record-breaking vote-by-mail, Trump’s hand-picked appointee enacted changes that hurt delivery services. Enough is enough — it’s time for Louis DeJoy to be removed as Postmaster General before he degrades the USPS any further. [**If you agree, add your name today to our petition to call on the USPS Board of Governors to remove DeJoy from office as soon as possible.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2305_USPS_petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230518_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2305_USPS_petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230518_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw)
---
Millions of Americans rely on the postal service for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more — which is why I made sure passing legislation to improve the USPS was a priority last year. But Louis DeJoy has more than proved how little he cares about the future of the USPS.
Last year, we passed major bills to improve the USPS, including the _Postal Service Reform Act_ and the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which allocated $3 billion to electrify our mail delivery services. In fact, a company based right here in Wisconsin is building thousands of electric mail trucks. This is a win for our economy, our environment, and our mailing service — no thanks to Louis DeJoy.
[**The USPS is a fundamental service for all Americans. We can’t let DeJoy slow down or dismantle the postal service’s progress any longer. If you’re with me, sign my petition calling for DeJoy’s removal from office.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2305_USPS_petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230518_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2305_USPS_petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230518_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw)
---
Thank you for using your voice to bring awareness to this critical issue.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=309%2E35263%2E-AkLTw)

name: Team Emilia
subject: Let us know: Do you agree that Congress should invest in children and educators across Northeast Ohio?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Here on Team Emilia, we believe that every student across America – regardless of where they live, or what family they come from – deserves access to a high-quality education.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63477496/406937251/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.05.18_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWE0YWRkMS1hN2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqguH_L-dXDqlS-k51Z8lxG5Hf_cYKrql7YdthBW_EE=)
Peter,

Here on Team Emilia, we believe that every student across America – regardless of where they live, or what family they come from – deserves access to a high-quality education.

But to ensure every child has the resources they need to succeed, we have to invest in the selfless, hard-working educators across the country.

That’s why Emilia is co-leading the _EDUCATORS for America Act_ – a comprehensive piece of legislation that will strengthen the high-quality educator pipeline and ensure that both students and teachers have the tools and opportunities they need to excel.

**We believe that investing in students and teachers means investing in our nation’s future.** But we want to hear what you think, Peter.

clean_body: Here on Team Emilia, we believe that every student across America – regardless of where they live, or what family they come from – deserves access to a high-quality education. = Peter, Here on Team Emilia, we believe that every student across America – regardless of where they live, or what family they come from – deserves access to a high-quality education. But to ensure every child has the resources they need to succeed, we have to invest in the selfless, hard-working educators across the country. That’s why Emilia is co-leading the EDUCATORS for America Act – a comprehensive piece of legislation that will strengthen the high-quality educator pipeline and ensure that both students and teachers have the tools and opportunities they need to excel. We believe that investing in students and teachers means investing in our nation’s future. But we want to hear what you think, Peter. | Do you agree that Congress should fight for children and educators across the country? | = = All responses will be immediately recorded and sent to Emilia Sykes HQ. name: Urgent Redistricting Update
subject: POLITICO: Republicans planning on “ambitious gerrymandering” ahead of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
it’s central to their strategy to winning the House
|
---

Team, Republicans have a cynical strategy to expand their House majority in 2024 – one that doesn’t involve getting more votes. **_POLITICO:_
"Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering despite previous reprimands from state courts – now that they’ve elected judges who are less likely to thwart their plans."

[_Help defeat GOP gerrymandering: Donate to the NDRC >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63477678/406937870/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230518_FR_5U_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhY2M2Y2Y3LWE3ZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0AACETbLu8M1Koo6dWtLNoiifgY_tZWVJpNqGjPi6Y=)** For years, Republicans stacked courts with judges they believed would help advance their anti-democratic agenda. **Now, they’re hoping the courts will grant them a green light for extreme gerrymandering ahead of 2024.**
* In North Carolina, Republicans asked the state’s highest court to **roll back fair maps and the conservative-majority decided in their favor.**
* In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to **defeat challenges to rigged maps.**

[**_Help support fair maps nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63477679/406937871/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230518_FR_5U_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhY2M2Y2Y3LWE3ZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0AACETbLu8M1Koo6dWtLNoiifgY_tZWVJpNqGjPi6Y=) Here’s the good news team: The NDRC has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy.

Last November, our strategy helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue fighting, we can ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024 and beyond – **_but if we grow complacent, the GOP could roll back our progress before the next election!_**

President Obama warned that **“Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.”** [**_Our work is powered by supporters like you. Will you donate today to help the NDRC continue fighting for a strong democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63477680/406937872/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230518_FR_5U_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhY2M2Y2Y3LWE3ZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0AACETbLu8M1Koo6dWtLNoiifgY_tZWVJpNqGjPi6Y=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: it’s central to their strategy to winning the House | Team, Republicans have a cynical strategy to expand their House majority in 2024 – one that doesn’t involve getting more votes. POLITICO: "Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering despite previous reprimands from state courts – now that they’ve elected judges who are less likely to thwart their plans." = For years, Republicans stacked courts with judges they believed would help advance their anti-democratic agenda. Now, they’re hoping the courts will grant them a green light for extreme gerrymandering ahead of 2024. In North Carolina, Republicans asked the state’s highest court to roll back fair maps and the conservative-majority decided in their favor. In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to defeat challenges to rigged maps. = Here’s the good news team: The NDRC has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy. Last November, our strategy helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue fighting, we can ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024 and beyond – but if we grow complacent, the GOP could roll back our progress before the next election! President Obama warned that “Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.” = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Elizabeth Warren (via DLCC.org)
subject: Yeah, right…
body:
I’m going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values. | | |
---
| | I first ran for office because I’d studied how the system was rigged against hardworking people, and I wanted to do something about it. I’m running for re-election because while we’ve made tremendous progress together, we’ve still got some serious challenges ahead of us. The governor of Idaho recently signed an extreme “abortion trafficking” bill into law – restricting residents from traveling for abortions in states where it's legal. Two Black lawmakers in Tennessee were expelled from the state House last month for peacefully protesting against gun violence following a horrific mass shooting in Nashville. Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is popping up all over, threatening the right to health care, expression, and safety for trans, gender-nonconforming, and nonbinary people. Our judiciary system has been hijacked by the far-right, and these institutions continue to give the public more and more reasons to lose trust. The more recent examples? I could bring up how a federal judge in Texas ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of mifepristone – one of the most common methods of abortion. Or, I could go with the recent revelation that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury trips and other favors from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow. Look: I won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against. Our values and rights are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby. Anti-abortion radicals. Right-wing extremists. All using their deep pockets to block change. All hoping that we’ll get so frustrated we just tune out. Yeah, right. [I’m going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values. If you’re able to, please split a donation of $10 between me and the **DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC** to help continue this fight. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEVSTbAez4yPhJS5XcJ6FPSK143ggSAWToaPCL4B59fEwPEQumtNVTz_VFxpdg6HA3U2PkWAekliRYObbWmEhHI2pw7TPgdb4aMrombkdCIFhBFoopOJSJZMDAkTfw8sH-ynmH3F0Ck3IZhy2zJmHDus1fh8NE4AYLg9lT_GAPZh4z3ZYQ8zs-E9I7vJF6TIlzOoiuSIzvPDXBBK0PHH6QzWnnB7-28lJDp_0wze8NOaenDS9GzkVsuGZaLOo-fDhu0ey4rJhgKlui4DUxENB3e--yvpSj73QFUucUzudtYfQe_L8VfDP3vDzoRsKHHLQwU0ui1xymc4H36SZxYFdSDvEEgwIc8Ni2m8Bk-Q-aQg/3wa/NVsbV9hwQvy0Rbmytbn5Rw/h0/DrTYFpCLN1BasO94MslFDkKhNIZYb2FNPs1U4VIFLsY) [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEVSTbAez4yPhJS5XcJ6FPSK143ggSAWToaPCL4B59fEwPEQumtNVTz_VFxpdg6HA3U2PkWAekliRYObbWmEhHI2pw7TPgdb4aMrombkdCIFhBFoopOJSJZMDAkTfw8sH-ynmH3F0Ck3IZhy2zJmHDus1fh8NE4AYLg9lT_GAPZosx0YgPYiz9hQLXpQ36sjw21OEpsXCtQq2sQ0YtA7Veb4GyJXLIaJ21UCuFu7Y-FVUh3V__QokUG-qYfcUSv9n5QPa31pNhlP4PESUZ1K8sPiROie50h2w6vmq_o8oOfy0X4VlmBmi0kZMxOulBwI8KC5yJeE7hjRtpyKNzO87DR7T2-FXXTCC1-862en9pPw/3wa/NVsbV9hwQvy0Rbmytbn5Rw/h1/uMWmG-S8NqzeicHmGBdaZPnD2dLAf77dlJ1z_EkdyIc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Senator Elizabeth Warren and DLCC's Grassroots Victory PAC.

Big problems require big solutions, and I’m in this fight all the way.
We can end the filibuster, pass a national law protecting abortion rights across the country, and expand the Supreme Court to rebalance this hijacked institution and prevent more damage from being done.
We can pass my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act to give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest.
We can continue mobilizing across the country and provide resources for critical local downballot races, ensuring that pro-democracy candidates are leading the charge to protect our rights and election integrity in the states.
Real change doesn't just happen because of decisions made in Washington. It happens because people all across the country get into the fight – pushing from the outside while elected officials work on the inside.
I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, but I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too.
[If you believe that these are the types of fights our elected leaders should be taking on, please pitch in $10 to support my re-election campaign and the**DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC** to fuel this fight. I’m so grateful for your support. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEVSTbAez4yPhJS5XcJ6FPSK143ggSAWToaPCL4B59fEwPEQumtNVTz_VFxpdg6HA3U2PkWAekliRYObbWmEhHI2pw7TPgdb4aMrombkdCIFhBFoopOJSJZMDAkTfw8sH-ynmH3F0Ck3IZhy2zJmHDus1fh8NE4AYLg9lT_GAPZhkeWo9xZPSbQWsqm0oLmU9aRgSeGiIq8fBKTWDHF_GGjk9_QtQlu3IDJMy4wU93hy6SMiJUNGb7q1SUa8OgnhkGUS8172HHw_uQ2TM9ThHxSi05V8SYT5mLq5UX7PN2_pgv6ZMbza9ZdfrAmJy8bZjOWRaHnnnCSm6NngvzWlHGnpNk2KIM1trFqI-afQwNtA/3wa/NVsbV9hwQvy0Rbmytbn5Rw/h7/KBWiK-6dqvM7WC3uiC3_fJeNawW2brUH3GJ2Q82EvT0)

clean_body: I’m going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values. | | | | | I first ran for office because I’d studied how the system was rigged against hardworking people, and I wanted to do something about it. I’m running for re-election because while we’ve made tremendous progress together, we’ve still got some serious challenges ahead of us. The governor of Idaho recently signed an extreme “abortion trafficking” bill into law – restricting residents from traveling for abortions in states where it's legal. Two Black lawmakers in Tennessee were expelled from the state House last month for peacefully protesting against gun violence following a horrific mass shooting in Nashville. Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is popping up all over, threatening the right to health care, expression, and safety for trans, gender-nonconforming, and nonbinary people. Our judiciary system has been hijacked by the far-right, and these institutions continue to give the public more and more reasons to lose trust. The more recent examples? I could bring up how a federal judge in Texas ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of mifepristone – one of the most common methods of abortion. Or, I could go with the recent revelation that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury trips and other favors from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow. Look: I won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against. Our values and rights are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby. Anti-abortion radicals. Right-wing extremists. All using their deep pockets to block change. All hoping that we’ll get so frustrated we just tune out. Yeah, right. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Senator Elizabeth Warren and DLCC's Grassroots Victory PAC. | | | | | Big problems require big solutions, and I’m in this fight all the way. We can pass my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act to give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest. We can continue mobilizing across the country and provide resources for critical local downballot races, ensuring that pro-democracy candidates are leading the charge to protect our rights and election integrity in the states. Real change doesn't just happen because of decisions made in Washington. It happens because people all across the country get into the fight – pushing from the outside while elected officials work on the inside. I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, but I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zflnhbun48jeph04grrm73dh7q0kivs589623nfo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5gmeoj2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z85s6l8hetblasem9j9h8rm4iigdfa1nol59lqm8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5gmeoj2cph2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr4khjsd6lgmh4812rg8r7fcbln8digq7b8khsrg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5gmeoj2cph2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We are thrilled to announce Paul Begala as a guest speaker at our Blue Commonwealth Gala next month!

|
---
Derek, We are thrilled to announce Paul Begala as a guest speaker at our Blue Commonwealth Gala next month! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63478019/406939195/-2067526916?refcode=dpva-em-051823&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2EyYzhhYS1hOWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnRXTvxe0RbAq_D9RVEp9FsNF5FViBaLzYPYaNqCBoA=&emci=f74a5f81-a5f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8ca2c8aa-a9f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15759664) Paul’s experience and credentials speak for themselves. From being a leading Democratic political commentator for over 22 years to being a crucial force in Democratic presidential campaigns from Bill Clinton to Obama, Paul has a world of insight. Which is probably why he’s authored multiple New York Times best sellers and is a lauded educator and lecturer in the political space. [If you stand with us in our efforts to curb gun violence and protect communities across America, rush $10 or any amount today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63478433/406940794/2042294413?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230518_FR_Boebert.1.1_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_Boebert&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmI3YzA4MS1hYWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XlXksLyZe3t4-zOmj3Epvky8yY2eqboVgKBFBPwFH8=)

Meanwhile, Democrats are fighting this crisis head-on. body:
| | | Fellow American, it's Senator Hawley.

I am incredibly concerned about what I've seen from Biden's Justice Department. It has never been more clear that there are two tiers of justice in America—one for conservatives and one for liberals.

Protest at an abortion clinic and Merrick Garland will send an FBI swat team. But Firebomb a federal courthouse or vandalize innocent people's businesses? You may not even get arrested— and if you do, you're likely to get a slap on the wrist.

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: What it takes to run TV ads in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Did you know?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23151%2E3422442%2E1BYDAh)
Derek,
Election Day may seem like a far off thought, but our competitive primary is less than ten months away.
Running a campaign in California simply costs more, so our early fundraising is especially critical.
Two of the country's six most expensive TV media markets are in California—and even as we'll be reaching voters through lower cost means like digital ads and door knocking, TV is still a major part of any big campaign.
**And that's where you come in, Derek.** As a truly grassroots powered campaign, Katie has never accepted a dime from corporate PACs and doesn't take money from federal lobbyists. We believe a better way is possible and our campaign is funded entirely by folks like you.
Donating today will allow your dollars to go further and similar to plane tickets, reserving well in advance will ensure we get the best rates and time slots to run TV ads, which show voters voters why Katie is the warrior we need in Washington.
**[Can you pitch in today to help Katie win this tough and expensive race? Investing now will guarantee our campaign will be in a better place in the future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230518-1?refcode=EMAH18_1_ADS_20230518_V1_F&refcode2=23151_3422442_1BYDAh&akid=23151%2E3422442%2E1BYDAh)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230518-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH18_1_ADS_20230518_V1_F&refcode2=23151_3422442_1BYDAh&akid=23151%2E3422442%2E1BYDAh)**
As always, thank you for your continued support.
Katie Porter for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH18_1_ADS_20230518_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23151_3422442_1BYDAh&akid=23151%2E3422442%2E1BYDAh)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=23151%2E3422442%2E1BYDAh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=23151%2E3422442%2E1BYDAh)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

Two of the country's six most expensive TV media markets are in California—and even as we'll be reaching voters through lower cost means like digital ads and door knocking, TV is still a major part of any big campaign. And that's where you come in, Derek. As a truly grassroots powered campaign, Katie has never accepted a dime from corporate PACs and doesn't take money from federal lobbyists. We believe a better way is possible and our campaign is funded entirely by folks like you. Donating today will allow your dollars to go further and similar to plane tickets, reserving well in advance will ensure we get the best rates and time slots to run TV ads, which show voters voters why Katie is the warrior we need in Washington. As always, thank you for your continued support. Katie Porter for California Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: It’s time for responsible governing.
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We know many of you are concerned about the news that the U.S. may be less than two weeks out from the projected deadline for hitting the debt ceiling. Instead of solving the problem, House Republicans have been doubling down on their threat to send our country into default for the first time in U.S. history by refusing to pay our country’s existing debts, which economists say will trigger a global economic crisis and a potential recession.
It is irresponsible and reckless. It’s also, for some, just politics.
Not for Lizzie. Lizzie has been working with her colleagues in the House Democratic caucus to protect Americans from the dangerous games playing out in Washington. Putting people over politics. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230518?refcode=folf230518]
Because this is politics. This crisis is one that has been manufactured by Washington Republicans. Congress has consistently passed legislation to increase the debt limit without conditions. In fact, Congress has raised the debt ceiling 78 times in the past 63 years—including three times during the Trump Administration. And roughly 25% of our national debt incurred over the past 230 years was taken on during the Trump Administration.
While Republicans play politics with our economy and Americans’ livelihoods, Lizzie and Democrats are coming up with real solutions to the real challenges facing our country.
We’re going to keep working together to re-elect Lizzie and win back the House majority so we can return to responsible governance and leadership that’s focused on getting the things done that Americans want done. Your contributions support our efforts—will you make a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230518?refcode=folf230518]
Thanks for being part of the team,
Team Lizzie

body:

Friend,
Our justice system is truly dead...
**“In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges”** [Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
**“Raskin says [Special Counsel] Jack Smith likely mulling seditious conspiracy charges against Trump”** [Source: _Washington Examiner_]
But this is America under Crooked Joe Biden and the radical Democrats – a Third World tin-pot dictatorship that targets, silences, and even **ARRESTS** its political opposition.
With the Biden DOJ’s hand-picked special counsel dragging me through yet another phony witch hunt, it feels like every day that our incredible supporters ask me, _“Sir, how do you do it? How do you keep going despite the lies, smears, and attacks?”_
But the answer is simple.
**I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to their tyranny because I truly LOVE America, its potential for greatness, the hope, opportunity, and freedom that it stands for, and the amazing patriots who call it home – YOU.**
But in the radical Left’s sick and twisted pursuit to “Get Trump,” they are willing to undermine EVERY value upon which our beautiful country was built.
_They love to cry foul and talk of “voter suppression,” but what about the more than**74 MILLION** Americans whose votes they seek to **ERASE** with each new phony witch hunt they concoct?_
**You see, the MAGA movement was never about me – it was ALWAYS about YOU.**
For the past 8 years, I have simply been _YOUR VOICE_ against the Swamp politicians of _both_ parties, the Deep State, and the entrenched globalist bureaucrats.
**And that is why I will NEVER give an inch to the Left’s despicable witch hunts, because if they win in 2024, our country is truly lost.**
So, if you’re like me, and you REFUSE to allow these radical lunatics to try and cancel out your vote, then I have to ask that you stand with me and help peacefully DEFEND our movement during this dark chapter in our nation’s history.
_(But if you’re struggling right now due to Crooked Joe’s moronic and disastrous policies, please do not read any further, and don’t even think about donating. You and your family always come FIRST. And don't worry, when we win back the White House, the greatest economy in history will come ROARING back!)_
[**Please make a contribution of any amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to help DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts and SAVE AMERICA in what is truly our country’s final hope – for 1,500% impact.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcFuqzAQRb9m2IHsMTawYJEW5S0iddt2FTn2JJnKNghMo_z9E1HS7blXo3s0Nk6Bz_cemjdAvLJfABHUDhAP9dvXhzl8Hoby85tO5WB0fdtSfAfEfJ_or_q8UlG0HDbaDIXv0bXoXEG9NG1dK6PRFNfeaCs6efKdriWeGlWrDgm90Fra89mIgnsUqISWreyE1KaSJ2l1I1B2GtvWIdTixqnyY7LB_-R5jVPlxliE_prztDwm7QH3C7l1purGaSa_NTZmf6m0kWZ2tvwZOeXyvCY_W144XUo3xsg5EwHukwtK-ga1UdQ5JZA8qP2a4zGS5zWCGp6-ZoPLuM6OQA2Oj_bJnI2T5UsCNbycXsmYMqUMauhEIwDNMQX2oAZ936X3f7slzg_4-IgaxNdv55rw_VHMvZ9uHAIvpoFaXLYFm9v_AAAA__-8MIv4)

clean_body: Our justice system is truly dead. | | | Friend, Our justice system is truly dead... “In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges” [Source: Wall Street Journal] “Raskin says [Special Counsel] Jack Smith likely mulling seditious conspiracy charges against Trump” [Source: Washington Examiner] But this is America under Crooked Joe Biden and the radical Democrats – a Third World tin-pot dictatorship that targets, silences, and even ARRESTS its political opposition. With the Biden DOJ’s hand-picked special counsel dragging me through yet another phony witch hunt, it feels like every day that our incredible supporters ask me, “Sir, how do you do it? How do you keep going despite the lies, smears, and attacks?” But the answer is simple. I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to their tyranny because I truly LOVE America, its potential for greatness, the hope, opportunity, and freedom that it stands for, and the amazing patriots who call it home – YOU. But in the radical Left’s sick and twisted pursuit to “Get Trump,” they are willing to undermine EVERY value upon which our beautiful country was built. They love to cry foul and talk of “voter suppression,” but what about the more than74 MILLION Americans whose votes they seek to ERASE with each new phony witch hunt they concoct? You see, the MAGA movement was never about me – it was ALWAYS about YOU. For the past 8 years, I have simply been YOUR VOICE against the Swamp politicians of both parties, the Deep State, and the entrenched globalist bureaucrats. And that is why I will NEVER give an inch to the Left’s despicable witch hunts, because if they win in 2024, our country is truly lost. So, if you’re like me, and you REFUSE to allow these radical lunatics to try and cancel out your vote, then I have to ask that you stand with me and help peacefully DEFEND our movement during this dark chapter in our nation’s history. (But if you’re struggling right now due to Crooked Joe’s moronic and disastrous policies, please do not read any further, and don’t even think about donating. You and your family always come FIRST. And don't worry, when we win back the White House, the greatest economy in history will come ROARING back!) Thank you and God bless you, | | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: Quick survey on abortion >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2023.05.18_B1_Legal-Abortion_Main-90o_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2023.05.18_B1_Legal-Abortion_Main-90o_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2023.05.18_B1_Legal-Abortion_Main-90o_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2023.05.18_B1_Legal-Abortion_Main-90o_logo]Team,
The moment Roe v. Wade was overturned, states immediately began rolling back the clock on abortion rights.
In Florida, a 6-week abortion ban was signed into law.
North Carolina has a 12-week abortion ban on the table.
Texas has bans in place that prohibit nearly all abortions.
Lisa believes that reproductive freedoms should be guaranteed and that health care decisions should remain between a woman and her doctor. But Lisa needs to know what YOU think.
Should abortion be legal? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p3DlCw4k9kWOsCD9OmJ22A2]
RESPOND NOW >> [https://act.cbcpac.org/survey/Vote-Biden-2024?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2023.05.17_B2_Voting-for-Biden_30AC]
This issue is extremely important. The longer we wait, the more bans far-right Republicans will enact. Lisa really wants YOUR input on this, everyone so please take this one question survey as soon as you can.
Thank you for responding,
Team Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue' program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Save the Date: 46th Annual Washington State Republican Party Dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us at our upcoming 46th Annual Dinner - Get your tickets now!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================

USA

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=12364db380)
.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: guaranteed sick leave is long overdue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
When your child is sick, you shouldn't have to worry about whether you'll be able to make rent if you stay home to care for them. And when you're sick, you shouldn't have to struggle through the workday or risk being fired. **But the 28 million Americans who don't have job-protected sick leave are faced with these impossible decisions every year.**
It's just plain wrong that in 2023, we don't have guaranteed sick leave for all Americans. **That's why I'm teaming up with my Democratic colleagues in the House and the Senate to introduce the _Healthy Families Act_ — a bill that will establish job-protected sick leave for _every single American._**
This legislation will simplify the process for employees and expand sick leave to include caring for family members, accessing preventative care and recovering after experiencing domestic violence, stalking or sexual assault. It'll create additional economic security for families, benefit public health by reducing the spread of infectious diseases and lower health care costs by encouraging people to seek preventative care — all without any negative impacts on the economy.
Guaranteed sick leave _just makes sense_ — and it's long overdue. I've been fighting for this legislation for decades, and now, we're closer than ever before to finally getting it across the finish line. But the only way to get anything done in Washington is with strong grassroots support from people like you. **[_That's why I'm calling on 5,000 Democrats to add their names to my petition before midnight tonight. Please, will you sign on now to support this legislation?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63479673/406945357/-1386146426?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4137-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2NmM2JmMi1hZWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFrvaQhpBqegUjZ7iarxvMy6VzfP-zNX_T3FezDwPdc=&emci=debc4e6e-01f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bccf3bf2-aef5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, When your child is sick, you shouldn't have to worry about whether you'll be able to make rent if you stay home to care for them. And when you're sick, you shouldn't have to struggle through the workday or risk being fired. But the 28 million Americans who don't have job-protected sick leave are faced with these impossible decisions every year. It's just plain wrong that in 2023, we don't have guaranteed sick leave for all Americans. That's why I'm teaming up with my Democratic colleagues in the House and the Senate to introduce the Healthy Families Act — a bill that will establish job-protected sick leave for every single American. This legislation will simplify the process for employees and expand sick leave to include caring for family members, accessing preventative care and recovering after experiencing domestic violence, stalking or sexual assault. It'll create additional economic security for families, benefit public health by reducing the spread of infectious diseases and lower health care costs by encouraging people to seek preventative care — all without any negative impacts on the economy. Guaranteed sick leave just makes sense — and it's long overdue. I've been fighting for this legislation for decades, and now, we're closer than ever before to finally getting it across the finish line. But the only way to get anything done in Washington is with strong grassroots support from people like you. | | This issue is incredibly important to me — and it'd mean so much to have your support in this fight. Thank you for making your voice heard. — Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. Common sense Americans know that allowing open borders with no repercussions should never be allowed when hundreds of thousands of immigrants have worked hard to get here the right way.

name: Congresswoman Ann Kirkpatrick
subject: Why I support Kirsten Engel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend — I’m thrilled to endorse Kirsten Engel in the race for Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
Kirsten is a mother, a teacher, a lawyer, and a legislator. In the State House, she stood up for educators and our underfunded public schools. She was instrumental in coming up with a plan to protect Arizona’s water. And she fought for key criminal justice reforms.
Kirsten knows this district inside and out. She will be a fierce advocate for the people she represents and a crucial voice in Washington DC.
We need her fighting for us — for our families, our futures, and our fundamental rights — in Congress.
Kirsten lost last year by one of the closest election margins in the country. I know she can win in 2024, but she’ll need our support.
I'm proud to support Kirsten in this race. Will you join me by chipping in now? Every little bit counts! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_051823_Kirkpatrick]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you!
— Ann Kirkpatrick, Former Arizona Congresswoman
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_051823_Kirkpatrick [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_051823_Kirkpatrick] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.

clean_body: [] Friend — I’m thrilled to endorse Kirsten Engel in the race for Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. Kirsten is a mother, a teacher, a lawyer, and a legislator. In the State House, she stood up for educators and our underfunded public schools. She was instrumental in coming up with a plan to protect Arizona’s water. And she fought for key criminal justice reforms. Kirsten knows this district inside and out. She will be a fierce advocate for the people she represents and a crucial voice in Washington DC. We need her fighting for us — for our families, our futures, and our fundamental rights — in Congress. Kirsten lost last year by one of the closest election margins in the country. I know she can win in 2024, but she’ll need our support. I'm proud to support Kirsten in this race. Will you join me by chipping in now? Every little bit counts! [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] Thank you! — Ann Kirkpatrick, Former Arizona Congresswoman [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. body:
| | | Fellow American, it's Senator Hawley.

I am incredibly concerned about what I've seen from Biden's Justice Department. It has never been more clear that there are two tiers of justice in America—one for conservatives and one for liberals.

Protest at an abortion clinic and Merrick Garland will send an FBI swat team. But Firebomb a federal courthouse or vandalize innocent people's businesses? You may not even get arrested— and if you do, you're likely to get a slap on the wrist.

body:

Hi there — I wanted to make sure you saw the survey our team sent out yesterday.

**Fixing the Supreme Court is essential if we want our democracy to function, and I'd really like to have your input on this critical issue.**

[**We're hoping to hear from 250 more supporters by the end of this week. Will you take our survey and share your thoughts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63480533/406948662/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_L3&refcode=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_L3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmN2NiZi1iMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmL5jlr0hcvcnprKlHWEb9v-wChzQBugztgw_rjq64s=&emci=d0846786-9bf5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3c7f7cbf-b1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> Our current Supreme Court — stacked with far-right judges thanks to strong-arm tactics from Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell — has ended the national right to reproductive freedom in America.
>
> It's rolled back the EPA's authority to regulate greenhouse gasses and protect our environment. It's severely limited the ability of states to implement sensible gun safety laws.
>
> It's opened the floodgates to dark money in our elections, it's given the green light to rampant gerrymandering, and it's gutted the Voting Rights Act.
>
> **When an unelected group of extreme judges can undo decades of progress and uproot people's fundamental rights (and do so while ignoring ethics laws, as Clarence Thomas recently demonstrated), something needs to change.**
>
> [**Jennifer wants to hear your thoughts. Will you take our survey on how to fix the Supreme Court?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63480534/406948663/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmN2NiZi1iMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmL5jlr0hcvcnprKlHWEb9v-wChzQBugztgw_rjq64s=&emci=d0846786-9bf5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3c7f7cbf-b1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63480535/406948664/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmN2NiZi1iMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmL5jlr0hcvcnprKlHWEb9v-wChzQBugztgw_rjq64s=&emci=d0846786-9bf5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3c7f7cbf-b1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Because of this court's actions, millions of Americans now live in states that ban abortion with zero exceptions for rape, incest, or the health of the mother.
>
> Because of this court, legislative bodies increasingly do not reflect the popular will.
>
> Because of this court, special interests have more influence on our politics than ever before.
>
> It will take years to undo the damage of this court. As she works on legislation to restore our rights and make our system fairer, Jennifer knows that we need to act to prevent the Supreme Court (and any future one) from doing further damage. **We must find a way to make the court more accountable and reflective.**
>
> [**Please take our survey and tell us how you think we should fix the Supreme Court →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63480536/406948665/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmN2NiZi1iMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmL5jlr0hcvcnprKlHWEb9v-wChzQBugztgw_rjq64s=&emci=d0846786-9bf5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3c7f7cbf-b1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63480537/406948666/-1409741806?ms=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_B2&refcode=EM_PET_230518SURV_N_JW_FULL_13_NG_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmN2NiZi1iMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmL5jlr0hcvcnprKlHWEb9v-wChzQBugztgw_rjq64s=&emci=d0846786-9bf5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3c7f7cbf-b1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Thank you,

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What are your thoughts on gun safety?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I am frustrated and heartbroken over the gun violence in our country.
| | |
---
Hello,
I am frustrated and heartbroken over the gun violence in our country.
Sadly, and outrageously, mass shootings are becoming a way of life in America. As a parent and as a citizen, I believe that we MUST do more to foster gun safety.
For too long, Republicans in Congress have failed to act. Addressing gun violence will always be a priority for me, but it’s critical that I hear from you on this issue too:
**Do you agree that we need to close loopholes that allow criminals to get their hands on guns and make background checks universal for people trying to purchase a gun?**
| | | [YES, I think we need to close loopholes and increase background checks >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63480564/406948744/706855816?code=mh-jtk2287-su-in&ask=3&amounts=3,10,25,50,100&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWYwYmIwMy1iMmY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2B1Lfu6wm1aIXSHWVx0d6KqPDDkKHELj-DuylIGQhus=&emci=ffdd3b5e-b0f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b9f0bb03-b2f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5452893)

clean_body: I am frustrated and heartbroken over the gun violence in our country. | | | Hello, I am frustrated and heartbroken over the gun violence in our country. Sadly, and outrageously, mass shootings are becoming a way of life in America. As a parent and as a citizen, I believe that we MUST do more to foster gun safety. For too long, Republicans in Congress have failed to act. Addressing gun violence will always be a priority for me, but it’s critical that I hear from you on this issue too: Do you agree that we need to close loopholes that allow criminals to get their hands on guns and make background checks universal for people trying to purchase a gun? | | | | Whether you’re in Texas, Colorado, Tennessee or New Hampshire, this is one of the most pressing issues we face. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300-db-action?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300-db-action?refcode2=logo]
Folks, here’s what we have to say about Lauren Boebert’s divorce: It’s 2023, and if a woman wants to end a marriage, that’s her right. (It may also be advisable when your spouse is a sex offender.) 1
But Lauren Boebert’s right-wing cronies disagree about women’s autonomy. On the heels of the disastrous Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade , so-called “men’s rights” activists are attacking no-fault divorce, the kind of divorce Boebert is seeking.
That’s right, not only do Boebert and her extremist pals want to control women’s bodies -- they want to take us back to the bad old days when women seeking divorce had to prove marital misconduct. The high cost of legal bills and the trauma of revealing personal or intimate details to strangers often trapped women in abusive situations. This is wrong, and Debby won’t stand for it.
But right now, we need to hear from you:
Do you agree we need more elected officials committed to fighting for women’s bodily autonomy and protecting the ability of women to leave marriages?
YES » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/D7m3EjrF_ESVHtp64xpUzQ2?contactdata=6vxKvrmpKwYxNedgBmTvBWVuD%2F3M1jziYg4fMFUgkndMXdZp4c5OpdMzGkSCgFEE9QdRH3Vb0S0oNI%2BzboFIpgxaIgPgMP6UaDjuwlR1pxA%3D] NO » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/D7m3EjrF_ESVHtp64xpUzQ2?contactdata=6vxKvrmpKwYxNedgBmTvBWVuD%2F3M1jziYg4fMFUgkndMXdZp4c5OpdMzGkSCgFEE9QdRH3Vb0S0oNI%2BzboFIpgxaIgPgMP6UaDjuwlR1pxA%3D]
Thanks for weighing in,
Team Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agriculture business, she understands what the people of western and southern Colorado need -- and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300-db-action?refcode2=btn_biobox]
1. Kylie Cheung, “Lauren Boebert Claims Husband Only Exposed Himself to Teen Girl Because She ‘begged’ for It,” Jezebel, July 13, 2022, https://jezebel.com/lauren-boebert-claims-husband-only-exposed-himself-to-t-1849173531.

Debby Burnett, PO BOX 1761, Gunnison, CO 81230

name: Border Alert
subject: [1] Response unrecorded
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Common sense Americans know that allowing open borders with no repercussions should never be allowed

| |
---
| | | The Democrats and the media want you to believe that the border crisis isn't that bad... that allowing streams of illegal immigrants is humane, and isn't hurting our country.

Common sense Americans know that allowing open borders with no repercussions should never be allowed when hundreds of thousands of immigrants have worked hard to get here the right way.

Joe Biden has threatened to allow mass amnesty for illegal immigrants. We need to know what our biggest supporters have to say...
