name: David Trone
subject: Video Link: I grew up on a farm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,

Today, I’m releasing my second TV ad for my campaign for the U.S. Senate.

You can watch the 60-second ad here >> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EdsJoh7nPHE

Too many politicians like to paper over the past. But for me, my past is central to who I am today. It’s the backbone of my values and my approach to public service.

I grew up in Cheverly, Maryland with a mother who worked as a teacher and a father who was a salesman for Trans World Airlines.

When I was 11, my father decided to move our family to a working farm near the Maryland-Pennsylvania border.

It was a challenging transition for us all. We had no indoor plumbing for a year and my father had no experience in farming. But my brothers and I helped carry the load, collecting eggs, cleaning hog pens, and taking care of chicken houses.

Growing up on a farm taught me the value of hard work and perseverance. And when we lost the farm to the bank – I learned how quickly things can turn.

That’s why - first in my business career, and now as a member of Congress - I’ve been leading the fight for progress on the issues that matter most.

I’d really love to share this ad with you, and it would mean a lot if you’d give it a watch. >> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EdsJoh7nPHE

Peter, I get it. I know what it’s like to struggle and feel like the deck is stacked against you.

As a three-term Congressman, I’ve brought people together to help those struggling with substance use disorder, mental health issues, and a systemically racist criminal justice system.

But I know there’s more to do - and that’s why I’m running for Senate.

Thank you for watching,

David Trone

Watch the Video >> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EdsJoh7nPHE

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

clean_body: | | Hi, Kim reached out to you yesterday because this week is National Women’s Health Week and we’ve set a goal to raise $5,000 this week to defeat anti-choice Michelle Steel. = Kim is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the entire nation – and she’s running to win. In Congress, she'll fight to protect reproductive rights, from ensuring that everyone has access to contraception to protecting abortion providers. But, Michelle Steel has millions of dollars at her disposal, and that’s not counting all the money that Super PACs and dark money groups are preparing to spend for her. That’s why hitting every goal we set is so important. With so much on the line, including the future of abortion access, it’s critical that we don’t fall behind. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Team Nguyen | | | = | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. Bristol St #604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Emerge
subject: Three AANHPI Emerge alums to watch right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63481051/406950581/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjYjJhZjIyLWIzZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG3xR1sBDeL4UkYDtYLP92zkYLfsp8QLDWVWLnDp22k=)
**Peter, it’s AANHPI Heritage Month, and we're making sure these three Emerge alums are on your radar. Del. Kathy Tran and Del. Irene Shin are both defending their seats in the Virginia House of Delegates this year, and Rep. Reena Szczepanski won her 2022 election and is already making an impact in the New Mexico State House. Here’s why their work is so important:**
Right now, Virginia Republicans are clinging to a _narrow majority_ in the House of Delegates – but that’s all the power they need to push their anti-choice agenda and fuel the wave of dangerous legislation threatening our rights nationwide. And in New Mexico, the Democratic House majority recently championed several key bills that will expand protections for LGBTQ+ New Mexicans, preserve public lands, and strengthen voting rights.
[**Here at Emerge, we're working around the clock to recruit and train the next generation of leaders to keep up the fight as these three alums are! Will you chip in now to help Emerge empower more bold Democratic women?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63481052/406950582/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjYjJhZjIyLWIzZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG3xR1sBDeL4UkYDtYLP92zkYLfsp8QLDWVWLnDp22k=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63481053/406950583/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjYjJhZjIyLWIzZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG3xR1sBDeL4UkYDtYLP92zkYLfsp8QLDWVWLnDp22k=)
At just seven months old, Kathy Tran fled Vietnam with her parents. Her family deeply believed in the American promise of hope, opportunity, and freedom. Tran won her 2017 election to become one of the FIRST Asian American women to serve in the Virginia state house. A mother of five, she has fought fiercely to expand health care for vulnerable children. Now, she’s working to protect the privacy of reproductive health data to shield Virginians from the GOP’s extreme anti-choice policies.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63481054/406950584/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjYjJhZjIyLWIzZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG3xR1sBDeL4UkYDtYLP92zkYLfsp8QLDWVWLnDp22k=)
Early in her career, Reena Szczepanski (Emerge New Mexico) worked as a caregiver for young children impacted by the AIDS epidemic. She saw firsthand how families struggled against serious gaps in our care system and has become a staunch advocate for health care access, including an unwavering commitment to reproductive care. Right now, Szczepanski – who previously served as the Executive Director of Emerge New Mexico! – is using the power of her voice as the NM House Majority Whip to deliver the policies her community needs to thrive.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63481055/406950585/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjYjJhZjIyLWIzZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG3xR1sBDeL4UkYDtYLP92zkYLfsp8QLDWVWLnDp22k=)
A proud daughter of immigrants, Irene Shin is the FIRST Korean American to serve in the Virginia House. After seeing her father face terrifying obstacles to finally get lifesaving cancer treatment, Delegate Shin knows how critical it is to protect access to care. She is fighting to reduce health care costs for working families, ensure access to reproductive health care, end pregnancy discrimination in the workplace, and so much more.
With a divided U.S. Congress and an ultraconservative Supreme Court, state houses are crucial battlegrounds in the fight for our essential rights. **That’s why Emerge needs your help to recruit more Democratic women like Delegate Tran, Representative Szczepanski, and Delegate Shin to stop the GOP's agenda, protect our communities in every state, and achieve a more just and inclusive democracy.**
**So we have to ask, Peter:****[Can we count on you to give $5 or more now to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run for office and fight the GOP’s agenda in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63481056/406950586/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjYjJhZjIyLWIzZjUtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cG3xR1sBDeL4UkYDtYLP92zkYLfsp8QLDWVWLnDp22k=)**

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Have you seen this sh*t?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Yikes.
#
Have you seen this sh*t, Derek?
Republicans are threatening to default on our debt + cause a global economic crisis, all so that they can...enact work requirements for SNAP + take food away from hungry kids?
To quote John, “it’s a proposal that would make Scrooge blush.”
We’re sick of this double standard, and John is too. **Just yesterday, he asked the CEO of Silicon Valley Bank if we should enact work requirements for CEOs that run their banks into the ground.** 🤯
John’s doing what yinz guys elected him to the Senate do, from grilling greedy bank execs to fighting the GOP’s attacks on working families — but he still needs our support. **[If you’re still with John, can you make a $5 donation today to keep powering his work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230518-1?refcode=em20230518-1-8379&amount=5&refcode2=8379_434096_dDfZ24&akid=8379%2E434096%2EdDfZ24)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230518-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230518-8379&refcode2=8379_434096_dDfZ24&akid=8379%2E434096%2EdDfZ24)**
Thank you for your ongoing support, team. It’s how we keep fighting.
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230518-8379-footer&t=1&refcode2=8379_434096_dDfZ24&akid=8379%2E434096%2EdDfZ24)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Trader Joe’s to stop union busting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Following a global pandemic that turned our economy on its head, workers across the country are fighting for a seat at the table. Union election petitions rose by 53 percent [https://www.epi.org/publication/unionization-2022/] between October 2021 and September 2022. Workers at companies like Starbucks and Amazon are unionizing in droves. Now employees at Trader Joe’s are joining the effort, with four stores and counting voting to unionize.

Add your name: I support Trader Joe’s United. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-trader-joes-stop-union-busting?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftrader-joes-union-busting-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-trader-joes-stop-union-busting?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftrader-joes-union-busting-petition-swap]

Maeg Yosef, a Trader Joe’s crew member for over 18 years, is leading the grocery chain’s nationwide unionization effort with Trader Joe’s United. She’s watched the culture of Trader Joe’s shift from a workplace that genuinely cared for its staff to a company with increasing turnover, declining benefits, and stagnant wages. These hardworking crew members, who were heralded as heroic first responders during the pandemic, are now fighting their employer for a decent standard of living.

Despite its progressive image, Trader Joe’s is doing everything it can to stifle Trader Joe’s United. They’re employing many of the same underhanded (and often illegal) tactics used by Amazon and Starbucks, including retaliating against pro-union employees [https://www.sfgate.com/food/article/trader-joes-oakland-union-busting-17893529.php] , announcing new benefits and closing stores before union votes could take place [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2022/sep/04/trader-joes-union-workers-labor-law] , and employing a law firm [https://theshoestring.org/2022/11/03/were-stronger-together-trader-joes-union-company-begin-bargaining-in-northampton/] with a long history of anti-union actions.

Sign the petition: Tell Trader Joe’s to stop union-busting! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-trader-joes-stop-union-busting?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftrader-joes-union-busting-petition-swap]

Trader Joe’s employees deserve to have their voices and their grievances heard. They deserve to unionize without interference. I’m proud to stand with Trader Joe’s United, and I hope you’ll take a moment to show your support.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230518-trader-joes-united]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

name: =?utf-8?B?aXTigJlzIG9mZmljaWFsICh2aWEgVVRTKQ==?=
subject: MAGA Mitch’s newest target 🎯
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
the MAGA machine has unleashed their plan to take back the Senate

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we just got
some bad news about the debt ceiling fight.

Republicans are saying they’ll let the country default if Dems don’t agree
to slash key poverty reduction programs. We expected that from them.

But Democrats are supposed to stand up for working families. And yet...
Axios just reported this morning that prominent establishment Dems in
Congress and Joe Biden are telegraphing they plan to cave. What the heck?

It’s abhorrent. If Democrats are going to behave like Republicans, what’s
the point? This is exactly why we need Justice Democrats.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134510?refcode=em20230518-29013&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29013%2E1203867%2EWzikgN ]Will you make a $3 donation now to elect better

body:

# Major allegations of Biden corruption...
And the mainstream media continues to NOT cover it.
Check out my latest YouTube video:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d9a5c34cb2&e=f6564bbe3b)
Don’t forget to subscribe to make sure you see all of my upcoming content.
|
---
# How to fix the border...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=48a1cce958&e=f6564bbe3b)
This week on my podcast, my friend Chad Wolf joined me to talk about his career and how he became an expert on the border and acting Secretary of Homeland Security. He also gave me the FIRST thing he would change on the border to secure it again.
| [Listen now](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9783929708&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
# How Kamala might become President...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4e1d490c1e&e=f6564bbe3b)
|

# Stories I’m Reading...
[Exclusive Poll: 59% Oppose Raising Debt Cap with or without Restrictions](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3d4eb32a4e&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Breitbart
[Biden’s “dismount” is a “personal blow for the prime minister, who was preparing to bask in the flow of hosting three of the world’s most powerful leaders in his hometown” ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e594a7088e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Axios
[Judge mulls contempt for Biden Administration over immigration policy ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=85e04d3ae3&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Politico
[Homeland Security had pro-life moms as ‘radicalization suspects’](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a0d1a3b3b0&e=f6564bbe3b) — via NY Post
[Trump ran his team like Trump Inc. and The Apprentice](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=058a6888d3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Examiner
| | | | | | | | |

|
# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3b1a68c1f6&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.
|
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=44d8183623&e=f6564bbe3b)
|

Peter,
Adam Schiff is going to be expelled from Congress if the House Republicans keep their word.
Schiff is a liar, a thief, a crook and just the worst of the worst. He’s Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked agent of chaos.
It just came out in the Durham Report that nearly **EVERYTHING** he said from 2016-2020 about Russian Collusion was a **BALD FACE LIE.**
Nancy Pelosi now has her daughter running around playing crypt-keeper for Dianne Feinstein to make sure that she hangs on for another year in the Senate so Gov. Newsom doesn’t appoint Barbara Lee and give her the competitive advantage in the CA Senate race.
I’m here to tell you: The CA Senate race on that side doesn’t matter because CA has another path forward - James P. Bradley.
That would be me. I am a veteran running for the US Senate to **STOP ADAM SCHIFF** and **SAVE CALIFORNIA.**
| [STOP ADAM SCHIFF! SAVE CALIFORNIA!](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=f1414d6de9&e=84ee529f47)
---
Adam Schiff is absolutely detested in California but Democrats are going full-steam ahead with his candidacy for the Senate. The entire machine is behind him. THEY OWE HIM ONE!
He carried their water peddling CRIMINAL LIES on the Russia investigation. No one is interested in his representation - I can guarantee you that much.
Now, here’s the issue with this race. Running a campaign in California simply costs more because of the amount of people that live here, so our early fundraising is especially important.
Two of the country's six most expensive TV media markets are in California—and even as we'll be reaching voters through lower cost means like digital ads and door knocking, TV is still a major part of any big campaign.
Rep. Anna Paulina Luna just introduced a resolution to remove Adam Schiff from Congress for lying to the American people about the Trump-Russia hoax.
**EVERY CALIFORNIAN NEEDS TO UNDERSTAND THEY HAVE A CONSERVATIVE OPTION WHO WILL NOT DISGRACE OUR STATE LIKE SCHIFF HAS DONE!**
| [LET’S GET THE WORD OUT TO EVERY CALIFORNIAN!](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d59eef8ed8&e=84ee529f47)
---
This is where you come in. As a truly grassroots powered campaign, we’re not accepting a dime from sleazy PACs and we won’t be taking money from federal lobbyists.
My campaign is funded entirely by folks like you and I want to keep it that way.
Donating EARLY will allow your dollars to help my campaign ensure we get the best rates and time slots to run TV ads, which show voters voters why I am the warrior that we need in Washington.
I can win this race. I am going to win this race. Will you make history with me?
| [DONATE $5.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d13929f7d2&e=84ee529f47)

subject: FBI, GOODBYE 👋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Months ago, I called to shut down the FBI. The Durham report only reinvigorates my proposal.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=f8fbbe6704644b18acfb177fdea74636&_t=fbtXnwT-iJR04L-Sponk-oyShZMhUBCasu0Ky7wrjLfA0MFjRHfmFe4l9LACzgV4X0O8w--e_v5sDpuwKhe8XXFjssZQ790_gNOqsxB3nNw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=f8fbbe6704644b18acfb177fdea74636&_t=fbtXnwT-iJR04L-Sponk-oyShZMhUBCasu0Ky7wrjLfA0MFjRHfmFe4l9LACzgV4X0O8w--e_v5sDpuwKhe8XXFjssZQ790_gNOqsxB3nNw%3D)

|
Peter -

On March 4, I announced I would shut down the FBI.

Now that the Durham Report is public, I am doubling down on what I said months ago...

IT'S TIME TO SHUT DOWN THE FBI

_**Agree?**_
| [** ADD YOUR NAME -> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f8fbbe6704644b18acfb177fdea74636&_e=otLMJcVYW3HCj_zl0yI8rBkFZOsuADo_mSZgiuIRGpadpMBza7urrmRfWw7NX0ughBhAATmFYzFsmBh69-UjlctunKBBzIcmVusGvmXwvhkwXzocywz-hUVOGv27fHfXzY3XI1HbBRlNu1OIvuYx1ybi8Z7etsOyAwYINeay8eJ_XcAEZDvNze9Z-b5VPBCAGzTWzaW-kmIsCbA5llOtATBIUTQKywkVqN4KJhPzi7fCLSpyGd4OdZKpAQtVlLZWaJL76BHKZYdFJ2EvsaQVAmWetRkvCUE3IgMS4Po3cWTjSrgPsH0DFSimHRI3MHLAO6Sqnn2U2jUrisuW7HzjdNQ9Gd56TFR1aiM9VbpHSpSh3ynAQzq2_Eqd9jnRQEMKDXWhioZAVCS9APUZ8GodMEkNCOGfaxUEgxm6xc62Pw_B_A7bQ266oLrtnrdDKehooXoUjiCb95kBmgppmjZvdupSznZidmNyaA0euWEv2nuHNM9uZAplM7XsCOYAEOE2yb-2JnWeyoIcxPVdpkRiTC6I6CA4PAbGx6Hkhf_nDMY%3D)
---

At CPAC, when I first brought up this idea, I was criticized for being "partisan." _Far from it._

The Durham Report is a scathing indictment of the FBI and my proposal to shut it down is pragmatic: just as local prosecutors don't require a separate investigative agency to work with local police, neither should the DOJ require an FBI to work with U.S. Marshals.

Bureaucracy is a formula for corruption. **[It's time to end the weaponization of police power in America once and for all.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f8fbbe6704644b18acfb177fdea74636&_e=otLMJcVYW3HCj_zl0yI8rBkFZOsuADo_mSZgiuIRGpadpMBza7urrmRfWw7NX0ughBhAATmFYzFsmBh69-UjlctunKBBzIcmVusGvmXwvhkwXzocywz-hUVOGv27fHfXzY3XI1HbBRlNu1OIvuYx1ybi8Z7etsOyAwYINeay8eJ_XcAEZDvNze9Z-b5VPBCAGzTWzaW-kmIsCbA5llOtATBIUTQKywkVqN4KJhPzi7fCLSpyGd4OdZKpAQtVlLZWaJL76BHKZYdFJ2EvsaQVAmWetRkvCUE3IgMS4Po3cWTjSrgPsH0DFSimHRI3MHLAO6Sqnn2U2jUrisuW7HzjdNQ9Gd56TFR1aiM9VbpHSpSh3ynAQzq2_Eqd9jnRQEMKDXWhioZAVCS9APUZ8GodMOuDulNdooVVnHA9XhbS8zU0e0E2hG1EImExFratP5VPc3bkfkJ6nbQyDAGIaLbPWbt_ees96EBJW1uj96wYSVLtFhZCkHJdQ1UCsRyhBJaxhka7ZzABudKxvGv6fcaCZzWubDTDwaLC8acAgu-PQcU%3D)**

Peter, I need to know if you're with me as we fundamentally disrupt Washington. We've got to unite together to show the swamp that we will not ideally sit by and allow for corruption to continue in DC.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Months ago, I called to shut down the FBI. The Durham report only reinvigorates my proposal. | | Peter - On March 4, I announced I would shut down the FBI. Now that the Durham Report is public, I am doubling down on what I said months ago... IT'S TIME TO SHUT DOWN THE FBI Agree? | At CPAC, when I first brought up this idea, I was criticized for being "partisan." Far from it. The Durham Report is a scathing indictment of the FBI and my proposal to shut it down is pragmatic: just as local prosecutors don't require a separate investigative agency to work with local police, neither should the DOJ require an FBI to work with U.S. Marshals. Bureaucracy is a formula for corruption. Peter, I need to know if you're with me as we fundamentally disrupt Washington. Peter – Yesterday’s hearing on the legality of mifepristone was a stark reminder of just how fragile our rights are in this country. Access to this most common form of abortion care can be stripped away by our legal system on any given day. And if it’s not by some right-wing judges, major pharmacies can control our access — as shown by Walgreens wavering on filling prescriptions for the drug in recent months. We should not have to fight so hard for our basic human rights — but since that’s the reality we live in in a post-_Roe_ world, we’ve created the Rapid Response Mifepristone Fund. This is an emergency fund that will help us respond to whatever decision the courts hand down. [_**We don’t know when it’s coming, but when it does, we’ll be ready. | | So far this year, over 380 voter suppression bills have been introduced or enacted across the country. **380.** To be honest, if we listed them all in this email, most email providers would cut the email short because it’s so long. **So below, we created an animation that visualizes all of these tracked bills for you.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63487620/406965884/1653735237?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230418_f_suppressionstats2_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTViZjkzZC1iZWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFIe8CQ_ljDZpAiSuq4Mg5Fm-W5MWzsH2JIWPcCmXYE=) The good news is that Fair Fight Action knows how to combat and mitigate the anti-voter legislation, disinformation, and court rulings that confuse, suppress, and depress voters. **One way you can help us fight back is with a donation to this email.** The small-dollar contributions we receive help us continue to track and challenge anti-voting groups and their legislation. If they won’t rest, neither will we — but we need your support to do this work. [_**So, will you please chip in $20 right away to fuel Fair Fight Action’s efforts to help every eligible voter make their voice heard — no matter how many bills try to stop them? clean_body: If they won’t rest, neither will we. | | | So far this year, over 380 voter suppression bills have been introduced or enacted across the country. 380. To be honest, if we listed them all in this email, most email providers would cut the email short because it’s so long. So below, we created an animation that visualizes all of these tracked bills for you. = The good news is that Fair Fight Action knows how to combat and mitigate the anti-voter legislation, disinformation, and court rulings that confuse, suppress, and depress voters. One way you can help us fight back is with a donation to this email. The small-dollar contributions we receive help us continue to track and challenge anti-voting groups and their legislation. If they won’t rest, neither will we — but we need your support to do this work. = | = Let’s make 2023 the year of voter protection — not suppression. name: Working Families Party
subject: Tell President Biden to use his constitutional authority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This is about more than an election. | | | Peter, Ever since they took control of the House in January, Republicans have been threatening to force the United States to default on its debt and set off an economic catastrophe. And with every day that goes by, their threat becomes more and more real. The latest information from the Treasury Department is that the “X-date,” the date on which the federal government could default on its debt, could come as early as June 1st — **just 14 days from today.** **Kevin McCarthy and the MAGA majority in Congress have made their position clear: Either the Biden administration agrees to their demands that include massive cuts and work requirements for those who rely on Medicaid and other federal programs, or they’ll blow up the entire economy.** Either way, Republicans would achieve their political goal of causing pain for working families and hoping voters blame Democrats for it in 2024. President Biden has said over and over that the only acceptable “deal” with Republicans is a clean debt ceiling increase that avoids default. We agree. **[That’s why we’re joining Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, members of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and more in calling on President Biden to reject Republican demands — and to use his clear constitutional authority under the 14th amendment of the Constitution to ensure that they cannot force the United States to default on its obligations for the first time in history. If you agree, co-sign our petition here:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ4hBOhRoKsHGyS29kY6YXzj7t6IHlUPjc4vbvzD_Fck2FGpvtsUAg-zPzsSMt3uSVMQ3C33WwUVeBaq0AK9afYusxjXLwfu28-p8agMLbETttNDbMIlTPR1iBI43WcRXFrAiI6OvagpMvdHF8QEznefZp_rWx75xL1FfFzC2j3GJZd8tpSMWZl3Crm8oT4e-Wnp973cctIks01FXDuNA73guEZb6E6QZ1oXyr2cxUJgfdlDi8PYFoYqZs6ZWybTOHZIqa_u3YwxHqDQiR86UR1X_RNLt7GMSJ_hcJ1FlIu670zOHmIP_eep3LKWYxwTfnS_8TFIVqwj3hiU91fLETSuBkIBcHzws9PNpbhMpQeUnZsbKC85md12bT2UQtyeeuE/3wa/vsfhnFFkQ7GT4uCzQgubsw/h0/avhgA5mbfGIIhn0dIXD6vetdnMxY9wHPBh1X0qfN9SQ)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ4hBOhRoKsHGyS29kY6YXzj7t6IHlUPjc4vbvzD_Fck2FGpvtsUAg-zPzsSMt3uSVMQ3C33WwUVeBaq0AK9afYusxjXLwfu28-p8agMLbETttNDbMIlTPR1iBI43WcRXFrAiI6OvagpMvdHF8QEznefajShSmGP-pklPuLDGEWJEB82utq65ahs7abcHnxpgHJWmXrG8IfPS8izrCyBYAsfpU0kICxNpLSRRfWQYylyXs5-bXdhMo_CRTq4l2Ty8LGLbhzB1Ib1WB1AuiP2Tksp96ojjupu9NPX_zf_eByZM2IiTQnilrvM305RMofxgep0JkjrPKigw1miU_eDWk-BX9I8GHizw7fY1OSMWW2_ld3WtdwgfzeV48vW-jnUwH8/3wa/vsfhnFFkQ7GT4uCzQgubsw/h1/rCTjn4wFJGnKm2ME_T-VA4_OFc902ILSabVeJDLlat8)** A Republican-caused default would cause immediate and disastrous damage, including surging interest rates for credit cards, car loans and mortgages, and even the suspension of Social Security payments. The unpopular cuts Republicans are demanding as their ransom — which would never otherwise pass both houses of Congress — would also cause needless harm to working families everywhere. **That’s why WFP champions including Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders just signed a letter urging the Biden administration to be prepared to exercise their authority under the 14th amendment of the Constitution in a letter to the White House:**
> "We write to urgently request that you prepare to exercise your authority under the 14th Amendment of the Constitution, which clearly states: 'the validity of the public debt of the United States...shall not be questioned. subject: LEAKED MEMO: Biden 2024 Intel…

[**May 18, 1863:** The Battle of Vicksburg during the American Civil War was a turning point due to the major significance of control of the Mississippi River. When the Union Army eventually won the battle on July 4, 1863, the South was cleaved in half with Union control of the Mississippi River. The Confederate Army then faced great difficulty in moving troops and supplies.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a23d60ebb3704df19c6252a536d583c6&_e=AJHUSmZKn83MjpoQic2HkFzivN_F9DQGwmFtpFQYLMHsthpRc1qHYxNWaCyUGAtPMPBR95nH0xdaImnmDjkY5B2csYbWILGVcxt_Y8jMJ58g0tThyQ1E423xAlDIeRyiXT1890RoofeRkknexZ5uekUnEtcznBzP8OWmWD5FmkA8GHXMgY5zqYOl-OAkIq29tMqmOnxxbx-13HJ8L7ko4IJU7tJPacEDFkd-aC68tkv-2YNnJRvxtkJ1c7OKTvEG) **Source -[battlefields.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a23d60ebb3704df19c6252a536d583c6&_e=AJHUSmZKn83MjpoQic2HkFzivN_F9DQGwmFtpFQYLMHsthpRc1qHYxNWaCyUGAtPMPBR95nH0xdaImnmDjkY5B2csYbWILGVcxt_Y8jMJ58YytEocKc23JiNfm2Rtz_P7p2urUfLOuHvJGZL2VsSCcdA2GeeeIlyWeX3FtzOwG6Hs-jza7DxqdjPu2j3iZB8avIByZn11d2jw2e7KwRYQWoBcut0TJ7KLJBz5hyW3GOIZiykHgI3HJJoeut60gTW)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a23d60ebb3704df19c6252a536d583c6&_e=AJHUSmZKn83MjpoQic2HkEtoiC_NBo8iTrAhMJA44VrNrSQ4kAYHstOiMVUrcxJUlql6CMET0e4eDn-RHZDqIhVgDgXOmYaa8-LVNo2RDMb4icPU9mkMeyyWvYfePOCT_bRXfdu4I1dFiByoukWMh-5aQCSVPsDMkm06Y1P_C911TLhkCOxU9ed92kAF5KNv05uca9_vgTOLiqCVlTCiU4fDyXIOaS-f7ektEdb4c5el6XXybN234_lSzXNCo3Ie)**

[**May 18, 1980:** The most destructive volcanic eruption in the history of the United States occurred when Mount St. Helens in Washington State erupted. The massive eruption killed 57 people, destroyed 210 square miles of wilderness, and felled 10 million trees. The size of the eruption led to its catastrophic impact; the lateral blast extended 12 miles, the eruption cloud went 12 miles into the sky, and the avalanche that ensued surged at a speed of 100 miles per hour.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a23d60ebb3704df19c6252a536d583c6&_e=AJHUSmZKn83MjpoQic2HkL9pRz0RFYx87_HlvPW2bDoTXSFlcXA_rDgmW1KB9YwMSgMGTuGCU9DduZXop1nOiwA6OsyGMqgc76XaKdZn9iK2Fzaq5fPZG1Etnluk2frJPn5_eePMzZQKtTCUPjzmWa0clqNmfxg1C2VlcM4y1xkq1UTH6pkJNJ0L8JhbUfIQf4oa8uzxj1q3GlzqQysgIKxpMgSpMfnciN9wqmshajIduGaybUIEmrspUsoSIL9z) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a23d60ebb3704df19c6252a536d583c6&_e=AJHUSmZKn83MjpoQic2HkL9pRz0RFYx87_HlvPW2bDoTXSFlcXA_rDgmW1KB9YwMSgMGTuGCU9DduZXop1nOiwA6OsyGMqgc76XaKdZn9iIa9BUaU1yEVw71IC_6mnIjZPVkMy0O0n1PQx8uLT91gewxfHmS3gvKHweQrI90efWXZnQCWDAp87pZ2gxHNg-QXiIE7Wuo-TnrYoSeDEwM0xPehYZ8nsLHIVPYfk-HZvFIzgkjiJ_4TZCoJHbwtfUC)**

[**May 18, 2004:** Randy Johnson, at age 40, became the oldest MLB pitcher to throw a perfect game. Pitching for the Arizona Diamondbacks, his perfect game resulted in a 2-0 victory over the Atlanta Braves. This game was also the Diamondbacks' first-ever no-hitter.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a23d60ebb3704df19c6252a536d583c6&_e=AJHUSmZKn83MjpoQic2HkJ5geQyw1_JZXJ3Nnswt6PhtCtlOAfN-Qy_8zsll0rLqF8mqCdu7-bDizjm7aEO60ezmEsbZnhNGy8gpPNqP4Ehezlj3guE3YpV3QlJNIMEP1gCITH_UG241mvsY0tZmT4s0ARZuroVp3UABEbxcsSXIFIcBTrYid4kX1tDVgFdajn0V89UTrsrZxdm6dSGnSWSkwMX3ZPGIgSHQdkHWfrk6pBaXeBgkYDUINs-iy_ya) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a23d60ebb3704df19c6252a536d583c6&_e=AJHUSmZKn83MjpoQic2HkJ5geQyw1_JZXJ3Nnswt6PhtCtlOAfN-Qy_8zsll0rLqF8mqCdu7-bDizjm7aEO60ezmEsbZnhNGy8gpPNqP4EgGZJVKAAbH_AcK5bAmdVhHWnSSQEQb1DO72mA8rBgq5LNTmKd6Nj6pye2klUmpbqeud_fKGwibqJCsZt7NtONq5oMlUzxXFEQODXee9b6El6lfSS8kPJXKlHjIhZhlVDYGEuF6MSf_wucMgu3p-6S5)**

clean_body: What else could I be framed for? | | Friend, Now that it’s been officially revealed that I was FRAMED as a Russian agent in order to SABOTAGE our presidency, we have to ask ourselves an important question... ... What else could I be framed for? What other lies will they spread about me to destroy our movement? That’s why every patriot in the country should be DEEPLY CONCERNED by all of the many reports about the never-ending WITCH HUNTS against me: “Special counsel is locked in at least 8 secret court battles in Trump investigations” [Source: CNN] We are living through a dark time in our country when “secret court battles” can decide the fate of America’s elections. The Left will continue to throw witch hunt after witch hunt at us to try and break our movement. But with your support, we will prevail in 2024 and SAVE America before it becomes a Marxist Third World country that criminalizes dissent and imprisons its opposition. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Mon, May 15, 2023 Subject: THIS WAS A COUP To: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com]> | Friend, The TRUTH is finally coming out. Special Counsel John Durham’s report confirms THE INTELLIGENCE COMMUNITY NEVER HAD ANY ACTUAL EVIDENCE THAT I WAS A RUSSIAN AGENT. The Deep State deliberately FRAMED ME as a Russian traitor in an attempt to destroy our campaign and then sabotage our presidency. For 3 years – 24 hours a day, 7 days a week – the American public was fed LIE after LIE that their sitting president was a traitor. This was a SILENT COUP against a duly elected president. The Deep State HATED the idea of a political outsider leading the White House. They knew they could never control me or bully me into submission. So, they tried to frame me as a Russian agent – despite having ZERO EVIDENCE – in an attempt to destroy me and stop the one movement that puts YOU first. As I’ve always said, they’re not really after me. They’re after YOU, I’m just standing in their way. And you better believe that I will keep standing in their way, because I will NEVER, EVER SURRENDER the greatest country in history. 2024 is our final chance to save our Republic. Either we destroy the Deep State, or the Deep State will destroy America. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: BREAKING: McCarthy’s attacks on Adam are all over right-wing news - we HAVE to respond
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2250%2E5257348%2E6njFtd ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Kevin McCarthy is attacking Adam across the MAGA universe
as he makes the rounds in the far-right media.

First, it was live on Fox News. Then he went on Fox Business to repeat the
same bogus attacks — that Republicans may seek to expel Adam from
Congress, after a Trump administration special prosecutor failed to prove
any of Trump’s deep state conspiracy theories. Undaunted by the Fox
network’s more than $750 million dollar penalty for lying, here is one Fox

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: There are 120 guns for every 100 Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
What is more important, their incorrect interpretation of the 2nd Amendment or our lives? Hint: this is a rhetorical question.
#
Peter,
There are 120 guns for every 100 Americans — the highest rate of ANY country in the world. **So if more guns are supposed to make us safer, why haven't they already?**
While Republicans claim that gender affirming care, African American history, and childrens' books are stripping our country of its safety and security — our nation is at war with assault weapons and we're losing more and more innocent lives every day.
Peter, we need to put all the pressure on those with the power to finally ban assault weapons and fix our failing gun laws. But the only way we'll be able to do that is by supporting leaders in Congress who are dedicated to fighting for our communities' safety. **And we know Pramila is that leader.**
[**Can you support Pramila as she fights to change our pervasive culture of violence and ban assault weapons once and for all? We'll need as many supporters as possible on our side if we want to make the biggest impact in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42057?refcode=em20230518-2499&t=1&akid=2499%2E420207%2EGVmztl)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42057?refcode=em20230518-2499&t=2&akid=2499%2E420207%2EGVmztl)**
Children should not be terrified of going to school. Families should not be terrified of going to the mall. Churches should be safe havens, not shooting ranges. And yet time and time again, Republicans in Congress downplay the severity of the culture of violence and gun obsession in our country.
It begs the question: What is more important, their incorrect interpretation of the 2nd Amendment or our lives? _Hint: this is a rhetorical question._ **The catch is:** we currently have the tools to find a solution to this crisis, but Republicans are hellbent on keeping our country in the gridlock of inaction.
Enough is enough. Pramila is determined to shake the status quo and finally bring an end to the nightmare created by a lack of gun control laws.
**From banning assault weapons to strengthening our mental health resources, there's so much work that needs to be done — but we have a vision for change and Pramila won't rest until it's our new reality.**[**Chip in today to support Pramila and our collective movement to ban assault weapons and finally make our country safer, more secure, and stronger together.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42057?refcode=em20230518-2499&t=3&akid=2499%2E420207%2EGVmztl)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42057?refcode=em20230518-2499&t=22&akid=2499%2E420207%2EGVmztl)**
Together,
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230518-2499-footer&t=23&refcode2=2499_420207_GVmztl&akid=2499%2E420207%2EGVmztl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2499%2E420207%2EGVmztl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2499%2E420207%2EGVmztl)

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18959?t=1001&akid=3247%2E346206%2EHyyx3q ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230518-3247-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3247_346206_Hyyx3q&akid=3247%2E346206%2EHyyx3q

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3247%2E346206%2EHyyx3q

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A partisan farce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63491942/406974108/253275352?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiNjUzYy1jNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEzrUQ6GRN_RIaqcZ4h7ou3Kya69ObHifkk42LPjYXI=)
Friend, the Trump administration’s hand-picked special prosecutor just released a report that failed to find the deep state conspiracy theory Trump promised. Instead, Durham’s effort to discredit the FBI resulted in two failed prosecutions, and brought no new meaningful insight to an inquiry performed by the DOJ’s inspector general years earlier. No one could be more disappointed than Trump and his chief enabler, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. So it’s no surprise that McCarthy chose to deflect questions about whether George Santos should resign while facing 13 felony charges — _**and instead suggested live on Fox News that the GOP should remove me from Congress entirely. All because Durham’s investigation was a bust.**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63491943/406974109/1245148629?refcode=E21501-20230518-SchiffExpulsionThreat-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiNjUzYy1jNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEzrUQ6GRN_RIaqcZ4h7ou3Kya69ObHifkk42LPjYXI=) _“It really raises the question about Adam Schiff...What he put America through, and openly lied to us? And now it’s proven in this as well? It raises a lot of questions about his, just his character, his standing inside of Congress, and**whether he should even be in Congress.** "_ — GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress. McCarthy’s constituents in California lack clean air and clean water, and lack access to broadband, and have hospitals closing down — but he can’t be bothered to do anything about it. He’s too busy trying to please the extreme MAGA crowd. Well, if Kevin McCarthy won’t represent his constituents in the House, I will represent them in the Senate. **[Friend, we HAVE to respond to this latest attack. Split an urgent donation to Eric Swalwell and our campaign to send a message to McCarthy loud and clear — we’re not going _anywhere_ >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63491944/406974111/1245148629?refcode=E21501-20230518-SchiffExpulsionThreat-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGFiNjUzYy1jNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEzrUQ6GRN_RIaqcZ4h7ou3Kya69ObHifkk42LPjYXI=)** | **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: The EPA may still approve toxic neonic pesticides for another 15 years
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1779128?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **“AN INSECT APOCALYPSE.”** **“A SECOND SILENT SPRING.”** **“A CATASTROPHIC COLLAPSE OF NATURE’S ECOSYSTEMS.”** This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects. A key driver? **Neonicotinoid pesticides** \-- which can impact bees’ ability to navigate and reproduce and _**even kill bees on contact.**_ But they’re also the MOST WIDELY USED INSECTICIDES in agriculture. _Neonics can directly hurt PEOPLE, too._ They are found on the very food you eat and cannot be washed off. They have been linked to health impacts like **birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and autism.** The Environmental Protection Agency has a chance to BAN neonics once and for all. Instead, it might **_approve these pesticides for another 15 years._** **[With World Bee Day in just TWO days, it’s time to raise your voice for the bees: Friend, sign your name now and DEMAND the EPA ban toxic neonics before 11:59pm TONIGHT!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1779129?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1779130?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know you have bees and other pollinators to thank for 1 in every 3 bites of food you eat? That’s right -- _TENS OF THOUSANDS_ of plant species depend on pollinators for their survival -- which means _**those plants also depend on YOU**_ to help protect bees and other pollinators! **This World Bee Day, it’s time to give back to the bees.**
Big Ag continues to DOWNPLAY the effects of TOXIC neonics on pollinators, people, and the planet. This RECKLESS pursuit of profit is **driving many wild bees and other pollinators toward EXTINCTION.** The EPA could step up and ban these toxic pesticides -- but we need YOUR help to push it to act. **[Please, Friend, will you do right by the bees this World Bee Day and tell the EPA to prioritize pollinator health?>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1779131?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1779130?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for standing with our pollinators,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: CaucusRoom
subject: They Wear a Badge of Shame
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-alydryk-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-j/) **Badge of Shame** Two members of the progressive House "Squad"**[faced fierce criticism for being the only Democrats to vote against a resolution that memorialized police officers killed in the line of duty](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-t/) **and expressed condolences to their loved ones. **Stand Up for Women** The University of Wyoming women [**suing their sorority for its role in admitting a transgender member** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-i/)are speaking out in national media, saying they want to fight for women's rights and women's spaces. **Money Talks** The White House has released financial disclosures for Biden and Kamala for 2022, and **[you won't believe how many bank accounts Joe has](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-d/)**.

**Poster Child for Term Limits** Senator Feinstein, who recently returned to the Capitol after a few months in the hospital, **[doesn't know she was gone](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-h/) **and thinks she's been working this whole time. **KJP on the Run**
## Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre is **[accused of 'fleeing her podium' after abruptly ending the briefing](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-k/)** following question about FBI's baseless Trump Russia probe - which SHE supported.
**The Durham Report** You can read the full Durham report **[here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-u/)**. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* If **[you could](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* **[What?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-m/)**
* A**[blank space](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-c/).**
* How to tell someone**[they are stupid.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alydryk-trhiujldw-q/)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: Chairman Jim Jordan is coming to East Texas!
body:
You're invited to join special guest, Chairman Jim Jordan, for a Taste of East Texas reception honoring Congressman Nathaniel Moran. |
---
| |
---
| | Please join us for this special reception on**Friday, June 2** , **6 p.m.** at the W.T. Brookshire Conference Center, 2000 W. Front St., Tyler, TX 75702. **Our esteemed special guest** for the evening will be none other than **Chairman Jim Jordan** , a stalwart champion of conservative principles and the Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee. Chairman Jordan's unwavering commitment to upholding the Constitution, protecting our freedoms, and fighting for the American people is truly inspiring.

Peter,

Serving as a member of Congress is an incredible honor. This is supposed to be the seat of democracy and an example for the rest of the world.

**That’s why it’s infuriating to see someone like George Santos walk these halls.**

After being exposed as a serial liar and con artist, Santos has been indicted on 13 felony counts—including fraud, money laundering, theft of public funds, and lying to federal authorities. He has fabricated nearly every aspect of his life.

**Even worse, Speaker Kevin McCarthy has turned a blind eye to Santos’s blatant lies.** Why? Because without Santos’ vote, the extremists in the House could not easily move forward much of their agenda in our closely divided chamber.

George Santos is a walking ethics disaster. **He must be expelled from office and held accountable under law.** I have co-sponsored a bill to do exactly this.

**[If you agree that Santos should not be in Congress, chip in $10 or $20 to help us protect the integrity of Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63492427/406975400/-541985789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhkYmYwMS1jN2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HolRXWz9hw-cO3xHj26isII-YzFjfxVd-6VM7vHA0E4=)** The people of New York’s 3rd District deserve better. name: John James
subject: service before self
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
This means something different to folks, but here’s what it means to me. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_t=dFAGBoLSsKBpKOUJiEcax406U4dvU4659Lt3Oeh-D-vMb3ekiwVx4AXUL9dK2DsHQ_eRHGlrjRCUChBG2dchBQgaaIAENEb5IidifubLnnU%3D)_.
---
Peter, Joe Biden’s botched withdrawal from Afghanistan is having _major_ consequences on the national security front.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_e=yFPdQTcgAwF_MetzfhMEoxHkwgKQIaqTErj6zta4OMMzA47142E7Xiz1FX5xGEXTzmJkJ-uwfJ80WYXGxbgFv7tzNpMGWvCDQHb-SSYBB33Ca-xNGV6Oy_djRXSL576nMAQ11fGGPAlbF2DabHGU2Yfo7CBoMohYEdeRZH2V-jbKJ7YRlGiRmsXiALuBER1qDOCx7HgUnxl0gGf72KcjYcJ1DilpbEKrgSpOva12yywll-vSPVAhyKgwP69tOZuiml7j-4brlHUOcbS_YCp7MzKrGUjEwrOUsgJU7N7p5IUzmJdPPueGe6O-odPDfukA3FF07Oz_bbzu083i1utyPFXczNLkeT692Y09kvF3-3nF7k_Rx2mLAKF40jqPWFmO)
---
| | The millions of dollars worth of weapons and equipment we left behind on the ground are now being used against the very allies we turned our backs on. Peter, we’re likely arming the very terrorist organization we’re supposed to be defeating. **This isn’t just wrong.****_It’s_** _**_unAmerican._**__ _
---
[**HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_e=yFPdQTcgAwF_MetzfhMEoxHkwgKQIaqTErj6zta4OMMzA47142E7Xiz1FX5xGEXTzmJkJ-uwfJ80WYXGxbgFv7tzNpMGWvCDQHb-SSYBB33Ca-xNGV6Oy_djRXSL576nMAQ11fGGPAlbF2DabHGU2Yfo7CBoMohYEdeRZH2V-jbKJ7YRlGiRmsXiALuBER1qDOCx7HgUnxl0gGf72KcjYcJ1DilpbEKrgSpOva12yywEx_K2c21Rh-uNfBy6ujgzaMvbh4P7LLSzyvSGnlHv1gO2LLKRIB5roprb-iu2YwfS9KtjpVsXNkp7EdIvmUJOtIVmeUS_Is0fv_hHQdwNHZWGAQa-JHnql-VXkT7t4iDAzwXlq7Wf1Y_8EmTnGH5I)
---
| | I look at this failure and can’t help but feel frustrated for the tens of thousands of my fellow veterans that sacrificed so much in the Middle East. We didn’t do it for honor or glory. _We did it because we love this nation._
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_e=yFPdQTcgAwF_MetzfhMEoxHkwgKQIaqTErj6zta4OMMzA47142E7Xiz1FX5xGEXTzmJkJ-uwfJ80WYXGxbgFv7tzNpMGWvCDQHb-SSYBB33Ca-xNGV6Oy_djRXSL576nMAQ11fGGPAlbF2DabHGU2Yfo7CBoMohYEdeRZH2V-jbKJ7YRlGiRmsXiALuBER1qDOCx7HgUnxl0gGf72KcjYcJ1DilpbEKrgSpOva12yywLYdHLdq3C7LwUJuYG5-hjS96ipt61iYFaeM9-wA2Qqd6vk9oxdCS2F2Qbycb4V8nI31NYDzMNNEEt3RnV2ZHxlY26_1F3hDuS3l0nvZBf5ekrgh2loLnl_Wk2avQkXzo1Mx-OGLenP1H8U0kRKlGi)
---
Peter, I've always been guided by these core principles: faith in God and country, a strong united family, and service before self. And that’s what American leadership is lacking these days. We have a lot of people in government who talk a good game about helping the American people, but only career politicians are getting things done – and it’s at the expense of everyday families. **_But real leaders can do both. _** Leadership is more than just listening to people’s concerns. It’s putting someone else’s needs before your own and not accepting failure as an option. Washington needs leaders who can restore faith in the American system, be a champion for American families, and serve and fulfill the interests of the American public. **And I know I’m accomplishing that goal when the DCCC took notice and named me as one of their TOP 2024 targets. **
---
[**PROVIDE CRITICAL AIR SUPPORT >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_e=yFPdQTcgAwF_MetzfhMEoxHkwgKQIaqTErj6zta4OMMzA47142E7Xiz1FX5xGEXTzmJkJ-uwfJ80WYXGxbgFv7tzNpMGWvCDQHb-SSYBB33Ca-xNGV6Oy_djRXSL576nMAQ11fGGPAlbF2DabHGU2Yfo7CBoMohYEdeRZH2V-jbKJ7YRlGiRmsXiALuBER1qDOCx7HgUnxl0gGf72KcjYcJ1DilpbEKrgSpOva12yywxdxeny0jPjHPI3_sQrzTbD2A6hgMaSxxYqFnjz_c6om9R7yYkI5BL84H7Y1beeCAXAX-v6H5Ee98a23cEqXVNad4x_kTQlXmTHfpi1QUNx-0HMsTrOXBp3IPZxJ70j9l9FFjQ1ZMf9hjb6uoJm_XL)
---
| | Let me tell you a bit about me and how I got to where I am today. My mission began as a cadet at West Point. I attended Ranger school and flight school and was deployed to Iraq to serve in Operation Iraqi Freedom. I led two Apache platoons, flying more than 750 combat hours in an Apache Attack Helicopter, and learned first-hand what it takes to defend the American Dream. I learned that protecting our country and our ideals takes incredible sacrifice and that we can never grow complacent in our mission.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_e=yFPdQTcgAwF_MetzfhMEoxHkwgKQIaqTErj6zta4OMMzA47142E7Xiz1FX5xGEXTzmJkJ-uwfJ80WYXGxbgFv7tzNpMGWvCDQHb-SSYBB33Ca-xNGV6Oy_djRXSL576nMAQ11fGGPAlbF2DabHGU2Yfo7CBoMohYEdeRZH2V-jbKJ7YRlGiRmsXiALuBER1qDOCx7HgUnxl0gGf72KcjYcJ1DilpbEKrgSpOva12yyw-U1q_V3XYE8jRooGJofgfrXmmmSeNL_8KArkyna5jnz7pGYxa6kbbOdFww9jzx9grf3HHhiKPLa0-t71_b_y4m-59UogXqnsDg9-xkD5VT_oN1dcx_8IzCZ0GXvYV1wyx1VuExjWuJpskyubDPfqR)
---
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_e=yFPdQTcgAwF_MetzfhMEoxHkwgKQIaqTErj6zta4OMMzA47142E7Xiz1FX5xGEXTzmJkJ-uwfJ80WYXGxbgFv7tzNpMGWvCDQHb-SSYBB33Ca-xNGV6Oy_djRXSL576nMAQ11fGGPAlbF2DabHGU2Yfo7CBoMohYEdeRZH2V-jbKJ7YRlGiRmsXiALuBER1qDOCx7HgUnxl0gGf72KcjYcJ1DilpbEKrgSpOva12yyx6RsRzgI1aHc3-jFHFaGkXkFOhHH93daDDVuXsvvpsFZfDIlKkdWgnDcAtweYTWjPNeA0S3XwDe6qYT_ftyTUXG1fl0WE-VBtPPRD0i5Al7lTokHYIO2sjQSloe1CL9BVML29sno_4mwekdUsaWPMJ)
---
| | After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me. I never wanted to be a politician, but maybe that’s exactly what we need in Washingtonーmore combat veterans in Congress who have experience leading and truly know what it means to serve. Peter, I’m committed to putting God, faith, and service before self – and I know I’ve been staying true to that mission when the DCCC has me has one of their TOP 2024 targets. _**_[I’m reaching out to you with a humble request to become a Co-Pilot today and provide critical air support so we can combat the Democrats' war chest.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcee13b3fcfe4e01aaaa5044f6bc4849&_e=yFPdQTcgAwF_MetzfhMEoxHkwgKQIaqTErj6zta4OMMzA47142E7Xiz1FX5xGEXTzmJkJ-uwfJ80WYXGxbgFv7tzNpMGWvCDQHb-SSYBB33Ca-xNGV6Oy_djRXSL576nMAQ11fGGPAlbF2DabHGU2Yfo7CBoMohYEdeRZH2V-jbKJ7YRlGiRmsXiALuBER1qDOCx7HgUnxl0gGf72KcjYcJ1DilpbEKrgSpOva12yyzfmdlCSDAk4IR3x8UzC5hA6HzcFFbwx3zwzgUpv7rcKyMpbGeQ6kGOmlMdks6n4zaECVzhGlEmVwxGFJH4QbwoMAzHo_M0kQKlzbWgAkrKdoQx6xMlKwl-Q8ks56N2dvcYgPXketK6r3VBKxsslxGs)_**_

clean_body: This means something different to folks, but here’s what it means to me. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this . Peter, Joe Biden’s botched withdrawal from Afghanistan is having major consequences on the national security front. | | The millions of dollars worth of weapons and equipment we left behind on the ground are now being used against the very allies we turned our backs on. Peter, we’re likely arming the very terrorist organization we’re supposed to be defeating. This isn’t just wrong.It’s unAmerican. | | I look at this failure and can’t help but feel frustrated for the tens of thousands of my fellow veterans that sacrificed so much in the Middle East. We didn’t do it for honor or glory. We did it because we love this nation. Peter, I've always been guided by these core principles: faith in God and country, a strong united family, and service before self. And that’s what American leadership is lacking these days. We have a lot of people in government who talk a good game about helping the American people, but only career politicians are getting things done – and it’s at the expense of everyday families. But real leaders can do both. Leadership is more than just listening to people’s concerns. It’s putting someone else’s needs before your own and not accepting failure as an option. Washington needs leaders who can restore faith in the American system, be a champion for American families, and serve and fulfill the interests of the American public. And I know I’m accomplishing that goal when the DCCC took notice and named me as one of their TOP 2024 targets. | | Let me tell you a bit about me and how I got to where I am today. My mission began as a cadet at West Point. I attended Ranger school and flight school and was deployed to Iraq to serve in Operation Iraqi Freedom. I led two Apache platoons, flying more than 750 combat hours in an Apache Attack Helicopter, and learned first-hand what it takes to defend the American Dream. I learned that protecting our country and our ideals takes incredible sacrifice and that we can never grow complacent in our mission. | | | After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me. I never wanted to be a politician, but maybe that’s exactly what we need in Washingtonーmore combat veterans in Congress who have experience leading and truly know what it means to serve. Peter, I’m committed to putting God, faith, and service before self – and I know I’ve been staying true to that mission when the DCCC has me has one of their TOP 2024 targets. Thank you, John James Congressman, MI-10 | . | | | | Paid for by John James for Michigan, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by John James for Congress, Inc., Mission First People Always, and the NRCC. | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

body:
National Police Week ends tomorrow| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=8959dda729ad4b5fae54c03bbde73354&_e=Gx7feiE3DJDVHIt4t20lVUtWD_arM1ot5Bw4LZ7J-cJ8zUBWYExdSAJbL1hOWLHLTS-ax5Zw3oHeDyt_ozw9p1Z7dq0HpKXj90H7hRw3dIAIkGGEkxKUmTqZEntpdyAt09KPebDhXBkt9W_OmNMGTrcbQCG7Utmd_hdYSedYp0wDu7wZ9ZXjx3WW2oQmsFZQHV2JZb5sZDkKI9jobcOwOOMjPKRNI-HFQe91Ub7zVMhY3f8niQbnTS0D7iF6Rl4NOJkmUcyfZFOf6KfJAXkvRg%3D%3D)

It's National Police Week, my friend. In Minnesota and cross the country, our brave law enforcement officers are under attack by misguided individuals who wish to "defund-the-police." I believe we should support our police, not undermine them. [_**My friend, will you please sign my petition to add more support for law enforcement to keep our communities safe?**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=8959dda729ad4b5fae54c03bbde73354&_e=Gx7feiE3DJDVHIt4t20lVUtWD_arM1ot5Bw4LZ7J-cJ8zUBWYExdSAJbL1hOWLHLTS-ax5Zw3oHeDyt_ozw9p1Z7dq0HpKXj90H7hRw3dIAIkGGEkxKUmTqZEntpdyAtdmXyh-QMOi32-5WvC5SlVmD0BfeYIGe2RH4__4G1G_MnsRrDFI3Ky549Uh6xCN34Wi2GSNoy0P1DjWBkFNQWnT9m6FYwyG97Bbu67Ynn8PXwVg69xHJMskBNZX1nzjFOawwYjo8wLF_Zc-xVzrHdng%3D%3D)

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: There's no place for these weapons of war in our communities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Parents shouldn't have to worry about guns in schools, and their children shouldn't fear for their lives. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63492710/406976289/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTJhN2Q1OS1jN2Y1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gC9jU-iZ8zdmR6LuvrTQz5XIGMIhWoIAE-lDcQm9IdA=&emci=1d2f51aa-9ef5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fa2a7d59-c7f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

From Yakima, Washington, to Allen, Texas, over 15,671 Americans have already lost their lives this year due to an act of gun violence – including 658 children.

**Enough is enough. Parents shouldn't have to worry about guns in schools, and their children shouldn't have to fear for their lives.**

As a mom, like many parents, I trust that my son will be safe when he goes to school. But we know that nowhere is really safe in a country that allows guns to get into the hands of people who would do others harm.

That's why I've been fighting to pass common sense measures to reduce gun violence in Congress.

Last year, I was proud to help pass the bipartisan Safer Communities Act to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks. But we still have more work ahead of us – and that includes banning assault weapons federally. A quarter of the guns sold in the US today are assault rifles. That is terrifying.

I voted for an Assault Weapons Ban last year because there's no place for these weapons of war in our communities. While this bill was held up in the Senate, we need to keep working to implement this common sense reform.

**[We need to take action to protect our communities from preventable gun violence. clean_body: Parents shouldn't have to worry about guns in schools, and their children shouldn't fear for their lives. Peter, From Yakima, Washington, to Allen, Texas, over 15,671 Americans have already lost their lives this year due to an act of gun violence – including 658 children. Enough is enough. Parents shouldn't have to worry about guns in schools, and their children shouldn't have to fear for their lives. As a mom, like many parents, I trust that my son will be safe when he goes to school. But we know that nowhere is really safe in a country that allows guns to get into the hands of people who would do others harm. That's why I've been fighting to pass common sense measures to reduce gun violence in Congress. Last year, I was proud to help pass the bipartisan Safer Communities Act to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks. But we still have more work ahead of us – and that includes banning assault weapons federally. A quarter of the guns sold in the US today are assault rifles. That is terrifying. I voted for an Assault Weapons Ban last year because there's no place for these weapons of war in our communities. While this bill was held up in the Senate, we need to keep working to implement this common sense reform. I am truly amazed. My team and I are working hard to lay the early groundwork and build a winning campaign, and the support has been monumental.

I have spent my time in Congress fighting for the people of the Heartland. Because of my advocacy for working people, economic security, and our environment, I now have a target on my back. But, over the past few months especially, I’ve been blown away by the outpouring of early support.

So far, 271 people have contributed this month to help us win this tough fight next year. We’re aiming to get another 150 donors on my team before the end of the month.

**[Republicans will stop at nothing to claw back this seat, but I still have a lot of fight left in me. I know that we can win this together. | Friend
A few brave whistleblowers from the inside have revealed that the F.B.I. not only investigated Catholic Americans and parents but also worked to cover up their tracks.
This is not only concerning to me as an elected leader serving on the Weaponization Committee but also as a citizen.
Religious liberty is one of our country's founding principles and a pillar that upholds our Republic. If one group is targeted, then the rights of ALL religious groups and organizations are threatened!
---
| If our federal agencies are allowed to go unchecked and be weaponized for personal or political agendas, what does that say about our elected officials? Our federal government and our responsibility as leaders to protect Americans from overreach and tyranny?

name: Jon Tester
subject: I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63493097/406977721/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230518-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTBjMGRiNS1jOGY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKRB9SR9r4IWFFhXfRf6mjqCU_CfGr5dH9MTccSJbqE=)
---
| Can I explain something, folks?

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.

In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**

Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.

I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.

The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.

**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.

[_That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 between Hillary Scholten and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63493098/406977722/1680738198?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230518-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTBjMGRiNS1jOGY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKRB9SR9r4IWFFhXfRf6mjqCU_CfGr5dH9MTccSJbqE=)**

clean_body: In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer. | = | Can I explain something, folks? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer. Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do. = | = | = Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course). — Jon * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Team Cori
subject: It's time for reparations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, in a long overdue effort to atone for the hundreds of years of racism, discrimination and violence facing Black Americans, **Cori introduced a bill calling for $14 trillion in reparations.**
[****](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230518.rGmtY3&refcode=em20230518-2717&t=1&akid=2717%2E1082990%2EbcptwQ)
This is just the latest in a long line of efforts in Congress to compensate Black Americans for centuries of injustice. _**We have a moral and legal obligation**_ to provide reparations for our communities, which continue to suffer from the vestiges of slavery and the racist policies that followed.
Today, we continue to see this racial inequity by way of the 'War on Drugs', racial wealth gap, voter suppression targeting the Black vote, infant and maternal mortality rates, negative health outcomes for Black people, police brutality and other forms of state-sanctioned violence.
Reparations are just one component in the wider push to ensure equlity for Black Americans. That's why Cori has taken the lead in advocating and organizing around criminal justice reform, a $15 minimum wage, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal and more.
[**These policies won't only just benefit Black Americans but will benefit us all. Will you stand with Cori today and pitch in to fuel our movement's efforts to ensure justice and equity for all?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230518.rGmtY3&refcode=em20230518-2717&t=2&akid=2717%2E1082990%2EbcptwQ)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230518.rGmtY3&refcode=em20230518-2717&t=3&akid=2717%2E1082990%2EbcptwQ)**
The treatment endured by Black people in the United States wouldn't happen in a just, fair, and equitable society. What we see today is **_directly caused_** by our country's role in the enslavement and exploitation of Black people throughout history.
In order to become the thriving democracy we often claim to be, **_now is the time**_ to begin the process of atoning for our dark past. We have the choice and opportunity to achieve real justice for our communities and throughout her career, Cori has been at the forefront of the wider movement for racial equality.
[**Can you chip in today to power our movement's work to guarantee our communities justice and equity?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230518.rGmtY3&refcode=em20230518-2717&t=4&akid=2717%2E1082990%2EbcptwQ)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230518.rGmtY3&refcode=em20230518-2717&t=23&akid=2717%2E1082990%2EbcptwQ)**
Thank you for taking the time to read. And as always, thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
— Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230518-2717-footer&t=24&refcode2=2717_1082990_bcptwQ&akid=2717%2E1082990%2EbcptwQ) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
