subject: There are dozens of insurrectionists in state legislatures. You can help defeat them.
body:
We’ve spent the last two years cleaning up Trump’s mess from the January 6th Capitol attack – but there are still dozens of insurrectionists in state legislatures nationwide. | | |
---
| | **Did you hear what Donald Trump said about the deadly January 6th insurrection during his _CNN_ town hall? ** 🚩 _“That was unbelievable and it was a beautiful day”_ 🚩 _“I am inclined to pardon many of them...and it will be very early on”_ 🚩 _“They were there with love in their heart”_ **We’ve spent the last two years cleaning up Trump’s mess from the Capitol attack – but there are still dozens of insurrectionists in state legislatures nationwide, and they _all_ pose a threat to democracy. ** We must defeat every last GOP insurrectionist, and electing state Democrats is essential to holding them accountable. clean_body: We’ve spent the last two years cleaning up Trump’s mess from the January 6th Capitol attack – but there are still dozens of insurrectionists in state legislatures nationwide. | | | | | Did you hear what Donald Trump said about the deadly January 6th insurrection during his CNN town hall? 🚩 “That was unbelievable and it was a beautiful day” 🚩 “I am inclined to pardon many of them...and it will be very early on” 🚩 “They were there with love in their heart” We’ve spent the last two years cleaning up Trump’s mess from the Capitol attack – but there are still dozens of insurrectionists in state legislatures nationwide, and they all pose a threat to democracy. We must defeat every last GOP insurrectionist, and electing state Democrats is essential to holding them accountable. But accomplishing this mission requires a constant flow of resources to prevent our candidates from getting drowned out. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Since the Capitol insurrection, Trump and his allies have doubled down on their MAGA extremism. Radical Republicans are hellbent on challenging election results, restricting access to abortion care, attacking voting rights, and so much more. We can’t leave their anti-democratic schemes unchecked – especially as Trump’s re-election campaign ramps up. We’re counting on our grassroots supporters to own a piece of this fight. The GOP’s threats continue growing in legislatures nationwide, and without supporters like you on this team, we won’t be able to hold these insurrectionists responsible. Together we can continue the work we started to protect our democracy, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14bc474e-1522-4924-871b-4168f35640fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

subject: These leaders will fight for women’s health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
|

| | Peter,

**This week is National Women’s Health Week – and right now, access to women’s health care is under attack on all sides.**

That’s why we’re supporting champions like **Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett** , a former public defender who has a record of fighting back against anti-choice policies in Texas, and **Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo** , a pediatrician who knows that private medical decisions should be made a woman and her doctor, not Republican politicians.

[In honor of Women’s Health Week, will you rush a donation to help us flip the House and elect a pro-choice Democratic majority?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd47KeBWkiuW0iKHujw8DlifnLkN7tohaIwPgbXvSzu_cnqXjHC_5xN-hpIEG5lb50qmMljw6wHuFvtHxwq3p4lSiW1QwP4f4fvk-pLiaPApZ3HRMcyP3XelWARrZ4WCAsf3v74tOFg88eLcp_S3Bc0kJC4rUoRr4IRH2MVyyoZRgn8-aj_svwhd3U1UJSDQwlzYK5fZ7UTEC7QIlQJy-GyZS0J-SXH7J7bpzxhGBrwr0fmK1d6aWDsHzUSU_jb_L1ImJG9aEzNaesCdCRCWN4EDfGYg8Hgt5muEg2ufxxun6zQ4TkXcg8jqpiH-KQJh1yTewkHrYZuuE2CGa4vzQswrAHt9lc5ulVdVa65aj-eQ/3wa/Jdg6CKTBR-6t9RpyG6VVRA/h0/Zf272gLG8iD0vPQ7nufoIYv058SfXbQtcAvFAo9KV1o) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd47KeBWkiuW0iKHujw8DlifnLkN7tohaIwPgbXvSzu_cnqXjHC_5xN-hpIEG5lb50qmMljw6wHuFvtHxwq3p4drkuJyts4WUutGKQYNt_XpP4o5SMKXRlPDAek21XSnTQOpfJXsAaugDmEMSYF_mCBNvSHZG5UNPhfDVDM-dF6tRVQIGRJc9Rdwn0Mtb5T1pD04Rqfiqa6_dVGjzO0TsQQ-LOY4p_esWZodQ2pA6TMf0lrtV716FUljsuw0lO2YZ8NiCBKcGZe-U9vg83qrQWxP7aQlq-QGqgB9RPDBFxzAsMkmSxEy4yh466L9KNZRSycNGCLRCPNBYn5m7hfke0SCpuvlBpDw3LCIylZ4rQiQ/3wa/Jdg6CKTBR-6t9RpyG6VVRA/h1/1rBhlG-T0ycSpZCd_XpvXYfM7iIwjks2UldL1IsAntQ) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd47KeBWkiuW0iKHujw8DlifnLkN7tohaIwPgbXvSzu_cnqXjHC_5xN-hpIEG5lb50qmMljw6wHuFvtHxwq3p45Py7grGoP90TfIKlUijU8wVsxI4Hvz_KgzfHr_OgpRET4ElGvYIKUU4GH-7btnOnrnU0cvHmk3vbm1DKiHGpk5W0zD2NKK6kuuphdMNFY3FpV9JClp6qJZG3-hYNBA5wjGviuMvqjWc5LpcIg1CkRzlTaMqnjeb2aETYWbAj6TsNpxG0fDcNN8yZuofpptU_jTLL_DWpcIm37BG6__0IdluaQ89_a5t_fn4AJ9kwJ9OzaZXrZ7aeA9AN3Ab6hT4iBot8QDVZ6vvvfwA1daLt3g/3wa/Jdg6CKTBR-6t9RpyG6VVRA/h2/fpFn03BhnFFTp4VzVS9RmnxpMS1Ur5H-JHdROSQ05Uw)

Our public service Democrats are working to make sure that all women have the right to make their own health care decisions. **_It’s essential that we elect leaders who will fight for reproductive freedom._**

Extreme MAGA Republicans have already succeeded in rolling back decades of progress: this is the first National Women’s Health Week since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. And they’re not stopping now. They want a nationwide ban on abortion.

**Now more than ever, we need pro-choice leaders who will fight for women’s health care and reproductive freedom.**

[If you're with us, then please rush a donation to fuel our fight. clean_body: | | | Peter, This week is National Women’s Health Week – and right now, access to women’s health care is under attack on all sides. That’s why we’re supporting champions like Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett , a former public defender who has a record of fighting back against anti-choice policies in Texas, and Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo , a pediatrician who knows that private medical decisions should be made a woman and her doctor, not Republican politicians. | | Our public service Democrats are working to make sure that all women have the right to make their own health care decisions. It’s essential that we elect leaders who will fight for reproductive freedom. Extreme MAGA Republicans have already succeeded in rolling back decades of progress: this is the first National Women’s Health Week since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. And they’re not stopping now. They want a nationwide ban on abortion. Now more than ever, we need pro-choice leaders who will fight for women’s health care and reproductive freedom. | Thanks, The team at Democrats Serve | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. subject: Ahead of our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:

Peter, Corrupt Attorney General Todd Rokita is using taxpayer funds to hire partisan attorney Jim Bopp to try and keep details of his private sector work while in office from becoming public. **Hoosiers deserve transparency -- not politicians litigating culture wars and protecting their own interests.** It’s a reminder of why our grassroots organizing work is so important. We have an important role in holding elected officials like AG Todd Rokita accountable now and next year when he’s up for reelection. name: Team AOC
subject: Quick poll: George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
What do you think?
#
George Santos is under investigation by the Justice Department on 13 charges, including embezzling funds from his campaign and unemployment insurance fraud. Yet, Santos has said he will not resign.
Yesterday, Alexandria made clear what she thinks about that on the steps of the Capitol: **“Resign, bro!”**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230518-santos-survey-yes.1Q52cb&refcode=em20230518-4345-P_FND_SUR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4345%2E2526796%2EHc60Ab)
### **Do you agree that George Santos should resign?**
**[YES](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230518-santos-survey-yes.1Q52cb&refcode=em20230518-4345-P_FND_SUR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4345%2E2526796%2EHc60Ab)**
**[NO](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18632?refcode=em20230518-4345-P_FND_SUR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4345%2E2526796%2EHc60Ab)**
Santos attacked the courts and prosecutors investigating him, declaring it a ‘witch hunt’ and an act of political persecution. All of this is cut from the cloth of Donald Trump.
Attacking the truth, our institutions, and any semblance of accountability is dangerous to democracy. **We cannot normalize George Santos.** He needs to resign and, if he won’t, then the House must expel him. So far, GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy has said he won’t call on Santos to resign.
You can probably guess what Alexandria thinks about that.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230518-santos-survey-yes?refcode=em20230518-4345-P_FND_SUR_HDL&t=4&refcode2=4345_2526796_Hc60Ab&akid=4345%2E2526796%2EHc60Ab)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230518-4345-P_FND_SUR_HDL&t=5&akid=4345%2E2526796%2EHc60Ab)**

name: Rick Scott
subject: A two-tiered justice system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Right now in America, we have a two-tiered justice system.

While the IRS is spending millions of dollars targeting middle-class families and small businesses, a whistleblower sounded the alarm that they’re letting Hunter Biden get away with serious financial crimes.
_And that’s not even touching on his shady business dealings with America’s enemies like Communist China._
While our justice system is asleep at the wheel when it comes to Hunter Biden, they’re using their resources to target conservatives.

From labeling concerned parents as domestic terrorism threats to spying on churches, they’re more concerned about conservatives speaking their minds than corruption at the highest level of government.

Peter, it’s time for a justice system that is fair across the board and holds even the BIDEN family accountable.

[**May 18, 1863:** The Battle of Vicksburg during the American Civil War was a turning point due to the major significance of control of the Mississippi River. When the Union Army eventually won the battle on July 4, 1863, the South was cleaved in half with Union control of the Mississippi River. The Confederate Army then faced great difficulty in moving troops and supplies.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=496825c99a4f41f9a7b21e275176b526&_e=lmnUg7Zj4UlAkIOyAQD21OPZhfrLPhGNNxc4XwLUn8RWVlJLSxh2Pza9sqBTxS2QQ212gn7smcsb5KztXQxDayOtEwU73aiCwcCySbx5kKUA56gj2IMdIjEG3zXbm8smkQWZVSTC2V1U2ZqIS81QzqMWEgtHrUBgwm8UP3djK_BMvAZuzH4IChjIp9ijvmhF6lGZSsgGPjcHelbqvj7CI_MZBnhtnjvPlDwJFMAWmmhJr9n3bGcYMOdgPhshCYVk) **Source -[battlefields.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=496825c99a4f41f9a7b21e275176b526&_e=lmnUg7Zj4UlAkIOyAQD21OPZhfrLPhGNNxc4XwLUn8RWVlJLSxh2Pza9sqBTxS2QQ212gn7smcsb5KztXQxDayOtEwU73aiCwcCySbx5kKUxWkGU4CGxw0sxTVkJDvSUHX6EB_7XNneaGP31HlAClJJBh1YwFU3x0N6F3xB7TUu5VRpqdwZ15Zz1akyJHRLZYc0WYigW-_TKOQWtPTrZ-k2XT7048P0u7HLitngzPeR6swTUIZzlEjJul8KoEfat)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=496825c99a4f41f9a7b21e275176b526&_e=lmnUg7Zj4UlAkIOyAQD21GcLPzUzcKbCB_gwb5lWvjLNoBQMZRqqZaWOKuRpZUG3747e0omRfAmpivunq3v_N7Tp6GwpglBGjeWL3NcU16WVDaknLWTc3-xHiXh0-NRmRVo4V3IsSl6yCUa4JvB7pcUGvBHBTcPzKDbEaBpMfKyOo2Jb2xboaHUdG2ueIYlC-y6lHViWHd07H00pMmlowVDIiLmEyez2ncaVVdptHM8SlkaBvRh73qGmxF30VR9X)**

[**May 18, 1980:** The most destructive volcanic eruption in the history of the United States occurred when Mount St. Helens in Washington State erupted. The massive eruption killed 57 people, destroyed 210 square miles of wilderness, and felled 10 million trees. The size of the eruption led to its catastrophic impact; the lateral blast extended 12 miles, the eruption cloud went 12 miles into the sky, and the avalanche that ensued surged at a speed of 100 miles per hour.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=496825c99a4f41f9a7b21e275176b526&_e=lmnUg7Zj4UlAkIOyAQD21Gx-DluYc2YClZVfIzyC3jEcYA0VLZwSvMs_Zjzg35j9429EM6HOAe84L4Vf3TOVg0IrsDuXT0vnLifGidRmzn4KaT6q8PQSSeVjPpRf-ZiLK1iQBo5z7xlT9T-yDwlXZzF7SNh_FrA4k9-AzlmhvYYcOg6BxDf0XEa1r9ZoV5w-WFXD6dGVrgExysw3tOeZE5caLzY79yu5cL9b65_Ace8C9-3J82Lfd2D89r_qg1bX) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=496825c99a4f41f9a7b21e275176b526&_e=lmnUg7Zj4UlAkIOyAQD21Gx-DluYc2YClZVfIzyC3jEcYA0VLZwSvMs_Zjzg35j9429EM6HOAe84L4Vf3TOVg0IrsDuXT0vnLifGidRmzn5ioWtAO7c3WZnYQOJthkjx4VoPG-T7HzAYIewIZLemh-N2PvYCIQp72YmHzmIbjIgNmgeqdvbgL1DVBEaXz-xficUlenW2S_l_uGvl45yPxv5O83T4oQvOr14upqXd3LfVSLSG_MaGLxQzhRlsu5tB)**

[**May 18, 2004:** Randy Johnson, at age 40, became the oldest MLB pitcher to throw a perfect game. Pitching for the Arizona Diamondbacks, his perfect game resulted in a 2-0 victory over the Atlanta Braves. This game was also the Diamondbacks' first-ever no-hitter.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=496825c99a4f41f9a7b21e275176b526&_e=lmnUg7Zj4UlAkIOyAQD21L4jB-A_X_wVMp9HMXx69HGn3mTDZ1F9zMQOC-ZJgKfPbFVxivVNQE7CzaSjNkBcIKvPzFKkl5r0r7N-ZDvjO_FOK1lofu_zcUS1vPpAkfp44p3665-TVUyfy3p4nRaiRDDLKT3dt78ACQ5djq_nhmBGy99X_cpxhI_s4lgnxziIo_WZK1A9pKiHpH2rKVliofVDsixsM1V61TRLLYFEdX4ZJKLawNuSyte1C9otWSkm) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=496825c99a4f41f9a7b21e275176b526&_e=lmnUg7Zj4UlAkIOyAQD21L4jB-A_X_wVMp9HMXx69HGn3mTDZ1F9zMQOC-ZJgKfPbFVxivVNQE7CzaSjNkBcIKvPzFKkl5r0r7N-ZDvjO_HV0Jwl5of8-EenH90sXJej0oBWEoKGN6C7wBjK02t7c_FYu4JCbOmmNB95markW11NkNvNzd8-zsfXHhKbYWFMpXtKmObUo_OZZ-958EC5WxK1BAlwtZezvS3sg1xaqBW978N6dr9ehHN-YkHo-QON)**

Last year, we successfully protected the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument, setting aside more than 53,000 acres of public lands that will now be protected for our children and grandchildren. Now, we’re working to pass the CORE Act to protect more than 420,000 additional acres of public lands. Colorado’s public lands are critical to curbing the effects of climate change, growing our economy, and our way of life as Coloradans. I won’t stop working to protect them. [**Will you join me and help us pass the CORE Act and protect Colorado’s public lands? name: Mark Takano
subject: Republicans voted to INCREASE veteran homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I won’t let veterans go homeless

| Peter, pandemic-era veteran funding recently expired and I’m furious that House Republicans voted AGAINST extending aid. [**Sign my petition now to force Republicans to do right by our veterans. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63495585/406985418/-453833478?refcode=MTFC_20230518_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2FhYTRhZi1kMWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v6Pvd0ce6IzBsdYkSf2gDNe6DM_4tz0qCqDEcggLLgM=&emci=b7a75658-f1f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=13aaa4af-d1f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) This aid was critical to supporting veterans experiencing homelessness – in fact _veterans homelessness went down 11%_ during the pandemic thanks to this extra aid.

But if Republicans continue to block extending veteran funding, we could see veteran homelessness go back up!

**Let me repeat: Republicans voted to INCREASE veteran homelessness! **

As the Democrat Ranking Member of the House Veteran Affairs Committee, I have voiced my support for extended aid, I’ve spoken up against Republicans’ refusal to act, and **now I’m ringing the alarm bells on the dire situation veterans face.**

_Nobody wants to see our courageous, selfless veterans living on the streets. If enough of us speak up, we can shame Republicans into taking action:_

[**Peter -- I need a huge SURGE of public input demanding an extension of veteran homelessness aid. clean_body: I won’t let veterans go homeless | Peter, pandemic-era veteran funding recently expired and I’m furious that House Republicans voted AGAINST extending aid. This aid was critical to supporting veterans experiencing homelessness – in fact veterans homelessness went down 11% during the pandemic thanks to this extra aid. But if Republicans continue to block extending veteran funding, we could see veteran homelessness go back up! Let me repeat: Republicans voted to INCREASE veteran homelessness! As the Democrat Ranking Member of the House Veteran Affairs Committee, I have voiced my support for extended aid, I’ve spoken up against Republicans’ refusal to act, and now I’m ringing the alarm bells on the dire situation veterans face. Nobody wants to see our courageous, selfless veterans living on the streets. If enough of us speak up, we can shame Republicans into taking action: | Thank you, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Katie Porter
subject: Juggling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Someone recently told me my life boils down to “juggling and fighting evil.”
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23160%2E3422442%2E2wf5DI)
Someone recently told me my life boils down to “juggling and fighting evil.”
It’s true, like most American parents I do a lot of juggling at home—making sure my kids are fed and at least loosely supervised. I juggled that with work, which as a Congresswoman means preparing for hearings, working on legislation, and meeting with folks in Orange County. And as a candidate for the U.S. Senate, it means traveling up and down the state connecting with voters and yes, fundraising.
**But I do all of this so we can fight evil.** The Republican House majority chooses to demonize a new group of Americans every week. Whether it’s the LGBTQ+ community, people who have abortions, or teachers—it’s nonstop. **We have to fight their sometimes straight-up evil policy choices.**
**I’m able to do all of this only because I have folks like you on our team.** Our campaign and our movement have always been and always will be people-powered. [**Consider joining us today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230518-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAH18_2_JUG_20230518_V1_F&refcode2=23160_3422442_2wf5DI&akid=23160%2E3422442%2E2wf5DI)

Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH18_2_JUG_20230518_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23160_3422442_2wf5DI&akid=23160%2E3422442%2E2wf5DI)**

**You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets.**

In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up. We need to make sure we're prepared for their attacks come election year, and the preparation starts NOW.

Friend, missing deadlines doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and **BEAT** us in elections.

clean_body: | Hey friend. Listen, I have one simple question for you. Are you really on my team? My finance team just called and informed me we missed our recent fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - a LOT. You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets. In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up. We need to make sure we're prepared for their attacks come election year, and the preparation starts NOW. Friend, missing deadlines doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and BEAT us in elections. Thanks, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Will you support the Living Schoolyards Act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Add your name >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63495870/406986762/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230518_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBhMjAxNC1kNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8x7et6S6TsXVwwSiHqFtyyrI1hbdDyxdCdhpGGCETGE=&emci=0741c040-d4f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=880a2014-d5f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Spending time outdoors isn’t just a pastime for New Mexicans, folks: It’s a way of life. That’s why I introduced the _Living Schoolyards Act_ to turn our schoolyards into learning environments for students in the Land of Enchantment and across the country. This legislation will support school communities who want to explore and learn in the outdoors — from helping plant more trees, to taking tablet learning outside with Wi-Fi and charging stations, to even simply installing more seating in the schoolyard. **[Will you support this vital legislation to create outdoor spaces for kids to study and celebrate nature? You can become a citizen co-sponsor by signing on today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63495871/406986763/663641679?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230518_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBhMjAxNC1kNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8x7et6S6TsXVwwSiHqFtyyrI1hbdDyxdCdhpGGCETGE=&emci=0741c040-d4f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=880a2014-d5f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63495872/406986764/663641679?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230518_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODBhMjAxNC1kNWY1LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8x7et6S6TsXVwwSiHqFtyyrI1hbdDyxdCdhpGGCETGE=&emci=0741c040-d4f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=880a2014-d5f5-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Thank you,
Martin

name: DWS PAC
subject: Attention: 1,000 activists needed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC, 315 INSPIRATION LANE, GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878
body:
Update: We need another 1,000 activists to write to President Biden this week to protect the USPS from Louis DeJoy’s radical attempts to undermine it.

Click here to do your part→ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]

Read original message:

We’ve all felt it:

Under Louis DeJoy, the prices for sending mail have skyrocketed and the speed of service has gone down substantially. Now he plans to cut letter carriers’ pay and lay off more workers— a move that will be felt throughout the nation.

The Trump appointee has a plan to privatize the USPS in the next 10 years, a direct threat to workers, consumers, and our entire postal system. We must stop him.

The president has the opportunity to nominate two more nominees to the USPS board of governors—so we’ve launched a letter writing campaign to make sure whoever is nominated is going to make it a priority to fire DeJoy at last. Click here to participate before our Friday deadline→ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]
Start writing! [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]

From denying members of Congress access to investigate issues, to slowing down the delivery of essentials like medication, the postal service is in a state of immediate crisis.

Now, we need to do everything we can to save this essential public service. Are you with us?

Sign on now→ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]

—Team Democrats Win Seats
PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC, 315 INSPIRATION LANE, GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.

Click here to unsubscribe from our email list. name: Jon Tester
subject: Oops

body:
Hey Peter, I need your help!
We're setting a 72-hour goal to raise $50,000 to help send me back to the Senate and...
fix the drywall. 😬🧰🔨
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-tester-2023?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230518-1-EM&amount=30.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-tester-2023?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230518-1-EM&amount=30.00]
As you know, Senator Cory Booker is one of my best friends in the Senate. The other day he was helping me record a video, and I was pushing him around a little like I usually do. Well, one thing led to another, and we broke the wall.
Before we tore up that wall, Booker and I were talking about how we’re working to fix the real problems that affect real people — from lowering costs for families, to standing up for veterans, to improving government accountability.
We’ve been able to fix a lot of things by bringing Montana values to Congress, but there’s still work to be done, and with national Republicans eyeing me as a top target, I need your help:
Can I count on you to spit a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress today to help us raise $50,000 in 72 hours to help keep me in the Senate working to fix the real problems facing all Montanans (and the drywall 🪚)? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-tester-2023?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230518-1-EM&amount=25.00]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-tester-2023?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230518-1-EM&amount=]
Thanks for your support, and let me know if you know any good carpenters. 😬
— Jon

name: Asa Hutchinson
subject: Have you joined the Day 1 Club yet?
body:
Join before it's too late!

| | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/9Ei4Fp-0o1zf0QfCc-LwsA~~/AAAHUQA~)
---
| | Friend,
Thank you to all the incredible individuals who have already joined our Day 1 Supporter Club. Your early support means the world to me and my team!

**It's time for the Republican Party to shift focus from the 2020 election and embrace a positive vision for our nation's future.** Our campaign is dedicated to delivering tangible results that benefit the American People.

At present, many Americans are facing significant challenges. Inflation is reaching unprecedented levels, the federal deficit is spiraling out of control, energy prices are soaring, crime rates are surging in our cities, and our southern border remains largely unprotected. The Republican Party must move on from Donald Trump and the 2020 election if we are ever going to win a future election! **We simply cannot afford another 4 years of unchecked Dem****ocrat control. **

If you're ready to move forward from the 2020 election and seek consistent **_conservative_** leadership, I cordially invite you to become a member of our Day 1 Supporter Club.

**By donating $35, you will join the club and receive two official Day 1 Club Buttons!**

Let's come together to shape a brighter tomorrow for our great nation.

[**_Join the Day 1 Supporter Club today!_**](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/9Ei4Fp-0o1zf0QfCc-LwsA~~/AAAHUQA~)

Thank you for your support!

Sincerely,

Asa Hutchinson

clean_body: Join before it's too late! | | | | | | | Friend, Thank you to all the incredible individuals who have already joined our Day 1 Supporter Club. Your early support means the world to me and my team! It's time for the Republican Party to shift focus from the 2020 election and embrace a positive vision for our nation's future. Our campaign is dedicated to delivering tangible results that benefit the American People. At present, many Americans are facing significant challenges. Inflation is reaching unprecedented levels, the federal deficit is spiraling out of control, energy prices are soaring, crime rates are surging in our cities, and our southern border remains largely unprotected. The Republican Party must move on from Donald Trump and the 2020 election if we are ever going to win a future election! We simply cannot afford another 4 years of unchecked Democrat control. If you're ready to move forward from the 2020 election and seek consistent conservative leadership, I cordially invite you to become a member of our Day 1 Supporter Club. By donating $35, you will join the club and receive two official Day 1 Club Buttons! Let's come together to shape a brighter tomorrow for our great nation. | "Join the Day 1 Club!" With your support, we can restore integrity and conservative leadership to the White House and build a stronger, more prosperous future for all Americans. Thank you for your support! name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: After Today's House Session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
My thoughts I wanted to share with you.

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/01000188314d4cc1-fbae2033-50ad-4f1e-96d0-fbd02e6e9bf6-000000/9qKaKcrxCNpyk6p3OAsnZu6MTUc=322)
---
| | Derek,

In February when House Democrats had a temporary majority they voted to:

➡️ Strip low income students of educational freedom
➡️ Increase energy rates by $30 Million statewide.

Today with a temporary majority they voted to:

➡️ Reject any future discussion on Parental Rights
➡️ Limit Debate on Amendments & the underlying bill
➡️ Rescind the bipartisan compromise we adopted in our House Budget.

It's clear House Democrats, empowered by their dark money special interest allies, will use any and all resources made available to them, to fund their member's expenses to attend sessions.

How do we fight back? We need to elect 240 House Republicans in 2024 to have a working majority that can further expand Educational Freedom, enshrine a Parent's Right to Know into law, protect Granite State taxpayers, fight for ratepayers, and ensure thorough and active debates & discussions on all policy coming before the House of Representatives.

Time and time again Democrats have shown us what they will do when they get even a modicum of temporary power. We need to fight back, show the people of New Hampshire the type of leadership a full Democrat majority will bring, and campaign by talking to each and every Granite Stater willing to listen about what a fully empowered and functioning Republican majority can provide for the Granite State.

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions
